<a id="asset-namespace"></a>
## `asset` namespace

<a id="asset-delete"></a>
### `asset.Delete`

Remove an asset. Refuses (AssetInUse) if any device or group still references it.

**Permission**: devices / delete

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deleted` | `enum(true)` | yes |  |  |
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "deleted": true,
  "id": "string"
}
```

<a id="asset-describe"></a>
### `asset.Describe`

Return the asset namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="asset-list"></a>
### `asset.List`

List the organization's visual assets. Used by the asset picker to show reusable images across all device decoration surfaces.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 200 |
| `cursor` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `search` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 100 |
| `context` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 32 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].url` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].sha256` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 64, maxLength 64 |
| `items[].contentType` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].sizeBytes` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |
| `items[].label` | `string \| null` | yes |  | maxLength 255 |
| `items[].uploadedBy` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].context` | `string` | yes |  | maxLength 32 |
| `items[].created` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `nextCursor` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": "string",
      "url": "string",
      "sha256": "string",
      "contentType": "string",
      "sizeBytes": 1,
      "label": "string",
      "uploadedBy": "string",
      "context": "string",
      "created": "string"
    }
  ],
  "nextCursor": "string"
}
```

<a id="asset-migrateimages"></a>
### `asset.MigrateImages`

One-shot: rewrite image-path columns into asset UUIDs. Idempotent.

**Permission**: tenant-admin only

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `actor` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `startedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `finishedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `tables` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `tables[].table` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `tables[].scanned` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `tables[].alreadyUuid` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `tables[].migrated` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `tables[].fileMissing` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `tables[].failed` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "actor": "string",
  "startedAt": "string",
  "finishedAt": "string",
  "tables": [
    {
      "table": "string",
      "scanned": 0,
      "alreadyUuid": 0,
      "migrated": 0,
      "fileMissing": 0,
      "failed": 0
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="asset-setlabel"></a>
### `asset.SetLabel`

Rename a stored asset for easier library discovery.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `label` | `string \| null` | yes |  | maxLength 255 |
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "label": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `url` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `sha256` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 64, maxLength 64 |
| `contentType` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `sizeBytes` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |
| `label` | `string \| null` | yes |  | maxLength 255 |
| `uploadedBy` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `context` | `string` | yes |  | maxLength 32 |
| `created` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "url": "string",
  "sha256": "string",
  "contentType": "string",
  "sizeBytes": 1,
  "label": "string",
  "uploadedBy": "string",
  "context": "string",
  "created": "string"
}
```

| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |

| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |

<a id="assignment-namespace"></a>
## `assignment` namespace

<a id="assignment-create"></a>
### `assignment.Create`

Attach a persona to a user or group with scope.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `subjectType` | `enum("user" \| "user_group")` | yes |  |  |
| `subjectId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `personaId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `scope` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `scope.all` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `scope.device_ids` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `scope.location_ids` | `array<integer>` | no |  |  |
| `scope.device_group_ids` | `array<integer>` | no |  |  |
| `scope.device_tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `scope.dashboard_ids` | `array<integer>` | no |  |  |
| `scope.plugin_keys` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `scope.waiting_room_ids` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `scope.configuration_keys` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `scope.report_ids` | `array<integer>` | no |  |  |
| `scope.organization_ids` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `scope.alert_ids` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `scope.notification_ids` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `scope.integration_keys` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `scope.automation_ids` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `scope.actions` | `array<string>` | no |  | minItems 1 |
| `reason` | `string \| null` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 200 |
| `comment` | `string \| null` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 1000 |
| `expiresAt` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "subjectType": "user",
  "subjectId": "string",
  "personaId": "string",
  "scope": {}
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="assignment-delete"></a>
### `assignment.Delete`

Remove an assignment.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

### `assignment.Describe`

Component metadata.

**Permission**: public

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

```json
{}
```

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `personaId` | `string` | yes |  |  |

```json
  "personaId": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="assignment-listforresource"></a>
### `assignment.ListForResource`

List assignments whose scope references a specific resource. Backs the ShareDialog "Shared with" panel.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `resourceType` | `enum("dashboard" \| "location" \| "group" \| "device" \| "tag" \| "plugin" \| "waiting_room" \| "configuration" \| "report" \| "organization" \| "alert" \| "notification" \| "integration" \| "automation" \| "action")` | yes |  |  |
| `resourceId` | `string \| integer` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json

  "resourceType": "dashboard",
  "resourceId": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

### `assignment.ListForSubject`

List assignments attached to a specific user or group.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

| `subjectId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |

**Params example:**

```json

  "subjectType": "user",
  "subjectId": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="assignment-listunused"></a>
### `assignment.ListUnused`

List assignments unused for thresholdDays (defaults to FM_AUTHZ_UNUSED_THRESHOLD_DAYS). Used by the least-privilege recommender to suggest revokes.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `thresholdDays` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 3650 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="audit-namespace"></a>
## `audit` namespace

<a id="audit-describe"></a>
### `audit.Describe`

Return the audit namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="audit-export"></a>
### `audit.Export`

Export matching audit rows to a CSV file; returns a one-time download URL.

**Permission**: admin-only

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `from` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `to` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `eventTypes` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "from": "string",
  "to": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `filename` | `string` | yes |  | Server-side filename, shape `audit-log-<tenant\|fleet>-<epochMs>.csv`. Owner is the exporter; provider support gets `fleet` as the tenant segment. |
| `downloadUrl` | `string` | yes |  | GET path that streams the CSV. Requires either a valid mint-ticket on the query string or that the caller is the original exporter with audit-view role. |
| `downloadTicketUrl` | `string` | yes |  | POST this path (owner-bound) to mint a one-time download ticket. Response is `{downloadUrl}` with a fresh ticket embedded. |
| `rows` | `integer` | yes |  | Number of rows in the CSV. |
| `generated` | `string` | yes |  | ISO-8601 timestamp the export completed. |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "filename": "string",
  "downloadUrl": "string",
  "downloadTicketUrl": "string",
  "rows": 0,
  "generated": "string"
}
```

<a id="audit-query"></a>
### `audit.Query`

Search the audit log with optional time range, event-type, username, and shellyID filters.

**Permission**: admin-only

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `from` | `string` | no |  | ISO-8601 inclusive start |
| `to` | `string` | no |  | ISO-8601 exclusive end |
| `eventTypes` | `array<enum("login" \| "logout" \| "rpc" \| "device_online" \| "device_offline" \| "device_add" \| "device_delete" \| "device_reconnect_replace" \| "config_change" \| "permission_change")>` | no |  |  |
| `username` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `shellyId` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | no | `200` | min 1, max 10000 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no | `0` | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].ts` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].event_type` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].username` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].shelly_id` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].shelly_ids` | `array \| null` | no |  | Every device the row touches — 1 for single-device ops, N for bulk ops, null for fleet-wide rows. |
| `items[].method` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].params` | `object \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].success` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `items[].error_message` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].ip_address` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "ts": "string",
      "event_type": "string"
    }
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false
}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="auth-namespace"></a>
## `auth` namespace

<a id="auth-describe"></a>
### `auth.Describe`

Return the auth namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="auth-mintscopedtoken"></a>
### `auth.MintScopedToken`

Issue a short-lived, single-purpose bearer token bound to the callers org. Plaintext is returned once; only its SHA-256 hash is persisted.

**Permission**: authenticated; bounded PATs rejected

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `purpose` | `enum("devices.create")` | yes |  |  |
| `ttlSec` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 1800 |
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "purpose": "devices.create"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `token` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `expiresAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `purpose` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "token": "string",
  "expiresAt": "string",
  "organizationId": "string",
  "purpose": "string"
}
```

<a id="backup-namespace"></a>
## `backup` namespace

<a id="backup-delete"></a>
### `backup.Delete`

Delete a backup by id.

**Permission**: devices / delete

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="backup-describe"></a>
### `backup.Describe`

Return the backup namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="backup-downloadfromdevice"></a>
### `backup.DownloadFromDevice`

Pull a fresh backup from a device and persist it.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `name` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 200 |
| `contents` | `object<boolean>` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="backup-get"></a>
### `backup.Get`

Fetch backup metadata by id.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="backup-getfile"></a>
### `backup.GetFile`

Return the raw backup payload (base64) and metadata.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `data` | `string` | yes |  | base64 payload |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `size` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "data": "string",
  "name": "string"
}
```

<a id="backup-list"></a>
### `backup.List`

List device backups, optionally filtered by shellyID.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1 |
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | 0 = unlimited — min 0 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object<any>>` | yes |  |  |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {}
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false
}
```

<a id="backup-rename"></a>
### `backup.Rename`

Rename a stored backup.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 200 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "name": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="backup-restoretodevice"></a>
### `backup.RestoreToDevice`

Restore a backup to a device.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `restore` | `object<boolean>` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="backup-startdownloadjob"></a>
### `backup.StartDownloadJob`

Queue a backend-owned backup creation job for one or more devices.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyIDs` | `array<string>` | yes |  | minItems 1, maxItems 500 |
| `name` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 200 |
| `contents` | `object<boolean>` | no |  |  |
| `idempotencyKey` | `string` | no |  | minLength 8, maxLength 128 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyIDs": [
    "string"
  ]
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `jobId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "jobId": "string"
}
```

<a id="backup-startrestorejob"></a>
### `backup.StartRestoreJob`

Queue a backend-owned backup restore job for one device.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `restore` | `object<boolean>` | no |  |  |
| `idempotencyKey` | `string` | no |  | minLength 8, maxLength 128 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `jobId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "jobId": "string"
}
```

| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="bill-namespace"></a>
## `bill` namespace

<a id="bill-delete"></a>
### `bill.Delete`

Delete a recorded bill.

**Permission**: reports / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `number` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="bill-describe"></a>
### `bill.Describe`

Return the bill namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="bill-list"></a>
### `bill.List`

List recorded bills, optionally within a date range.

**Permission**: reports / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `from` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `to` | `string` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="bill-set"></a>
### `bill.Set`

Record (upsert) the actual bill for a billing period.

**Permission**: reports / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `periodStart` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `periodEnd` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `actualCost` | `number` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `currency` | `string` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "periodStart": "string",
  "periodEnd": "string",
  "actualCost": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `periodStart` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `periodEnd` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `actualCost` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `currency` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "periodStart": "string",
  "periodEnd": "string",
  "actualCost": 0,
  "currency": "string"
}
```


<a id="bluassist-namespace"></a>
## `bluassist` namespace

<a id="bluassist-bond-delete"></a>
### `bluassist.Bond.Delete`

bluassist.Bond.Delete — remove the bond record for the addr.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `addr` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "addr": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Response example:**

```json
{}
```

<a id="bluassist-bond-enable"></a>
### `bluassist.Bond.Enable`

bluassist.Bond.Enable — globally allow/deny bonding on the device.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `enable` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "enable": false
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Response example:**

```json
{}
```

<a id="bluassist-bond-has"></a>
### `bluassist.Bond.Has`

bluassist.Bond.Has — check whether a bond record exists for the addr.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `addr` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "addr": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `have_bond` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Response example:**

```json
{}
```

<a id="bluassist-call"></a>
### `bluassist.Call`

bluassist.Call — high-level RPC over BLE (used by BLU TRV and similar protocols).

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `addr` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `method` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `params` | `object<any>` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "addr": "string",
  "method": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="bluassist-connect"></a>
### `bluassist.Connect`

bluassist.Connect — open a GATT connection to the addr. Counts against the device 5-slot pool.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `addr` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `timeout_ms` | `integer` | no |  | min 1000, max 60000 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "addr": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `conn_id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `addr` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `mtu` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "conn_id": 0
}
```

<a id="bluassist-connection-list"></a>
### `bluassist.Connection.List`

bluassist.Connection.List — FM-tracked active GATT connections for the device. Capacity is the device pool (5).

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `slots` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `slots[].conn_id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `slots[].addr` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `slots[].openedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `slots[].discoveredAt` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `slots[].mtu` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `capacity` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `inUse` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "slots": [
    {
      "conn_id": 0,
      "addr": "string",
      "openedAt": "string"
    }
  ],
  "capacity": 0,
  "inUse": 0
}
```

<a id="bluassist-describe"></a>
### `bluassist.Describe`

Return the bluassist namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="bluassist-disconnect"></a>
### `bluassist.Disconnect`

bluassist.Disconnect — close a GATT connection by conn_id or addr.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `conn_id` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `addr` | `string` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Response example:**

```json
{}
```

<a id="bluassist-discover"></a>
### `bluassist.Discover`

bluassist.Discover — enumerate services and characteristics on a connected peripheral.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `conn_id` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `addr` | `string` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `services` | `array<object<any>>` | no |  |  |
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Response example:**

```json
{}
```

<a id="bluassist-read"></a>
### `bluassist.Read`

bluassist.Read — read a characteristic by handle or svc+chr UUID.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `conn_id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `handle` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `svc` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `chr` | `string` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "conn_id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `data` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Response example:**

```json
{}
```

<a id="bluassist-scan"></a>
### `bluassist.Scan`

bluassist.Scan — proxies GATTC.Scan on a BLU Assistant and enriches results with BTHome parsing + fleet cross-reference.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `active` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `duration_ms` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 30000 |
| `window_ms` | `number` | no |  | min 2.5, max 10240 |
| `interval_ms` | `number` | no |  | min 2.5, max 10240 |
| `rssi_thr` | `integer` | no |  | min -100, max 0 |
| `shellyOnly` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `results` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `results[].addr` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `results[].rssi` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `results[].advData` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `results[].parsed` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `results[].parsed.isShellyBlu` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `results[].parsed.encrypted` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `results[].parsed.localName` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `results[].parsed.modelId` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `results[].parsed.modelString` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `results[].parsed.productName` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `results[].knownInFleet` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `results[].knownInFleet.externalId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `results[].knownInFleet.name` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `results[].knownInFleet.gatewayShellyId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `scanned` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "results": [
    {
      "addr": "string",
      "rssi": 0
    }
  ],
  "scanned": 0
}
```

<a id="bluassist-setnotify"></a>
### `bluassist.SetNotify`

bluassist.SetNotify — subscribe (notify/indicate) or unsubscribe (none) to a characteristic.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `conn_id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `mode` | `enum("none" \| "notify" \| "indicate")` | yes |  |  |
| `handle` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `svc` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `chr` | `string` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "conn_id": 0,
  "mode": "none"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Response example:**

```json
{}
```

<a id="bluassist-write"></a>
### `bluassist.Write`

bluassist.Write — write a characteristic by handle or svc+chr UUID. data is hex.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `conn_id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `data` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `handle` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `svc` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `chr` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `response` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "conn_id": 0,
  "data": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Response example:**

```json
{}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

```json
}
```

<a id="branding-namespace"></a>
## `branding` namespace

<a id="branding-activate"></a>
### `branding.Activate`

Branding.Activate — promote the draft policy to live on the login page.

**Permission**: admin-only — proxies Zitadel label policy

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `orgId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
```

| `backgroundColorDark` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `fontColorDark` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `hideLoginNameSuffix` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `disableWatermark` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `themeMode` | `enum("THEME_MODE_AUTO" \| "THEME_MODE_LIGHT" \| "THEME_MODE_DARK")` | no |  |  |

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

```json
}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="bthome-namespace"></a>
## `bthome` namespace

<a id="bthome-control-create"></a>
### `bthome.Control.Create`

BTHomeControl.Create — bind a BLU remote to an output component.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `output` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `inputs` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "output": "string",
  "inputs": [
    {}
  ]
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="bthome-control-delete"></a>
### `bthome.Control.Delete`

Delete one BTHome control binding, or all when id is omitted.

**Permission**: devices / delete

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | no |  | Component index on the device (0-based) — min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

| `productName` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `modelId` | `string` | no |  |  |

```json
  "mac": "string"
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

```json
  "success": true,
  "alreadyPaired": false
}
```

<a id="bthome-device-getconfig"></a>
### `bthome.Device.GetConfig`

BTHomeDevice.GetConfig — per-device config + meta.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | Component index on the device (0-based) — min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

| `knownObjects` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

```json
{}
```

<a id="bthome-startdiscovery"></a>
### `bthome.StartDiscovery`

Start BTHome device discovery on a gateway.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `duration` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `success` | `const(true)` | yes |  |  |
| `duration` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "duration": 0
}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="button-describe"></a>
### `button.Describe`

Return the button namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `config` | `object` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "config": {}
}
```

Type: `object`

```json
  "id": 0
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |


---

<a id="cct-namespace"></a>
## `cct` namespace

<a id="cct-describe"></a>
### `cct.Describe`

Return the cct namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="cct-dimdown"></a>
### `cct.DimDown`

CCT.DimDown — optional fade_rate [1,5].

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `fade_rate` | `integer` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

CCT.DimStop.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

### `cct.DimUp`

CCT.DimUp — optional fade_rate [1,5].

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

```json
}
```

CCT.GetConfig.

**Permission**: devices / read

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

<a id="cct-getstatus"></a>
### `cct.GetStatus`

CCT.GetStatus.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

<a id="cct-set"></a>
### `cct.Set`

CCT.Set — ct/brightness/transition/state.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `on` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `brightness` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `ct` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `transition` | `number` | no |  |  |
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

<a id="cct-setconfig"></a>
### `cct.SetConfig`

CCT.SetConfig.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

### `cct.Toggle`

CCT.Toggle.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |
