<a id="certificate-namespace"></a>
## `certificate` namespace

<a id="certificate-delete"></a>
### `certificate.Delete`

Delete a cert. Refuses if currently pushed and not yet replaced.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="certificate-describe"></a>
### `certificate.Describe`

Component metadata.

**Permission**: public

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="certificate-export"></a>
### `certificate.Export`

Export cert PEM (+ optional private key). Audited every call.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `includePrivateKey` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="certificate-get"></a>
### `certificate.Get`

Full metadata for one cert. PEM body included only when includePem=true (admin).

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `includePem` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="certificate-getissuedefaults"></a>
### `certificate.GetIssueDefaults`

Returns {defaultValidityDays, maxValidityDays} from FM env. Frontend reads these instead of mirroring FM_UI_CERT_* runtime config.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="certificate-import"></a>
### `certificate.Import`

Import an unencrypted PEM cert (and optional unencrypted private key). Encrypted keys / PFX are rejected per Shelly TLS KB.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 200 |
| `kind` | `enum("root_ca" \| "client_pair" \| "server_bundle" \| "device" \| "other")` | yes |  |  |
| `pem` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 524288 |
| `privateKeyPem` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 65536 |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  | maxItems 32 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "name": "string",
  "kind": "root_ca",
  "pem": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="certificate-issuedevicecert"></a>
### `certificate.IssueDeviceCert`

FM signs a leaf cert for a shellyID against the local Shelly Fleet Manager Root CA.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `validityDays` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 3650 |
| `name` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 200 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyId": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="certificate-list"></a>
### `certificate.List`

List certificates with optional filters.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `kind` | `enum("root_ca" \| "client_pair" \| "server_bundle" \| "device" \| "other")` | no |  |  |
| `source` | `enum("imported" \| "fm-issued")` | no |  |  |
| `slot` | `enum("root_ca" \| "client_cert" \| "client_key" \| "server_ca" \| "server_cert" \| "server_key")` | no |  |  |
| `tag` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `groupId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `expiringWithinDays` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 3650 |
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 500 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object<any>>` | yes |  |  |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {}
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false
}
```

<a id="certificate-listpushes"></a>
### `certificate.ListPushes`

List push history scoped by cert / device / job.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `certificateId` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `deviceId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1 |
| `jobId` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 500 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="certificate-preflightpush"></a>
### `certificate.PreflightPush`

Resolve the target and report which devices are compatible vs skipped (offline / firmware too old / unsupported key algo / slot incompat) plus warnings (clock skew, enhanced_security off).

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `certificateId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `slot` | `enum("root_ca" \| "client_cert" \| "client_key" \| "server_ca" \| "server_cert" \| "server_key")` | yes |  |  |
| `target` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `target.deviceIds` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `target.groupIds` | `array<integer>` | no |  |  |
| `target.tagKeys` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "certificateId": "string",
  "slot": "root_ca",
  "target": {}
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="certificate-pushstatus"></a>
### `certificate.PushStatus`

Polling fallback for the WS push event stream.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `jobId` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "jobId": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="certificate-pushtodevices"></a>
### `certificate.PushToDevices`

Queue a push job that fans the cert out to the resolved target devices in the chosen slot. Returns {jobId, deviceCount}.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `certificateId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `slot` | `enum("root_ca" \| "client_cert" \| "client_key" \| "server_ca" \| "server_cert" \| "server_key")` | yes |  |  |
| `target` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `target.deviceIds` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `target.groupIds` | `array<integer>` | no |  |  |
| `target.tagKeys` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "certificateId": "string",
  "slot": "root_ca",
  "target": {}
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="certificate-setgroups"></a>
### `certificate.SetGroups`

Replace the device-group bindings (typed FK to organization.groups).

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `groupIds` | `array<integer>` | yes |  | maxItems 256 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "groupIds": [
    1
  ]
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="certificate-settags"></a>
### `certificate.SetTags`

Replace the tag set on a cert. Free-form labels for filter/search.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | yes |  | maxItems 32 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "tags": [
    "string"
  ]
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="certificate-signcsr"></a>
### `certificate.SignCsr`

FM signs an operator-supplied CSR against the local Shelly Fleet Manager Root CA. Operator keeps the private key on the device that generated the CSR.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `csrPem` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 65536 |
| `validityDays` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 3650 |
| `name` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 200 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "csrPem": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="certificate-update"></a>
### `certificate.Update`

Update mutable cert fields (name only). PEM is immutable after import.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 200 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |

| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |

<a id="channel-namespace"></a>
## `channel` namespace

<a id="channel-create"></a>
### `channel.Create`

Create a channel. Secret fields are stored separately and encrypted.

**Permission**: notifications / create

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `provider` | `enum("email_smtp" \| "generic_webhook" \| "slack_webhook" \| "teams_workflow_webhook" \| "telegram_bot" \| "push_fcm" \| "sms_twilio" \| "voice_twilio" \| "webhook_signed")` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | `true` |  |
| `config` | `object<any>` | yes |  | ≤ 65536 B JSON |
| `quietHours` | `object \| null` | no |  |  |
| `quietHours.startHour` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0, max 23 |
| `quietHours.endHour` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0, max 23 |
| `quietHours.timezone` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 60 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "provider": "email_smtp",
  "name": "string",
  "config": {}
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `provider` | `enum("email_smtp" \| "generic_webhook" \| "slack_webhook" \| "teams_workflow_webhook" \| "telegram_bot" \| "push_fcm" \| "sms_twilio" \| "voice_twilio" \| "webhook_signed")` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `config` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |
| `secretState` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `secretState.hasSecretFields` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `lastTestAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `lastTestStatus` | `enum("success" \| "failed" \| null)` | yes |  |  |
| `lastDeliveryAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `lastDeliveryStatus` | `enum("success" \| "failed" \| null)` | yes |  |  |
| `health` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `health.consecutiveFailures` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `health.lastSuccessAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `health.lastFailureAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `health.autoDisabledAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `health.disableReason` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `quietHours` | `object \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `quietHours.startHour` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0, max 23 |
| `quietHours.endHour` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0, max 23 |
| `quietHours.timezone` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 60 |
| `createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
  "organizationId": "string",

  "enabled": false,

    "hasSecretFields": false

  },
```

<a id="channel-delete"></a>
### `channel.Delete`

Delete a channel if no destination groups still reference it.

**Permission**: notifications / delete

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deleted` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "deleted": false,
  "id": 0
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

```json
{}
```

| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
```
```json
}
```

<a id="channel-list"></a>
### `channel.List`

List channels in the caller organization.

**Permission**: notifications / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

| `enabled` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `query` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `limit` | `integer` | no | `200` | min 1, max 1000 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no | `0` | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].organizationId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `items[].provider` | `enum("email_smtp" \| "generic_webhook" \| "slack_webhook" \| "teams_workflow_webhook" \| "telegram_bot" \| "push_fcm" \| "sms_twilio" \| "voice_twilio" \| "webhook_signed")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `items[].enabled` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].config` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].secretState` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].secretState.hasSecretFields` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].lastTestAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].lastTestStatus` | `enum("success" \| "failed" \| null)` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].lastDeliveryAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].lastDeliveryStatus` | `enum("success" \| "failed" \| null)` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].health` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].health.consecutiveFailures` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `items[].health.lastSuccessAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].health.lastFailureAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].health.autoDisabledAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].health.disableReason` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].quietHours` | `object \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].quietHours.startHour` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0, max 23 |
| `items[].quietHours.endHour` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0, max 23 |
| `items[].quietHours.timezone` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 60 |
| `items[].createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "organizationId": "string",
      "provider": "email_smtp",
      "name": "string",
      "enabled": false,
      "config": {},
      "secretState": {
        "hasSecretFields": false
      },
      "lastTestAt": "string",
      "lastTestStatus": "success",
      "lastDeliveryAt": "string",
      "lastDeliveryStatus": "success",
      "health": {
        "consecutiveFailures": 0,
        "lastSuccessAt": "string",
        "lastFailureAt": "string",
        "autoDisabledAt": "string",
        "disableReason": "string"
      },
      "quietHours": {
        "startHour": 0,
        "endHour": 0,
        "timezone": "string"
      },
      "createdAt": "string",
      "updatedAt": "string"
    }
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false
}
```

<a id="channel-listproviders"></a>
### `channel.ListProviders`

Return backend-driven channel provider descriptors and config schemas.

**Permission**: notifications / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].key` | `enum("email_smtp" \| "generic_webhook" \| "slack_webhook" \| "teams_workflow_webhook" \| "telegram_bot" \| "push_fcm" \| "sms_twilio" \| "voice_twilio" \| "webhook_signed")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].label` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].phaseAvailable` | `enum(3 \| 4 \| 5)` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].enabled` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].configSchema` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].testSupported` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].templateFields` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].smtpPresets` | `array<object>` | no |  |  |
| `items[].smtpPresets[].key` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].smtpPresets[].label` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].smtpPresets[].category` | `enum("personal" \| "workspace" \| "transactional" \| "regional" \| "custom")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].smtpPresets[].host` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].smtpPresets[].port` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1, max 65535 |
| `items[].smtpPresets[].secure` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].smtpPresets[].appPasswordOnly` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `items[].smtpPresets[].oauthRequired` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `items[].smtpPresets[].notes` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `items[].smtpPresets[].docsUrl` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `items[].emailCaps` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `items[].emailCaps.maxAttachments` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `items[].emailCaps.maxAttachmentBytes` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `items[].emailCaps.allowHttpAttachments` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].emailCaps.assetOrgQuotaBytes` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `items[].emailCaps.assetAllowedContentTypes` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "key": "email_smtp",
      "label": "string",
      "phaseAvailable": 3,
      "enabled": false,
      "configSchema": {},
      "testSupported": false,
      "templateFields": [
        "string"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="channel-resethealth"></a>

Clear consecutive_failures + auto_disabled_at and (by default) re-enable after an auto-disable.

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

| `reEnable` | `boolean` | no | `true` |  |

```json
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

| `provider` | `enum("email_smtp" \| "generic_webhook" \| "slack_webhook" \| "teams_workflow_webhook" \| "telegram_bot" \| "push_fcm" \| "sms_twilio" \| "voice_twilio" \| "webhook_signed")` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `config` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |
| `secretState` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `secretState.hasSecretFields` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `lastTestAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `lastTestStatus` | `enum("success" \| "failed" \| null)` | yes |  |  |
| `lastDeliveryAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `lastDeliveryStatus` | `enum("success" \| "failed" \| null)` | yes |  |  |
| `health` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `health.consecutiveFailures` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `health.lastSuccessAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `health.lastFailureAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `health.autoDisabledAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `health.disableReason` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `quietHours` | `object \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `quietHours.startHour` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0, max 23 |
| `quietHours.endHour` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0, max 23 |
| `quietHours.timezone` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 60 |
| `createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
  "id": 0,
  "organizationId": "string",
  "provider": "email_smtp",
  "name": "string",
  "enabled": false,
  "config": {},
  "secretState": {
    "hasSecretFields": false
  },
  "lastTestAt": "string",
  "lastTestStatus": "success",
  "lastDeliveryAt": "string",
  "lastDeliveryStatus": "success",
  "health": {
    "consecutiveFailures": 0,
    "lastSuccessAt": "string",
    "lastFailureAt": "string",
    "autoDisabledAt": "string",

  },

    "startHour": 0,
    "endHour": 0,

  },
```

<a id="channel-test"></a>
### `channel.Test`

Validate and optionally send a provider-specific test message through the channel.

**Permission**: notifications / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `dryRun` | `boolean` | no | `false` |  |
| `payload` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `payload.title` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 255 |
| `payload.message` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 4000 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `channelId` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `state` | `enum("success" \| "failed")` | yes |  |  |
| `testedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `errorMessage` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "channelId": 0,
  "state": "success",
  "testedAt": "string",
  "errorMessage": "string"
}
```

<a id="channel-update"></a>

```json
}
```

| `provider` | `enum("email_smtp" \| "generic_webhook" \| "slack_webhook" \| "teams_workflow_webhook" \| "telegram_bot" \| "push_fcm" \| "sms_twilio" \| "voice_twilio" \| "webhook_signed")` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `config` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |
| `secretState` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `secretState.hasSecretFields` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `lastTestAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `lastTestStatus` | `enum("success" \| "failed" \| null)` | yes |  |  |
| `lastDeliveryAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `lastDeliveryStatus` | `enum("success" \| "failed" \| null)` | yes |  |  |
| `health` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `health.consecutiveFailures` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `health.lastSuccessAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `health.lastFailureAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `health.autoDisabledAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `health.disableReason` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `quietHours` | `object \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `quietHours.startHour` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0, max 23 |
| `quietHours.endHour` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0, max 23 |
| `quietHours.timezone` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 60 |

| `updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "organizationId": "string",
  "provider": "email_smtp",
  "name": "string",
  "enabled": false,
  "config": {},
  "secretState": {
    "hasSecretFields": false
  },
  "lastTestAt": "string",
  "lastTestStatus": "success",
  "lastDeliveryAt": "string",
  "lastDeliveryStatus": "success",
  "health": {
    "consecutiveFailures": 0,
    "lastSuccessAt": "string",
    "lastFailureAt": "string",
    "autoDisabledAt": "string",
    "disableReason": "string"

  "quietHours": {
    "startHour": 0,
    "endHour": 0,
    "timezone": "string"
  },

  "updatedAt": "string"
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="client-namespace"></a>
## `client` namespace

<a id="client-describe"></a>
### `client.Describe`

Return the client namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="client-setsubscription"></a>
### `client.SetSubscription`

Client.SetSubscription — narrow the current socket session feed to specific event types and/or device IDs. Empty params clear the filter.

**Permission**: session-scoped — affects only the calling socket

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `eventTypes` | `array<string>` | no |  | maxItems 1024 |
| `deviceIds` | `array<string>` | no |  | maxItems 1024 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ok` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "ok": false
}
```

```json
}
```

Cover.Calibrate.

```json
  "id": 0
}
```

### `cover.Close`

Cover.Close — optional duration in seconds.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `duration` | `integer` | no |  | Seconds to run (device-validated). |
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

<a id="credential-namespace"></a>
## `credential` namespace

<a id="credential-clear"></a>
### `credential.Clear`

Disable Web UI auth on the target devices via Shelly.SetAuth ha1=null.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `target` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `target.deviceIds` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `target.groupIds` | `array<integer>` | no |  |  |
| `target.tagKeys` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "target": {}
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="credential-confirmold"></a>
### `credential.ConfirmOld`

Operator confirms a failed push left the device on its previous password — clears the flag without retrying.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `pushId` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "pushId": 1
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

<a id="credential-get"></a>
### `credential.Get`

Single device credential metadata (no plaintext).

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deviceId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "deviceId": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="credential-list"></a>
### `credential.List`

List per-device credentials (no plaintext). Filters by device or last_rotation_status.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deviceId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1 |
| `status` | `enum("ok" \| "failed" \| "unknown")` | no |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 500 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object<any>>` | yes |  |  |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {}
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false
}
```

<a id="credential-listfailed"></a>
### `credential.ListFailed`

List devices whose last rotation failed (action surface).

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 500 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="credential-listpushes"></a>
### `credential.ListPushes`

List credential push history scoped by device / job / status.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deviceId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1 |
| `jobId` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `status` | `enum("queued" \| "in_progress" \| "ok" \| "failed" \| "unknown")` | no |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 500 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="credential-pushstatus"></a>
### `credential.PushStatus`

Polling fallback for credential push job state and per-device rows.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `jobId` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "jobId": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="credential-retry"></a>
### `credential.Retry`

Retry a failed push using the stored new ha1. Recovers from transient device errors.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `pushId` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "pushId": 1
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="credential-reveal"></a>
### `credential.Reveal`

Admin-only plaintext reveal. Audited every call, rate-limited via FM_CREDENTIAL_REVEAL_PER_ADMIN_PER_DAY.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deviceId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `justification` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 500 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "deviceId": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="credential-rotate"></a>
### `credential.Rotate`

Operator-initiated rotation. Generates a strong random password and pushes via Shelly.SetAuth. Failed devices excluded from bulk by default; pass includeFlagged=true to override.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `target` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `target.deviceIds` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `target.groupIds` | `array<integer>` | no |  |  |
| `target.tagKeys` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `includeFlagged` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "target": {}
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="credential-set"></a>
### `credential.Set`

Set a specific password on a single device. Plaintext returned once in response.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deviceId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `password` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 8, maxLength 200 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "deviceId": "string",
  "password": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="cury-namespace"></a>
## `cury` namespace

<a id="cury-boost"></a>
### `cury.Boost`

Cury.Boost — start boost on slot.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `slot` | `enum("left" \| "right")` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "slot": "left"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `boost` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `boost.started_at` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `boost.duration` | `integer` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{}
```

<a id="cury-describe"></a>
### `cury.Describe`

Return the cury namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

Cury.GetConfig.

Cury.GetVialInfo.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

Type: `object`

<a id="cury-set"></a>
### `cury.Set`

Cury.Set — control vial slot heating.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `slot` | `enum("left" \| "right")` | yes |  |  |
| `on` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `intensity` | `number` | no |  | min 0, max 100 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "slot": "left"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `null`

| `on` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

Cury.SetConfig.

<a id="cury-setmode"></a>
### `cury.SetMode`

Cury.SetMode — inserts predefined schedules for room type.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `mode` | `enum(null \| "hall" \| "bedroom" \| "living_room" \| "lavatory_room" \| "reception" \| "workplace")` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `null`

<a id="cury-stopboost"></a>
### `cury.StopBoost`

Cury.StopBoost — cancel active boost on slot.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `slot` | `enum("left" \| "right")` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "slot": "left"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `was_on` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{}
```

<a id="dali-describe"></a>
### `dali.Describe`

Return the dali namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

DALI.GetConfig (singleton — empty per spec).

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

<a id="dali-pingknowndevices"></a>
### `dali.PingKnownDevices`

DALI.PingKnownDevices; result arrives via ping_complete NotifyEvent.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `null`

<a id="dali-setconfig"></a>
### `dali.SetConfig`

DALI.SetConfig (singleton — currently no fields per spec).

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `config` | `object` | yes |  | Partial config patch — device is final authority on valid keys |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "config": {}
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `restart_required` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "restart_required": false
}
```

<a id="dali-startscan"></a>
### `dali.StartScan`

DALI.StartScan; result arrives via scan_complete NotifyEvent.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `null`

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |


---

<a id="dashboard-namespace"></a>
## `dashboard` namespace

<a id="dashboard-activity-list"></a>
### `dashboard.Activity.List`

List recent activity for one dashboard (create, update, share, etc.). Newest first; clamped to 200 entries.

**Permission**: dashboards / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `dashboardId` | `integer` | yes |  | Dashboard id — min 1 |
| `limit` | `integer` | no | `20` | min 1, max 200 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "dashboardId": 1
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |
| `items[].dashboardId` | `integer` | yes |  | Dashboard id — min 1 |
| `items[].organizationId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `items[].actorUserId` | `string \| null` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `items[].eventKind` | `enum("created" \| "updated" \| "shared" \| "unshared" \| "cloned" \| "pinned" \| "unpinned" \| "owner_changed" \| "item_added" \| "item_removed")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].detail` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].occurredAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "dashboardId": 1,
      "organizationId": "string",
      "actorUserId": "string",
      "eventKind": "created",
      "detail": {},
      "occurredAt": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="dashboard-additem"></a>
### `dashboard.AddItem`

Add a widget to a dashboard. Returns the new item id.

**Permission**: dashboards / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `dashboard` | `integer` | yes |  | Dashboard id — min 1 |
| `type` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `item` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `order` | `integer` | no |  | min 0, max 2147483647 |
| `sub_item` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `size` | `string` | no |  | Widget size, e.g. "1x1", "2x1" |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "dashboard": 1,
  "type": 0,
  "item": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0
}
```

<a id="dashboard-cleardefault"></a>
### `dashboard.ClearDefault`

Clear the org default dashboard.

**Permission**: dashboards / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Response example:**

```json
{}
```

<a id="dashboard-clone"></a>
### `dashboard.Clone`

Deep-copy a dashboard within the same org. Optional scope override.

**Permission**: dashboards / create

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | Dashboard id — min 1 |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `scope` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `scope.groupId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.locationId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.tagId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `dashboardType` | `enum("classic" \| "analytics" \| "overview" \| "energy" \| "environment" \| "control" \| "safety" \| "map")` | yes |  |  |
| `scope` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `scope.groupId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.locationId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.tagId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `isDefault` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `isPinned` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `displayOrder` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `settings` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.tariff` | `number \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.currency` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.defaultRange` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.refreshInterval` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.enabledMetrics` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.chartSettings` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.tariffMode` | `enum("single" \| "day_night" \| "tou")` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.dayRate` | `number \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.nightRate` | `number \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.dayStart` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.dayEnd` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.tariffTimezone` | `string \| null` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `settings.tariffWindows` | `array \| null` | yes |  | minItems 1, maxItems 8 |
| `settings.tariffWindows[].from` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.tariffWindows[].to` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.tariffWindows[].rate` | `number` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `settings.tariffWindows[].label` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 32 |
| `settings.tariffWeekendOverride` | `array \| null` | yes |  | minItems 1, maxItems 8 |
| `settings.tariffWeekendOverride[].from` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.tariffWeekendOverride[].to` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.tariffWeekendOverride[].rate` | `number` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `settings.tariffWeekendOverride[].label` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 32 |
| `settings.tariffHolidays` | `array \| null` | yes |  | maxItems 50 |
| `settings.emissionFactorGPerKWh` | `number \| null` | yes |  | min 0, max 5000 |
| `settings.emissionFactorMbmGPerKWh` | `number \| null` | yes |  | min 0, max 5000 |
| `settings.co2BudgetKg` | `number \| null` | no |  | min 0 |
| `settings.tariffId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `settings.peakDeviceIds` | `array \| null` | no |  |  |
| `settings.pvMode` | `enum("parallel" \| "backup" \| "balcony" \| null)` | no |  |  |
| `settings.pvGridRefs` | `array \| null` | no |  |  |
| `settings.pvGridRefs[].device` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `settings.pvGridRefs[].channel` | `integer \| null` | no |  | min 0 |
| `settings.pvGenerationRefs` | `array \| null` | no |  |  |
| `settings.pvGenerationRefs[].device` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `settings.pvGenerationRefs[].channel` | `integer \| null` | no |  | min 0 |
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].kind` | `enum("device" \| "entity" \| "group" \| "location" \| "tag" \| "action" \| "widget")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].deviceId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].entitySubId` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].groupId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].locationId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].tagId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].actionId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].widgetKind` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].widgetConfig` | `object \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].order` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0, max 2147483647 |
| `items[].size` | `enum("1x1" \| "2x1" \| "2x2" \| "1x2" \| "4x1" \| "4x2" \| "4x4")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].mobileLayout` | `any` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].gridX` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].gridY` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].gridW` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].gridH` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "organizationId": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "dashboardType": "classic",
  "scope": {},
  "isDefault": false,
  "isPinned": false,
  "displayOrder": 0,
  "settings": {
    "tariff": 0,
    "currency": "string",
    "defaultRange": "string",
    "refreshInterval": 0,
    "enabledMetrics": [
      "string"
    ],
    "chartSettings": {},
    "tariffMode": "single",
    "dayRate": 0,
    "nightRate": 0,
    "dayStart": "string",
    "dayEnd": "string",
    "tariffTimezone": "string",
    "tariffWindows": [
      {
        "from": "string",
        "to": "string",
        "rate": 0,
        "label": "string"
      }
    ],
    "tariffWeekendOverride": [
      {
        "from": "string",
        "to": "string",
        "rate": 0,
        "label": "string"
      }
    ],
    "tariffHolidays": [
      "string"
    ],
    "emissionFactorGPerKWh": 0,
    "emissionFactorMbmGPerKWh": 0
  },
  "items": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "kind": "device",
      "order": 0,
      "size": "1x1",
      "mobileLayout": null
    }
  ],
  "createdAt": "string",
  "updatedAt": "string"
}
```

<a id="dashboard-create"></a>
### `dashboard.Create`

Create a dashboard. dashboardType: classic / analytics / overview / energy / environment / control / safety / map. Optional scope axis: locationId, groupId, or tagId (mutually exclusive).

**Permission**: dashboards / create

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `dashboardType` | `enum("classic" \| "analytics" \| "overview" \| "energy" \| "environment" \| "control" \| "safety" \| "map")` | yes |  |  |
| `scope` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `scope.locationId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.groupId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.tagId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "name": "string",
  "dashboardType": "classic"
}
```

#### Response

| `name` | `string` | yes |  |  |

| `scope.tagId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `isDefault` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `isPinned` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `displayOrder` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `settings` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.tariff` | `number \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.currency` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.defaultRange` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.refreshInterval` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.enabledMetrics` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.chartSettings` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.tariffMode` | `enum("single" \| "day_night" \| "tou")` | yes |  |  |

| `settings.tariffWeekendOverride[].from` | `string` | yes |  |  |

<a id="dashboard-delete"></a>
### `dashboard.Delete`

Delete a dashboard and all its items.

**Permission**: dashboards / delete

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | Dashboard id — min 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 1
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deleted` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "deleted": 0
}
```

<a id="dashboard-deletebulk"></a>
### `dashboard.DeleteBulk`

Delete multiple dashboards and all their items in one call. Org-scoped: only the caller org’s dashboards are removed; returns the ids actually deleted.

**Permission**: dashboards / delete

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ids` | `array<integer>` | yes |  | minItems 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "ids": [
    1
  ]
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deleted` | `array<integer>` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "deleted": [
    0
  ]
}
```

<a id="dashboard-describe"></a>
### `dashboard.Describe`

Return the dashboard namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="dashboard-export"></a>
### `dashboard.Export`

Export a dashboard. format: 'fm' (default) returns the Dashboard shape; 'grafana' returns Grafana JSON (schemaVersion 39).

**Permission**: dashboards / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | Dashboard id — min 1 |
| `format` | `enum("fm" \| "grafana")` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 1
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `format` | `enum("fm" \| "grafana")` | yes |  |  |
| `json` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "format": "fm",
  "json": {}
}
```

<a id="dashboard-get"></a>
### `dashboard.Get`

Fetch a single dashboard by id.

**Permission**: dashboards / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | Dashboard id — min 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 1
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `dashboardType` | `enum("classic" \| "analytics" \| "overview" \| "energy" \| "environment" \| "control" \| "safety" \| "map")` | yes |  |  |
| `scope` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `scope.groupId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.locationId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.tagId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |

| `isPinned` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `displayOrder` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `settings` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.tariff` | `number \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.currency` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.defaultRange` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.refreshInterval` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.enabledMetrics` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.chartSettings` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.tariffMode` | `enum("single" \| "day_night" \| "tou")` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.dayRate` | `number \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.nightRate` | `number \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.dayStart` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.dayEnd` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.tariffTimezone` | `string \| null` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `settings.tariffWindows` | `array \| null` | yes |  | minItems 1, maxItems 8 |
| `settings.tariffWindows[].from` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.tariffWindows[].to` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.tariffWindows[].rate` | `number` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `settings.tariffWindows[].label` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 32 |
| `settings.tariffWeekendOverride` | `array \| null` | yes |  | minItems 1, maxItems 8 |
| `settings.tariffWeekendOverride[].from` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.tariffWeekendOverride[].to` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `settings.tariffWeekendOverride[].rate` | `number` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `settings.tariffWeekendOverride[].label` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 32 |
| `settings.tariffHolidays` | `array \| null` | yes |  | maxItems 50 |
| `settings.emissionFactorGPerKWh` | `number \| null` | yes |  | min 0, max 5000 |
| `settings.emissionFactorMbmGPerKWh` | `number \| null` | yes |  | min 0, max 5000 |
| `settings.co2BudgetKg` | `number \| null` | no |  | min 0 |
| `settings.tariffId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `settings.peakDeviceIds` | `array \| null` | no |  |  |
| `settings.pvMode` | `enum("parallel" \| "backup" \| "balcony" \| null)` | no |  |  |
| `settings.pvGridRefs` | `array \| null` | no |  |  |
| `settings.pvGridRefs[].device` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `settings.pvGridRefs[].channel` | `integer \| null` | no |  | min 0 |
| `settings.pvGenerationRefs` | `array \| null` | no |  |  |
| `settings.pvGenerationRefs[].device` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `settings.pvGenerationRefs[].channel` | `integer \| null` | no |  | min 0 |
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].kind` | `enum("device" \| "entity" \| "group" \| "location" \| "tag" \| "action" \| "widget")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].deviceId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].entitySubId` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].groupId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].locationId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].tagId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].actionId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].widgetKind` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].widgetConfig` | `object \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].order` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0, max 2147483647 |
| `items[].size` | `enum("1x1" \| "2x1" \| "2x2" \| "1x2" \| "4x1" \| "4x2" \| "4x4")` | yes |  |  |

| `items[].gridY` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].gridW` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].gridH` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |

| `updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |

```json
    ],

    ],

      "id": 0,
      "kind": "device",

      "size": "1x1",

    }
  ],

}
```

|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |

```json
{}
```

<a id="dashboard-item-add"></a>
### `dashboard.Item.Add`

Add a single item by {kind, deviceId|groupId|locationId|tagId|actionId|widgetKind, ...}. Returns updated dashboard.

**Permission**: dashboards / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `dashboardId` | `integer` | yes |  | Dashboard id — min 1 |
| `kind` | `enum("device" \| "entity" \| "group" \| "location" \| "tag" \| "action" \| "widget")` | yes |  |  |
| `deviceId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `entitySubId` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `groupId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `locationId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `tagId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `actionId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `widgetKind` | `string \| null` | no |  | For kind='widget' items a missing or empty widgetKind defaults to 'clock_widget' (DB-side, fn_dashboard_item_add_v3). |
| `widgetConfig` | `object \| null` | no |  |  |
| `order` | `integer` | no |  | min 0, max 2147483647 |
| `size` | `enum("1x1" \| "2x1" \| "2x2" \| "1x2" \| "4x1" \| "4x2" \| "4x4")` | no |  |  |
| `mobileLayout` | `any` | no |  |  |
| `gridX` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `gridY` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `gridW` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `gridH` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "dashboardId": 1,
  "kind": "device"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

| `organizationId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  |  |

<a id="dashboard-item-addbulk"></a>
### `dashboard.Item.AddBulk`

Insert N items in one call. Returns the updated dashboard.

**Permission**: dashboards / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `dashboardId` | `integer` | yes |  | Dashboard id — min 1 |
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].kind` | `enum("device" \| "entity" \| "group" \| "location" \| "tag" \| "action" \| "widget")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].deviceId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].entitySubId` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].groupId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].locationId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].tagId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].actionId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].widgetKind` | `string \| null` | no |  | For kind='widget' items a missing or empty widgetKind defaults to 'clock_widget' (DB-side, fn_dashboard_item_add_v3). |
| `items[].widgetConfig` | `object \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].order` | `integer` | no |  | min 0, max 2147483647 |
| `items[].size` | `enum("1x1" \| "2x1" \| "2x2" \| "1x2" \| "4x1" \| "4x2" \| "4x4")` | no |  |  |
| `items[].mobileLayout` | `any` | no |  |  |
| `items[].gridX` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].gridY` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].gridW` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].gridH` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json

  "dashboardId": 1,
  "items": [

}
```

<a id="dashboard-item-setall"></a>
### `dashboard.Item.SetAll`

Replace all items in one transaction. Returns updated dashboard.

**Permission**: dashboards / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `dashboardId` | `integer` | yes |  | Dashboard id — min 1 |
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].kind` | `enum("device" \| "entity" \| "group" \| "location" \| "tag" \| "action" \| "widget")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].deviceId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].entitySubId` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].groupId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].locationId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].tagId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].actionId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].widgetKind` | `string \| null` | no |  | For kind='widget' items a missing or empty widgetKind defaults to 'clock_widget' (DB-side, fn_dashboard_item_add_v3). |
| `items[].widgetConfig` | `object \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].order` | `integer` | no |  | min 0, max 2147483647 |
| `items[].size` | `enum("1x1" \| "2x1" \| "2x2" \| "1x2" \| "4x1" \| "4x2" \| "4x4")` | no |  |  |
| `items[].mobileLayout` | `any` | no |  |  |
| `items[].gridX` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].gridY` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].gridW` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].gridH` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "dashboardId": 1,
  "items": [
    {
      "kind": "device"
    }
  ]
}
```
