| `items[].settings.pvGenerationRefs[].channel` | `integer \| null` | no |  | min 0 |
| `items[].items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].items[].id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].items[].kind` | `enum("device" \| "entity" \| "group" \| "location" \| "tag" \| "action" \| "widget")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].items[].deviceId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].items[].entitySubId` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].items[].groupId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].items[].locationId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].items[].tagId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].items[].actionId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].items[].widgetKind` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].items[].widgetConfig` | `object \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].items[].order` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0, max 2147483647 |
| `items[].items[].size` | `enum("1x1" \| "2x1" \| "2x2" \| "1x2" \| "4x1" \| "4x2" \| "4x4")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].items[].mobileLayout` | `any` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].items[].gridX` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].items[].gridY` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].items[].gridW` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].items[].gridH` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "organizationId": "string",
      "name": "string",
      "dashboardType": "classic",
      "scope": {},
      "isDefault": false,
      "isPinned": false,
      "displayOrder": 0,
      "settings": {
        "tariff": 0,
        "currency": "string",
        "defaultRange": "string",
        "refreshInterval": 0,
        "enabledMetrics": [
          "string"
        ],
        "chartSettings": {},
        "tariffMode": "single",
        "dayRate": 0,
        "nightRate": 0,
        "dayStart": "string",
        "dayEnd": "string",
        "tariffTimezone": "string",
        "tariffWindows": [
          {
            "from": "string",
            "to": "string",
            "rate": 0,
            "label": "string"
          }
        ],
        "tariffWeekendOverride": [
          {
            "from": "string",
            "to": "string",
            "rate": 0,
            "label": "string"
          }
        ],
        "tariffHolidays": [
          "string"
        ],
        "emissionFactorGPerKWh": 0,
        "emissionFactorMbmGPerKWh": 0
      },
      "items": [
        {
          "id": 0,
          "kind": "device",
          "order": 0,
          "size": "1x1",
          "mobileLayout": null
        }
      ],
      "createdAt": "string",
      "updatedAt": "string"
    }
  ],
  "total": 0
}
```

<a id="dashboard-listpinned"></a>
### `dashboard.ListPinned`

Per-user pinned dashboards (sortOrder, pinnedAt). Survives across devices.

**Permission**: dashboards / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].dashboardId` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].sortOrder` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].pinnedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "dashboardId": 0,
      "sortOrder": 0,
      "pinnedAt": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="dashboard-pin"></a>
### `dashboard.Pin`

Pin a dashboard for the calling user.

**Permission**: dashboards / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | Dashboard id — min 1 |
| `sortOrder` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 1
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `pinned` | `const(true)` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "pinned": true
}
```

<a id="dashboard-removeitem"></a>
### `dashboard.RemoveItem`

Remove a widget from a dashboard.

**Permission**: dashboards / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `dashboard` | `integer` | yes |  | Dashboard id — min 1 |
| `itemId` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "dashboard": 1,
  "itemId": 1
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `removed` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "removed": 0
}
```

<a id="dashboard-reorder"></a>
### `dashboard.Reorder`

Persist per-user dashboard ordering. Server filters unknown ids and appends visible ids the caller omitted.

**Permission**: dashboards / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ids` | `array<integer>` | yes |  | maxItems 200 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "ids": [
    1
  ]
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ok` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `ids` | `array<integer>` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "ok": false,
  "ids": [
    1
  ]
}
```

<a id="dashboard-reorderitems"></a>
### `dashboard.ReorderItems`

Reorder widgets by passing the new itemId sequence.

**Permission**: dashboards / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `dashboard` | `integer` | yes |  | Dashboard id — min 1 |
| `itemIds` | `array<integer>` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "dashboard": 1,
  "itemIds": [
    1
  ]
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `reordered` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "reordered": 0
}
```

<a id="dashboard-reorderpins"></a>
### `dashboard.ReorderPins`

Reorder pinned dashboards by passing the new id sequence.

**Permission**: dashboards / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ids` | `array<integer>` | yes |  |  |

```json
{
  "ids": [
    1
  ]
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Response example:**

```json
{}
```

<a id="dashboard-setdefault"></a>
### `dashboard.SetDefault`

Marks one dashboard as default; clears any other default for this org atomically.

**Permission**: dashboards / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | Dashboard id — min 1 |
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 1
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | Dashboard id — min 1 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 1
}
```

<a id="dashboard-setsettings"></a>
### `dashboard.SetSettings`

Upsert any subset of the dashboard settings fields.

**Permission**: dashboards / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `dashboardId` | `integer` | yes |  | Dashboard id — min 1 |
| `tariff` | `number` | no |  |  |
| `tariffId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `currency` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `defaultRange` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `refreshInterval` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `enabledMetrics` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `chartSettings` | `object<any>` | no |  |  |
| `tariffMode` | `enum("single" \| "day_night" \| "tou")` | no |  |  |
| `dayRate` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |
| `nightRate` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |
| `dayStart` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `dayEnd` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `tariffTimezone` | `string \| null` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `tariffWindows` | `array \| null` | no |  | minItems 1, maxItems 8 |
| `tariffWindows[].from` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `tariffWindows[].to` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `tariffWindows[].rate` | `number` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `tariffWindows[].label` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 32 |
| `tariffWeekendOverride` | `array \| null` | no |  | minItems 1, maxItems 8 |
| `tariffWeekendOverride[].from` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `tariffWeekendOverride[].to` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `tariffWeekendOverride[].rate` | `number` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `tariffWeekendOverride[].label` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 32 |
| `tariffHolidays` | `array \| null` | no |  | maxItems 50 |
| `emissionFactorGPerKWh` | `number \| null` | no |  | min 0, max 5000 |
| `emissionFactorMbmGPerKWh` | `number \| null` | no |  | min 0, max 5000 |
| `co2BudgetKg` | `number \| null` | no |  | min 0 |
| `peakDeviceIds` | `array \| null` | no |  |  |
| `pvMode` | `enum("parallel" \| "backup" \| "balcony" \| null)` | no |  |  |
| `pvGridRefs` | `array \| null` | no |  |  |
| `pvGridRefs[].device` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `pvGridRefs[].channel` | `integer \| null` | no |  | min 0 |
| `pvGenerationRefs` | `array \| null` | no |  |  |
| `pvGenerationRefs[].device` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `pvGenerationRefs[].channel` | `integer \| null` | no |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "dashboardId": 1
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `success` | `const(true)` | yes |  |  |
| `dashboardId` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "dashboardId": 0
}
```

<a id="dashboard-template-create"></a>

Create an org-scoped template. Cannot create builtins via API.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `key` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `label` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 200 |
| `description` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `dashboardType` | `enum("classic" \| "analytics" \| "overview" \| "energy" \| "environment" \| "control" \| "safety" \| "map")` | yes |  |  |
| `seed` | `object` | yes |  |  |

| `seed.staticItems` | `array<object>` | no |  |  |

| `seed.staticItems[].deviceId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `seed.staticItems[].entitySubId` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `seed.staticItems[].groupId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `seed.staticItems[].locationId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `seed.staticItems[].tagId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `seed.staticItems[].actionId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |

| `seed.staticItems[].order` | `integer` | no |  | min 0, max 2147483647 |
| `seed.staticItems[].size` | `enum("1x1" \| "2x1" \| "2x2" \| "1x2" \| "4x1" \| "4x2" \| "4x4")` | no |  |  |
| `seed.staticItems[].mobileLayout` | `any` | no |  |  |
| `seed.staticItems[].gridX` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `seed.staticItems[].gridY` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `seed.staticItems[].gridW` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `seed.staticItems[].gridH` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `seed.settings` | `object` | no |  |  |

| `seed.settings.tariffWindows` | `array \| null` | no |  | minItems 1, maxItems 8 |
| `seed.settings.tariffWindows[].from` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `seed.settings.tariffWindows[].to` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `seed.settings.tariffWindows[].rate` | `number` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `seed.settings.tariffWindows[].label` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 32 |

| `seed.settings.emissionFactorMbmGPerKWh` | `number \| null` | no |  | min 0, max 5000 |
| `seed.settings.co2BudgetKg` | `number \| null` | no |  | min 0 |
| `seed.settings.peakDeviceIds` | `array \| null` | no |  |  |

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

```json
{
  "deleted": "string"
}
```

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `key` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "key": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `key` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `label` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 200 |
| `description` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `dashboardType` | `enum("classic" \| "analytics" \| "overview" \| "energy" \| "environment" \| "control" \| "safety" \| "map")` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `isBuiltin` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

<a id="dashboard-template-preview"></a>
### `dashboard.Template.Preview`

Show what items the template would materialize against the given scope (without creating).

**Permission**: dashboards / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `key` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `scope` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `scope.groupId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.locationId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.tagId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "key": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].kind` | `enum("device" \| "entity" \| "group" \| "location" \| "tag" \| "action" \| "widget")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].deviceId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].entitySubId` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].groupId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].locationId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].tagId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].actionId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].widgetKind` | `string \| null` | no |  | For kind='widget' items a missing or empty widgetKind defaults to 'clock_widget' (DB-side, fn_dashboard_item_add_v3). |
| `items[].widgetConfig` | `object \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].order` | `integer` | no |  | min 0, max 2147483647 |
| `items[].size` | `enum("1x1" \| "2x1" \| "2x2" \| "1x2" \| "4x1" \| "4x2" \| "4x4")` | no |  |  |
| `items[].mobileLayout` | `any` | no |  |  |
| `items[].gridX` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].gridY` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].gridW` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].gridH` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `missingDevices` | `number` | yes |  | In-scope devices that could not be expanded into entity items because they are not currently registered. Non-zero means the preview is partial. |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "kind": "device"
    }
  ],
  "missingDevices": 0
}
```

<a id="dashboard-unpin"></a>
### `dashboard.Unpin`

Unpin a dashboard for the calling user.

**Permission**: dashboards / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | Dashboard id — min 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 1
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `unpinned` | `const(true)` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "unpinned": true
}
```

<a id="dashboard-update"></a>
### `dashboard.Update`

Patch name / dashboardType / scope. scope: null clears every axis; scope: { locationId | groupId | tagId } (exactly one) replaces the current axis. Cross-org refs rejected with DomainError CrossOrgReference.

**Permission**: dashboards / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | Dashboard id — min 1 |
| `name` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `dashboardType` | `enum("classic" \| "analytics" \| "overview" \| "energy" \| "environment" \| "control" \| "safety" \| "map")` | no |  |  |
| `scope` | `any` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 1
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `dashboardType` | `enum("classic" \| "analytics" \| "overview" \| "energy" \| "environment" \| "control" \| "safety" \| "map")` | yes |  |  |
| `scope` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `scope.groupId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.locationId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.tagId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `isDefault` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `isPinned` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `displayOrder` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `settings` | `object` | yes |  |  |

| `settings.currency` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |

| `settings.enabledMetrics` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |

<a id="dashboard-updateitemsize"></a>
### `dashboard.UpdateItemSize`

Resize a widget in-place.

**Permission**: dashboards / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `dashboard` | `integer` | yes |  | Dashboard id — min 1 |
| `itemId` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |
| `size` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "dashboard": 1,
  "itemId": 1,
  "size": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `updated` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `size` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "updated": 0,
  "size": "string"
}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="device-namespace"></a>
## `device` namespace

**Tags:** `inventory`

<a id="device-call"></a>
### `device.Call`

Raw device RPC escape hatch for advanced/admin integrations. Prefer semantic Fleet Manager APIs for product flows.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `method` | `string` | yes |  | Shelly device RPC method, for example Shelly.GetDeviceInfo — minLength 1, maxLength 160 |
| `params` | `object<any>` | no |  | Shelly device RPC params object, limited to 64 KiB serialized — ≤ 65536 B JSON |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "method": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="device-checkreplacement"></a>
### `device.CheckReplacement`

Check whether a newly admitted Shelly can replace an existing Fleet device without breaking logical-meter point usage.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `oldShellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `newShellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "oldShellyID": "string",
  "newShellyID": "string"
}
```

| `oldShellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

| `oldDeviceId` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

| `remapCandidates[].required.phase` | `enum("a" \| "b" \| "c" \| "z")` | yes |  |  |
| `remapCandidates[].required.tag` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `remapCandidates[].required.electricalDomain` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `remapCandidates[].required.logicalMeterId` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `remapCandidates[].required.logicalMeterName` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `remapCandidates[].required.utilityType` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `remapCandidates[].required.role` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `remapCandidates[].required.source` | `enum("history" \| "live")` | no |  |  |
| `remapCandidates[].required.componentKey` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `remapCandidates[].candidates` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `remapCandidates[].candidates[].channel` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `remapCandidates[].candidates[].phase` | `enum("a" \| "b" \| "c" \| "z")` | yes |  |  |
| `remapCandidates[].candidates[].tag` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `remapCandidates[].candidates[].electricalDomain` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `remapCandidates[].candidates[].logicalMeterId` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `remapCandidates[].candidates[].logicalMeterName` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `remapCandidates[].candidates[].utilityType` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `remapCandidates[].candidates[].role` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `remapCandidates[].candidates[].source` | `enum("history" \| "live")` | no |  |  |
| `remapCandidates[].candidates[].componentKey` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `warnings` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "oldShellyID": "string",
  "newShellyID": "string",
  "oldDeviceId": 0,
  "newDeviceId": 0,
  "compatibility": "exact_match",
  "requirements": [
    {
      "channel": 0,
      "phase": "a",
      "tag": "string"
    }
  ],
  "available": [
    {
      "channel": 0,
      "phase": "a",
      "tag": "string"
    }
  ],
  "missing": [
    {
      "channel": 0,
      "phase": "a",
      "tag": "string"
    }
  ],
  "remapCandidates": [
    {
      "required": {
        "channel": 0,
        "phase": "a",
        "tag": "string"
      },
      "candidates": [
        {
          "channel": 0,
          "phase": "a",
          "tag": "string"
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "warnings": [
    "string"
  ]
}
```

<a id="device-delete"></a>
### `device.Delete`

Remove device from fleet.

**Permission**: devices / delete

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deleted` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "deleted": "string"
}
```

<a id="device-describe"></a>
### `device.Describe`

Return the device namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="device-get"></a>
### `device.Get`

Full device object by shellyID.

**Permission**: device identity is always `shellyID`

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="device-getdevicechannels"></a>
### `device.GetDeviceChannels`

Device EM channel inventory.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="device-getimage"></a>
### `device.GetImage`

Read the per-physical-device image override. Returns imageAssetId=null when no override is set.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `imageAssetId` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `icon` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `accent` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "imageAssetId": null,
  "icon": null,
  "accent": null
}
```

<a id="device-getinfo"></a>
### `device.GetInfo`

Device metadata only — no status/settings/memberships.

**Permission**: device identity is always `shellyID`

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | no |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Response example:**

```json
{}
```

<a id="device-getkind"></a>
### `device.GetKind`

Get the catalog kind classification for a device (null = unclassified).

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `kind` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `costCenter` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "kind": "string"
}
```

<a id="device-getsetup"></a>
### `device.GetSetup`

Device configuration profiles.

**Permission**: also requires configurations.read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `mode` | `enum("json" \| "rpc")` | no | `"json"` |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="device-getstatushistory"></a>
### `device.GetStatusHistory`

Device status chart time-series.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `field` | `string` | yes |  | Status field path (e.g. "switch:0.apower") |
| `from` | `string` | yes |  | ISO 8601 start timestamp |
| `to` | `string` | yes |  | ISO 8601 end timestamp |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "field": "string",
  "from": "string",
  "to": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `field` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `from` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `to` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `data` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `data[].bucket` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `data[].avgVal` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |
| `data[].minVal` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |
| `data[].maxVal` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "field": "string",
  "from": "string",
  "to": "string",
  "data": [
    {}
  ]
}
```

<a id="device-getstatustimeline"></a>
### `device.GetStatusTimeline`

Device online/offline timeline over a time range.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `field` | `string` | yes |  | Status field path (e.g. "switch:0.output") |
| `from` | `string` | yes |  | ISO 8601 start timestamp |
| `to` | `string` | yes |  | ISO 8601 end timestamp |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "field": "string",
  "from": "string",
  "to": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `field` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `from` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `to` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `data` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `data[].ts` | `any` | no |  |  |
| `data[].value` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |
| `data[].prevValue` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "field": "string",
  "from": "string",
  "to": "string",
  "data": [
    {}
  ]
}
```

<a id="device-list"></a>
### `device.List`

Paginated slim device list (capability-filtered per user).

**Permission**: no permissions (admin only via audit)

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `filters` | `object<any>` | no |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | 0 = unlimited, default 500 — min 0 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `include` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<any>` | yes |  |  |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [],
  "total": 0
}
```

<a id="device-relationships-get"></a>
### `device.Relationships.Get`

Read a backend-owned relationship graph for one center device. Current implementation supports bounded depth=1 or depth=2 traversal and direction filtering.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `depth` | `enum(1 \| 2)` | no | `1` |  |
| `include` | `array<enum("membership" \| "visuals" \| "costCenter" \| "serves" \| "components" \| "virtualBindings" \| "virtualDependents" \| "bluetooth" \| "provenance" \| "extraction" \| "alerts" \| "automations" \| "notificationRouting" \| "dashboards" \| "energyClassification" \| "operations" \| "securityState" \| "accessGrants" \| "deviceSchedules" \| "deviceScripts" \| "deviceWebhooks" \| "deviceSubresources" \| "externalConnections" \| "health" \| "recentHistory")>` | no |  | maxItems 25 |
| `direction` | `enum("both" \| "outgoing" \| "incoming")` | no | `"both"` |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `center` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].type` | `enum("device.physical" \| "device.bluetooth" \| "device.virtual" \| "device.extracted" \| "device.connector" \| "component" \| "entity" \| "virtual.role" \| "blu.transport" \| "profile" \| "asset.visual" \| "cost.center" \| "group" \| "location" \| "tag" \| "dashboard" \| "dashboard.item" \| "action.template" \| "automation.flow" \| "automation.node" \| "alert.rule" \| "maintenance.window" \| "notification.routing_policy" \| "notification.destination_group" \| "notification.channel" \| "notification.on_call_schedule" \| "energy.classification" \| "history.event" \| "operation.job" \| "operation.unit" \| "credential.state" \| "certificate" \| "assignment.grant" \| "user" \| "user.group" \| "device.schedule" \| "device.script" \| "device.webhook" \| "device.subresource" \| "external.connection" \| "connector.point")` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].label` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].status` | `enum("healthy" \| "warning" \| "critical" \| "unknown" \| "disabled" \| "stale" \| "offline" \| "unavailable")` | no |  |  |
| `nodes[].externalId` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `nodes[].kind` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `nodes[].icon` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `nodes[].imageAssetId` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `nodes[].meta` | `object<any>` | no |  |  |
| `edges` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].type` | `enum("has_component" \| "has_entity" \| "binds_role_to_source" \| "source_feeds_virtual_role" \| "depends_on_source" \| "used_by_virtual_device" \| "extracts_from" \| "promoted_from_gateway_component" \| "transported_by_gateway" \| "heard_by_gateway" \| "uses_profile" \| "has_visual_asset" \| "charged_to_cost_center" \| "serves" \| "belongs_to_group" \| "located_in" \| "tagged_with" \| "child_of_group" \| "child_of_location" \| "shown_on_dashboard" \| "dashboard_contains_item" \| "dashboard_item_refs_device" \| "dashboard_item_refs_entity" \| "dashboard_item_refs_component" \| "dashboard_item_refs_group" \| "dashboard_item_refs_location" \| "dashboard_item_refs_tag" \| "dashboard_item_refs_action" \| "automation_refs_device" \| "device_event_feeds_automation" \| "automation_calls_rpc" \| "targets_device" \| "has_credential_state" \| "has_certificate" \| "grants_access_to_device" \| "grant_assigned_to_subject" \| "controls" \| "controlled_by" \| "watched_by_alert_rule" \| "suppressed_by_maintenance_window" \| "routes_alert_to_destination_group" \| "routes_alert_to_channel" \| "routes_alert_to_on_call_schedule" \| "destination_group_contains_channel" \| "classified_as_energy_role" \| "recorded_history_event" \| "used_by_device_schedule" \| "runs_device_script" \| "triggers_device_webhook" \| "hosts_device_subresource" \| "subresource_refs_component" \| "virtual_group_contains_component" \| "ledstrip_effect_uses_script" \| "has_connector_point" \| "configured_external_connection" \| "external_connection_refs_component" \| "connector_point_maps_to_component" \| "replaced_source" \| "retired_source")` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].source` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].target` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].label` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `edges[].status` | `enum("healthy" \| "warning" \| "critical" \| "unknown" \| "disabled" \| "stale" \| "offline" \| "unavailable")` | no |  |  |
| `edges[].direction` | `enum("outgoing" \| "incoming")` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].meta` | `object<any>` | no |  |  |
| `summaries` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `summaries[].severity` | `enum("info" \| "warning" \| "critical")` | yes |  |  |
| `summaries[].text` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `summaries[].nodeIds` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `summaries[].edgeIds` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `summaries[].reasonCode` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `generatedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `depth` | `enum(1 \| 2)` | yes |  |  |
| `truncated` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "center": "string",
  "nodes": [
    {
      "id": "string",
      "type": "device.physical",
      "label": "string"
    }
  ],
  "edges": [
    {
      "id": "string",
      "type": "has_component",
      "source": "string",
      "target": "string",
      "direction": "outgoing"
    }
  ],
  "summaries": [
    {
      "severity": "info",
      "text": "string"
    }
  ],
  "generatedAt": "1970-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
  "depth": 1,
  "truncated": false
}
```

<a id="device-relationships-query"></a>
### `device.Relationships.Query`

Read a paged, backend-owned relationship graph set for accessible devices. Results are derived from device.Relationships.Get; no materialized relationship table is used.

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyIDs` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |

| `direction` | `enum("both" \| "outgoing" \| "incoming")` | no | `"both"` |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `cursor` | `string` | no |  |  |

```json
{}
```

| `items[].nodes[].status` | `enum("healthy" \| "warning" \| "critical" \| "unknown" \| "disabled" \| "stale" \| "offline" \| "unavailable")` | no |  |  |
| `items[].nodes[].externalId` | `string` | no |  |  |

| `items[].edges[].type` | `enum("has_component" \| "has_entity" \| "binds_role_to_source" \| "source_feeds_virtual_role" \| "depends_on_source" \| "used_by_virtual_device" \| "extracts_from" \| "promoted_from_gateway_component" \| "transported_by_gateway" \| "heard_by_gateway" \| "uses_profile" \| "has_visual_asset" \| "charged_to_cost_center" \| "serves" \| "belongs_to_group" \| "located_in" \| "tagged_with" \| "child_of_group" \| "child_of_location" \| "shown_on_dashboard" \| "dashboard_contains_item" \| "dashboard_item_refs_device" \| "dashboard_item_refs_entity" \| "dashboard_item_refs_component" \| "dashboard_item_refs_group" \| "dashboard_item_refs_location" \| "dashboard_item_refs_tag" \| "dashboard_item_refs_action" \| "automation_refs_device" \| "device_event_feeds_automation" \| "automation_calls_rpc" \| "targets_device" \| "has_credential_state" \| "has_certificate" \| "grants_access_to_device" \| "grant_assigned_to_subject" \| "controls" \| "controlled_by" \| "watched_by_alert_rule" \| "suppressed_by_maintenance_window" \| "routes_alert_to_destination_group" \| "routes_alert_to_channel" \| "routes_alert_to_on_call_schedule" \| "destination_group_contains_channel" \| "classified_as_energy_role" \| "recorded_history_event" \| "used_by_device_schedule" \| "runs_device_script" \| "triggers_device_webhook" \| "hosts_device_subresource" \| "subresource_refs_component" \| "virtual_group_contains_component" \| "ledstrip_effect_uses_script" \| "has_connector_point" \| "configured_external_connection" \| "external_connection_refs_component" \| "connector_point_maps_to_component" \| "replaced_source" \| "retired_source")` | yes |  |  |

| `items[].summaries[].reasonCode` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `items[].generatedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].depth` | `enum(1 \| 2)` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].truncated` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `nextCursor` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `generatedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `truncated` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "center": "string",
      "nodes": [
        {
          "id": "string",
          "type": "device.physical",
          "label": "string"
        }
      ],
      "edges": [
        {
          "id": "string",
          "type": "has_component",
          "source": "string",
          "target": "string",
          "direction": "outgoing"
        }
      ],
      "summaries": [
        {
          "severity": "info",
          "text": "string"
        }
      ],
      "generatedAt": "1970-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
      "depth": 1,
      "truncated": false
    }
  ],
  "generatedAt": "1970-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
  "truncated": false
}
```

<a id="device-replacehardware"></a>
### `device.ReplaceHardware`

Atomically keep the old Fleet device id but swap it to the new physical Shelly external id, with an audit row.

**Permission**: server re-runs CheckReplacement; exact matches apply directly, compatible matches require a validated confirmedMapping

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `oldShellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `newShellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `confirmedMapping` | `object<any>` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "oldShellyID": "string",
  "newShellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deviceId` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `oldShellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `newShellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `auditId` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "deviceId": 0,
  "oldShellyID": "string",
  "newShellyID": "string",
  "auditId": 0
}
```

<a id="device-setimage"></a>
### `device.SetImage`

Override the stock product image with a library asset (UUID). Pass imageAssetId=null to clear the override.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `imageAssetId` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `icon` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `accent` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "imageAssetId": null
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `imageAssetId` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `icon` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `accent` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "imageAssetId": null,
  "icon": null,
  "accent": null
}
```

<a id="device-setkind"></a>
### `device.SetKind`

Set the device catalog kind. Pass kind=null to clear it.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `kind` | `string \| null` | yes |  | Catalog kind id, or null to clear the classification — minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `costCenter` | `string \| null` | no |  | Billing label; null clears it, omit to leave as-is — maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "kind": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `kind` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `costCenter` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "kind": "string"
}
```

<a id="device-topology"></a>
### `device.Topology`

Cytoscape-shaped {nodes, edges} for visualization. Edges come from BT-mesh bthomedevice parent→children and cross-device thermostat→switch actuator bindings (intra-device shelly://self/... is omitted). Nodes carry type ("hub"=paired host, "device"=plain host or BLE peer) + status ("on"|"off"|"warn"; BLE peers default to "warn" since liveness is not known). Scope via groupId / locationId / shellyID; unscoped returns the full accessible fleet. Group containment is computed client-side from group memberships, not emitted here.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `groupId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `locationId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `shellyID` | `string` | no |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `nodes` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].label` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].type` | `enum("hub" \| "device" \| "group")` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].status` | `enum("on" \| "off" \| "warn")` | no |  |  |
| `edges` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].source` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].target` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].weight` | `number` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "nodes": [
    {
      "id": "string",
      "label": "string",
      "type": "hub"
    }
  ],
  "edges": [
    {
      "source": "string",
      "target": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="deviceevents-namespace"></a>
## `deviceevents` namespace

<a id="deviceevents-describe"></a>
### `deviceevents.Describe`

Return the deviceevents namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="deviceevents-query"></a>
### `deviceevents.Query`

Search the device change journal by time range, device IDs, component, and kind.

**Permission**: admin-only

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `from` | `string` | no |  | ISO-8601 inclusive start |
| `to` | `string` | no |  | ISO-8601 exclusive end |
| `shellyIds` | `array<string>` | no |  | Limit to these device IDs (one, many, or omit for all) |
| `component` | `string` | no |  | Limit to a component key, e.g. "switch:0" |
| `kind` | `enum("state_change" \| "event" \| "config")` | no |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | no | `200` | min 1, max 10000 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no | `0` | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].ts` | `string` | yes |  | Device-reported time, preserved verbatim |
| `items[].received_ts` | `string` | no |  | Time Fleet Manager received the change |
| `items[].shelly_id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].organization_id` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].component` | `string` | yes |  | e.g. "switch:0" |
| `items[].field` | `string` | yes |  | e.g. "output" |
| `items[].prev` | `any` | no |  | Value before the change (any JSON type, or null) |
| `items[].next` | `any` | no |  | Value after the change (any JSON type, or null) |
| `items[].kind` | `enum("state_change" \| "event" \| "config")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].source` | `enum("device" \| "command" \| "unknown" \| null)` | no |  |  |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "ts": "string",
      "shelly_id": "string",
      "component": "string",
      "field": "string",
      "kind": "state_change"
    }
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false
}
```

<a id="deviceIngress-namespace"></a>
## `deviceIngress` namespace

<a id="deviceingress-authmethods"></a>
### `deviceIngress.AuthMethods`

Which device auth methods this deployment accepts — the single source of truth for the UI. Certificate is always false for Shelly WS.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `token` | `boolean` | yes |  | URL token login is accepted (the cryptographic login). |
| `approvedId` | `boolean` | yes |  | Approved credential-less devices are admitted by reported id (grandfather). |
| `certificate` | `boolean` | yes |  | WS client-certificate login. Always false — stock Shelly WS has no client cert. |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "token": false,
  "approvedId": false,
  "certificate": false
}
```

<a id="deviceingress-connection-disconnect"></a>
### `deviceIngress.Connection.Disconnect`

Disconnect a live ingress connection and mark history.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `reason` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 160 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

### `deviceIngress.Connection.Get`

Get one org-scoped ingress connection row.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

List ingress connection history and live connection rows.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `identityId` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `result` | `enum("accepted" \| "waiting_room" \| "rejected")` | no |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 500 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

Type: `object`

| `preferredProfileId` | `enum("wall-display-local-ws" \| "shelly-pro-em-wss-token" \| "shelly-pro-em-wss-certificate" \| "modbus-tcp-connector")` | no |  |  |

<a id="deviceingress-enrollmenttoken-revoke"></a>
### `deviceIngress.EnrollmentToken.Revoke`

Revoke an active enrollment token before it is used.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json

}
```

Type: `object`

<a id="deviceingress-identity-create"></a>
### `deviceIngress.Identity.Create`

Create an org-scoped ingress identity.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `subjectType` | `enum("device" \| "connector" \| "gateway" \| "represented_device")` | yes |  |  |
| `subjectId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 160 |
| `displayName` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 160 |
| `securityModel` | `enum("certificate" \| "direct_token" \| "connector")` | yes |  |  |
| `transport` | `enum("wss" \| "ws" \| "modbus_tcp" \| "ble" \| "cloud_api" \| "connector_internal")` | yes |  |  |
| `riskLevel` | `enum("strong" \| "compatible" \| "legacy")` | yes |  |  |
| `expectedExternalId` | `string \| null` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 160 |
| `scopeKind` | `enum("device" \| "group" \| "location" \| null)` | no |  |  |
| `scopeRef` | `string \| null` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 160 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "subjectType": "device",
  "subjectId": "string",
  "displayName": "string",
  "securityModel": "certificate",
  "transport": "wss",
  "riskLevel": "strong"
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `subjectType` | `enum("device" \| "connector" \| "gateway" \| "represented_device")` | yes |  |  |
| `subjectId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 160 |
| `displayName` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `securityModel` | `enum("certificate" \| "direct_token" \| "connector")` | yes |  |  |
| `transport` | `enum("wss" \| "ws" \| "modbus_tcp" \| "ble" \| "cloud_api" \| "connector_internal")` | yes |  |  |
| `riskLevel` | `enum("strong" \| "compatible" \| "legacy")` | yes |  |  |
| `status` | `enum("pending" \| "active" \| "disabled" \| "quarantined" \| "deleted")` | yes |  |  |
| `expectedExternalId` | `string \| null` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 160 |
| `lastSeenAt` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "organizationId": "string",
  "subjectType": "device",
  "subjectId": "string",
  "displayName": "string",
  "securityModel": "certificate",
  "transport": "wss",
  "riskLevel": "strong",
  "status": "pending"
}
```

<a id="deviceingress-setup-bundle"></a>
### `deviceIngress.Setup.Bundle`

Fetch a short-lived provisioning bundle. Certificate bundles also require certificate management permission.

**Permission**: devices/update; certificate setup also requires organizations/update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `sessionId` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "sessionId": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `profileId` | `enum("wall-display-local-ws" \| "shelly-pro-em-wss-token" \| "shelly-pro-em-wss-certificate" \| "modbus-tcp-connector")` | yes |  |  |
| `status` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `bundle` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `bundle.organizationId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `bundle.identityId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `bundle.securityModel` | `enum("certificate" \| "direct_token" \| "connector")` | yes |  |  |
| `bundle.transport` | `enum("wss" \| "ws" \| "modbus_tcp" \| "ble" \| "cloud_api" \| "connector_internal")` | yes |  |  |
| `bundle.riskLevel` | `enum("strong" \| "compatible" \| "legacy")` | yes |  |  |
| `bundle.applyMethod` | `enum("ble" \| "local_http" \| "ws_rpc" \| "connector" \| "manual")` | yes |  |  |
| `bundle.deviceConfig` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `bundle.deviceConfig.ws` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `bundle.deviceConfig.ws.enable` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `bundle.deviceConfig.ws.server` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `bundle.deviceConfig.ws.ssl_ca` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `bundle.certificates` | `any \| any` | no |  |  |
| `bundle.certificates.certificateId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `bundle.certificates.fingerprintSha256` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `bundle.certificates.notBefore` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `bundle.certificates.notAfter` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `bundle.certificates.requiresClientKey` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `bundle.certificates.install` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `bundle.certificates.install.userCaPem` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `bundle.certificates.install.clientCertPem` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `bundle.certificates.install.clientKeyPem` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `bundle.tokenOnce` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `bundle.warnings` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `bundle.requiresReboot` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `bundle.sessionId` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `bundleFetchCount` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `expiresAt` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "organizationId": "string",
  "profileId": "wall-display-local-ws",
  "status": "string",
  "bundle": {
    "organizationId": "string",
    "identityId": "string",
    "securityModel": "certificate",
    "transport": "wss",
    "riskLevel": "strong",
    "applyMethod": "ble",
    "deviceConfig": {
      "ws": {
        "enable": false,
        "server": "string"
      }
    },
    "requiresReboot": false
  }
}
```

<a id="deviceingress-setup-reportapply"></a>
### `deviceIngress.Setup.ReportApply`

Report mobile/local provisioning apply result.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `sessionId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `status` | `enum("applied" \| "partial" \| "failed")` | yes |  |  |
| `applyMethod` | `enum("ble" \| "local_http" \| "ws_rpc" \| "connector" \| "manual")` | yes |  |  |
| `errorCode` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 80 |
| `errorMessage` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 1024 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "sessionId": "string",
  "status": "applied",
  "applyMethod": "ble"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

## `devicepower` namespace

<a id="devicepower-describe"></a>
### `devicepower.Describe`

Return the devicepower namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="devicepower-getconfig"></a>
### `devicepower.GetConfig`

DevicePower.GetConfig.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="devicepower-getstatus"></a>

DevicePower.GetStatus — {id, battery:{V,percent}, external:{present}}.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

```json
  "id": 0
}
```

Type: `object`

<a id="devicepower-setconfig"></a>
### `devicepower.SetConfig`

DevicePower.SetConfig — config object (currently empty per spec).

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `config` | `object` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "config": {}
}
```

Type: `null`

<a id="discovery-namespace"></a>
## `discovery` namespace

<a id="discovery-admitdevice"></a>
### `discovery.AdmitDevice`

Reach out to a device at a given host (IP or hostname), configure its outbound websocket to point at FM, reboot it, and record an admission intent so it auto-joins the requesting org on reconnect.

**Permission**: devices / create

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `host` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `password` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 256 |
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `groupId` | `integer` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "host": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `gen` | `enum(2 \| 3 \| 4)` | yes |  |  |
| `rebootingMs` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `intentRecorded` | `enum(true)` | yes |  |  |
| `expectedConnectionWithinSec` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "shellyId": "string",
  "gen": 2,
  "rebootingMs": 0,
  "intentRecorded": true,
  "expectedConnectionWithinSec": 1
}
```

<a id="discovery-describe"></a>
### `discovery.Describe`

Return the discovery namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="discovery-probe"></a>
### `discovery.Probe`

Read-only probe of a LAN-reachable Shelly device by IP or hostname. Returns its identity, firmware, and whether it requires auth or is already in this organization's fleet. No mutation — the wizard shows this to the user before AdmitDevice writes the WS config.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `host` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "host": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ip` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `shellyId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `gen` | `enum(2 \| 3 \| 4)` | yes |  |  |
| `model` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `ver` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `mac` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `authRequired` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `authDomain` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `alreadyKnown` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `inWaitingRoom` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "ip": "string",
  "shellyId": "string",
  "gen": 2,
  "model": "string",
  "ver": "string",
  "mac": "string",
  "authRequired": false,
  "authDomain": "string",
  "alreadyKnown": false,
  "inWaitingRoom": false
}
```

<a id="discovery-scanlan"></a>
### `discovery.ScanLan`

Active mDNS sweep for Shelly devices on the local network, cross-referenced with the device list and active admission intents.

**Permission**: devices / create

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `timeoutMs` | `integer` | no |  | min 500, max 15000 |
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `hits` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `hits[].ip` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `hits[].shellyId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `hits[].model` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `hits[].gen` | `enum(1 \| 2 \| 3 \| 4)` | yes |  |  |
| `hits[].mac` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `hits[].alreadyKnown` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `hits[].inWaitingRoom` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `scannedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `durationMs` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `warnings` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "hits": [
    {
      "ip": "string",
      "shellyId": "string",
      "model": "string",
      "gen": 1,
      "mac": "string",
      "alreadyKnown": false,
      "inWaitingRoom": false
    }
  ],
  "scannedAt": "string",
  "durationMs": 0,
  "warnings": [
    "string"
  ]
}
```

| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

### `em.SetConfig`

EM.SetConfig — triphase energy meter config.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

```json
  "id": 0,
  "config": {}
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
