```json
}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="em1-calibratefrom"></a>
### `em1.CalibrateFrom`

EM1.CalibrateFrom — calibrate this phase from another. Requires >=500W load.

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `other_id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "other_id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `restart_required` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "restart_required": false
}
```

| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |

| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |

<a id="emdata-namespace"></a>
## `emdata` namespace

<a id="emdata-deletealldata"></a>
### `emdata.DeleteAllData`

EMData.DeleteAllData — wipes device-side history (irreversible).

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `null`

<a id="emdata-describe"></a>
### `emdata.Describe`

Return the emdata namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

```json
{}
```

| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

```json
}
```

<a id="energy-namespace"></a>
## `energy` namespace

**Tags:** `total_act_energy`, `total_act_ret_energy`, `volume_l`, `volume_m3`, `thermal_energy_kwh`, `power`, `volume_flow_m3h`, `volume_storage_l`, `voltage`, `current`, `min_voltage`, `max_voltage`, `min_current`, `max_current`, `temperature`, `humidity`, `luminance`

<a id="energy-current"></a>
### `energy.Current`

Live instantaneous active power (W) read from in-memory device status — no DB. Selector: scope (group / fleet), devices, or meterIds (one of). detail=total returns one signed sum; device returns per-device sums; channel adds a per-(component, phase) breakdown so a UI can show or pick individual switches or meter phases. components[] narrows to a chosen subset. With meterIds, detail=meter returns per-logical-meter watts (total/meter only, no components); formula meters are rejected — use Query for their energy. Pair with Query for history; poll this (~1–3s) for "now".

**Permission**: Scope-dependent: groupId→groups:read, devices→devices:read per device, fleet→dashboards:read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `scope` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `scope.groupId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.locationId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.tagId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `devices` | `array<string>` | no |  | shellyID allowlist — mutually exclusive with scope — maxItems 500 |
| `meterIds` | `array<number>` | no |  | logical-meter ids — mutually exclusive with scope/devices — maxItems 500 |
| `components` | `array<string>` | no |  | component-key allowlist, e.g. switch:0 — applied per device |
| `detail` | `enum("total" \| "device" \| "channel" \| "meter")` | no |  | response granularity — defaults to total |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `watts` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `asOf` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `onlineDevices` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `devices` | `array<object>` | no |  |  |
| `devices[].shellyID` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `devices[].online` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `devices[].watts` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `devices[].channels` | `array<object>` | no |  |  |
| `devices[].channels[].componentKey` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `devices[].channels[].phase` | `enum("a" \| "b" \| "c" \| "z")` | yes |  |  |
| `devices[].channels[].watts` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `meters` | `array<object>` | no |  |  |
| `meters[].meterId` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `meters[].watts` | `number` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "watts": 0,
  "asOf": "string",
  "onlineDevices": 0
}
```

<a id="energy-deletelogicalmeter"></a>
### `energy.DeleteLogicalMeter`

Delete one logical meter; its points revert to unassigned facts and any child meter is detached from it.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `number` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deleted` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "deleted": false
}
```

Delete one topology edge by id.

**Permission**: devices / update

```json
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deleted` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

```json

  "deleted": false
}
```

Return the energy namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

<a id="energy-getresetaudit"></a>
### `energy.GetResetAudit`

Per-(device, channel, tag) reset history from device_em.lifetime_counters — surfaces devices that may have a firmware glitch or that an operator pressed ResetCounters on.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deviceId` | `number` | no |  | Limit to one device |
| `windowDays` | `number` | no |  | Only rows whose last reset is within this window — min 1, max 365 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].deviceId` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].channel` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].tag` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].resetCount` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].lastResetAt` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].lastSeenAt` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "deviceId": 0,
      "channel": 0,
      "tag": "string",
      "resetCount": 0
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="energy-listlogicalmeters"></a>
### `energy.ListLogicalMeters`

List the org logical meters with their meaning (utility / role / kind) and their assigned channel points. Optional group / location scope narrows the set. Reports and device Energy assignment read this.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `scope` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `scope.groupId` | `number` | no |  |  |
| `scope.locationId` | `number` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `meters` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `meters[].id` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `meters[].name` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `meters[].utilityType` | `enum("electric" \| "gas" \| "water" \| "heat")` | yes |  |  |
| `meters[].role` | `enum("grid" \| "pv" \| "battery" \| "generator" \| "ev_charge" \| "load" \| "aux" \| "supply" \| "production" \| "storage" \| "usage" \| "aux")` | yes |  |  |
| `meters[].kindId` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `meters[].phaseMode` | `enum("single_phase" \| "three_phase" \| "independent_channels" \| "dc" \| "unknown")` | yes |  |  |
| `meters[].aggregationMode` | `enum("sum_points" \| "formula")` | yes |  |  |
| `meters[].points` | `array<object>` | yes |  | maxItems 512 |
| `meters[].points[].deviceId` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `meters[].points[].componentKey` | `string \| null` | no |  | maxLength 100 |
| `meters[].points[].channel` | `number` | no |  | min 0, max 31 |
| `meters[].points[].phase` | `enum("a" \| "b" \| "c" \| "z")` | no |  |  |
| `meters[].points[].tag` | `enum("power" \| "apparent_power" \| "reactive_power" \| "voltage" \| "current" \| "frequency" \| "power_factor" \| "total_power" \| "total_apparent_power" \| "total_current" \| "neutral_current" \| "total_act_energy" \| "total_act_ret_energy" \| "percentage" \| "temperature_c" \| "temperature_f" \| "volume_l" \| "volume_m3" \| "volume_storage_l" \| "volume_flow_m3h" \| "thermal_energy_kwh")` | yes |  |  |
| `meters[].points[].electricalDomain` | `enum("ac_mains" \| "dc_pv" \| "dc_battery" \| "dc_bus" \| "thermal" \| "unspecified" \| null)` | no |  |  |
| `meters[].points[].directionHint` | `enum("import" \| "export" \| "charge" \| "discharge" \| null)` | no |  |  |
| `meters[].groupId` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |
| `meters[].locationId` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |
| `meters[].costCenter` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `meters[].parentMeterId` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |
| `meters[].virtualFormula` | `object \| null` | no |  |  |
| `meters[].virtualFormula.kind` | `enum("sum")` | yes |  |  |
| `meters[].virtualFormula.terms` | `array<object>` | yes |  | maxItems 256 |
| `meters[].virtualFormula.terms[].meterId` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `meters[].virtualFormula.terms[].sign` | `enum(1 \| -1)` | yes |  |  |
| `meters[].virtualFormula.terms[].share` | `number` | no |  | min 0, max 1 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "meters": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "name": "string",
      "utilityType": "electric",
      "role": "grid",
      "phaseMode": "single_phase",
      "aggregationMode": "sum_points",
      "points": [
        {
          "deviceId": 0,
          "tag": "power"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="energy-listmeasurementpoints"></a>
### `energy.ListMeasurementPoints`

List a device or scope wireable measurement points for the device Energy assignment UI. Primary source is stored device_em history (hasHistory); the live snapshot adds the componentKey label and isLiveNow. source=history/both can query historical energy; source=live has no history yet. assignedMeterId marks wired points.

**Permission**: Scope-dependent: shellyID→devices:read, scope→groups:read / locations:read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | no |  | single device — mutually exclusive with scope — minLength 1 |
| `scope` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `scope.groupId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.locationId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.tagId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `includeAssigned` | `boolean` | no |  | include already-assigned points — default true |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `points` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `points[].deviceId` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `points[].shellyID` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `points[].componentKey` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `points[].channel` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `points[].phase` | `enum("a" \| "b" \| "c" \| "z")` | yes |  |  |
| `points[].tag` | `enum("power" \| "apparent_power" \| "reactive_power" \| "voltage" \| "current" \| "frequency" \| "power_factor" \| "total_power" \| "total_apparent_power" \| "total_current" \| "neutral_current" \| "total_act_energy" \| "total_act_ret_energy" \| "percentage" \| "temperature_c" \| "temperature_f" \| "volume_l" \| "volume_m3" \| "volume_storage_l" \| "volume_flow_m3h" \| "thermal_energy_kwh")` | yes |  |  |
| `points[].electricalDomain` | `enum("ac_mains" \| "dc_pv" \| "dc_battery" \| "dc_bus" \| "thermal" \| "unspecified")` | yes |  |  |
| `points[].source` | `enum("history" \| "live" \| "both")` | yes |  |  |
| `points[].hasHistory` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `points[].isLiveNow` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `points[].assignedMeterId` | `number` | no |  |  |
| `points[].sampleValue` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |
| `points[].sampleTs` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "points": [
    {
      "deviceId": 0,
      "shellyID": "string",
      "componentKey": "string",
      "channel": 0,
      "phase": "a",
      "tag": "power",
      "electricalDomain": "ac_mains",
      "source": "history",
      "hasHistory": false,
      "isLiveNow": false
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="energy-listmeterconnections"></a>
### `energy.ListMeterConnections`

List the org topology edges — which node each logical meter sits between and the direction a positive value flows. Powers rich energy/resource flow views.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `connections` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `connections[].id` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `connections[].meterId` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `connections[].fromNode` | `enum("grid" \| "ac_bus" \| "house_load" \| "pv_dc" \| "inverter" \| "battery_dc" \| "generator" \| "thermal_loop" \| "water_supply" \| "gas_supply")` | yes |  |  |
| `connections[].toNode` | `enum("grid" \| "ac_bus" \| "house_load" \| "pv_dc" \| "inverter" \| "battery_dc" \| "generator" \| "thermal_loop" \| "water_supply" \| "gas_supply")` | yes |  |  |
| `connections[].positiveDirection` | `enum("from_to" \| "to_from" \| "bidirectional")` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "connections": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "meterId": 0,
      "fromNode": "grid",
      "toNode": "grid",
      "positiveDirection": "from_to"
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="energy-query"></a>
### `energy.Query`

Unified time-series read for energy (device_em.stats) and environmental (device.status) tags. Group / devices / fleet scope selected by params. Mixed tag sets fan out in parallel. Values are scaled to display units (kWh / V / A / W / °C / % / lux). Omit limit to return the full set (up to the server OOM ceiling); set limit to paginate. total is a lower bound, not exact — has_more is the authoritative "more data exists" signal.

**Permission**: Scope-dependent: groupId→groups:read, devices→devices:read per device, fleet→dashboards:read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `from` | `string` | yes |  | ISO-8601 start — minLength 1 |
| `to` | `string` | yes |  | ISO-8601 end — minLength 1 |
| `tags` | `array<enum("total_act_energy" \| "total_act_ret_energy" \| "volume_l" \| "volume_m3" \| "thermal_energy_kwh" \| "power" \| "volume_flow_m3h" \| "volume_storage_l" \| "voltage" \| "current" \| "min_voltage" \| "max_voltage" \| "min_current" \| "max_current" \| "temperature" \| "humidity" \| "luminance")>` | yes |  | minItems 1 |
| `bucket` | `enum("1 minute" \| "5 minutes" \| "15 minutes" \| "30 minutes" \| "1 hour" \| "6 hours" \| "12 hours" \| "1 day" \| "1 week" \| "1 month")` | no |  | Bucket interval — defaults to 1 day |
| `scope` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `scope.groupId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.locationId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.tagId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `devices` | `array<string>` | no |  | shellyID allowlist — mutually exclusive with scope — maxItems 500 |
| `meterIds` | `array<number>` | no |  | logical-meter ids — energy tags only; mutually exclusive with scope/devices — maxItems 500 |
| `perDevice` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `perPhase` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `timezone` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 64 |
| `limit` | `number` | no |  | Page size. Omit to return the full set (up to server OOM ceiling); pagination applies only when set. — min 1, max 50000 |
| `offset` | `number` | no |  | min 0 |
| `groupBy` | `enum("meter" \| "role" \| "kind" \| "utility")` | no |  |  |
| `totals` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "from": "string",
  "to": "string",
  "tags": [
    "total_act_energy"
  ]
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].bucket` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].meterId` | `number` | no |  |  |
| `items[].device` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].shellyID` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].tag` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].value` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].min` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].max` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |
| `items[].phase` | `enum("a" \| "b" \| "c")` | no |  |  |
| `groups` | `array<object>` | no |  | Grouped series — present only when groupBy is set; items is empty. |
| `groups[].bucket` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `groups[].groupBy` | `enum("meter" \| "role" \| "kind" \| "utility")` | yes |  |  |
| `groups[].key` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `groups[].label` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `groups[].unit` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `groups[].value` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `total` | `number` | yes |  | Lower bound on total rows (offset + returned + 1 when more exist), not exact — has_more is authoritative. |
| `limit` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  | Authoritative signal that more rows exist beyond this page. |
| `meta` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `meta.from` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `meta.to` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `meta.bucket` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `meta.executionMs` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `meta.fromMaterializedView` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "bucket": "string",
      "device": 0,
      "shellyID": "string",
      "tag": "string",
      "value": 0
    }
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false,
  "meta": {
    "from": "string",
    "to": "string",
    "bucket": "string",
    "executionMs": 0
  }
}
```

<a id="energy-savelogicalmeter"></a>
### `energy.SaveLogicalMeter`

Create (omit id) or update one logical meter — the meaning the user sets. role is scoped by utilityType; a physical meter carries points + aggregationMode=sum_points, a calculated meter carries a formula + aggregationMode=formula. Returns the saved meter.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `number` | no |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `utilityType` | `enum("electric" \| "gas" \| "water" \| "heat")` | yes |  |  |
| `role` | `enum("grid" \| "pv" \| "battery" \| "generator" \| "ev_charge" \| "load" \| "aux" \| "supply" \| "production" \| "storage" \| "usage" \| "aux")` | yes |  |  |
| `kindId` | `string \| null` | no |  | maxLength 200 |
| `phaseMode` | `enum("single_phase" \| "three_phase" \| "independent_channels" \| "dc" \| "unknown")` | no |  |  |
| `aggregationMode` | `enum("sum_points" \| "formula")` | yes |  |  |
| `points` | `array<object>` | no |  | maxItems 512 |
| `points[].deviceId` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `points[].componentKey` | `string \| null` | no |  | maxLength 100 |
| `points[].channel` | `number` | no |  | min 0, max 31 |
| `points[].phase` | `enum("a" \| "b" \| "c" \| "z")` | no |  |  |
| `points[].tag` | `enum("power" \| "apparent_power" \| "reactive_power" \| "voltage" \| "current" \| "frequency" \| "power_factor" \| "total_power" \| "total_apparent_power" \| "total_current" \| "neutral_current" \| "total_act_energy" \| "total_act_ret_energy" \| "percentage" \| "temperature_c" \| "temperature_f" \| "volume_l" \| "volume_m3" \| "volume_storage_l" \| "volume_flow_m3h" \| "thermal_energy_kwh")` | yes |  |  |
| `points[].electricalDomain` | `enum("ac_mains" \| "dc_pv" \| "dc_battery" \| "dc_bus" \| "thermal" \| "unspecified" \| null)` | no |  |  |
| `points[].directionHint` | `enum("import" \| "export" \| "charge" \| "discharge" \| null)` | no |  |  |
| `groupId` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |
| `locationId` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |
| `costCenter` | `string \| null` | no |  | maxLength 120 |
| `parentMeterId` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |
| `virtualFormula` | `object \| null` | no |  |  |
| `virtualFormula.kind` | `enum("sum")` | yes |  |  |
| `virtualFormula.terms` | `array<object>` | yes |  | maxItems 256 |
| `virtualFormula.terms[].meterId` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `virtualFormula.terms[].sign` | `enum(1 \| -1)` | yes |  |  |
| `virtualFormula.terms[].share` | `number` | no |  | min 0, max 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "name": "string",
  "utilityType": "electric",
  "role": "grid",
  "aggregationMode": "sum_points"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `meter` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `meter.id` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `meter.name` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `meter.utilityType` | `enum("electric" \| "gas" \| "water" \| "heat")` | yes |  |  |
| `meter.role` | `enum("grid" \| "pv" \| "battery" \| "generator" \| "ev_charge" \| "load" \| "aux" \| "supply" \| "production" \| "storage" \| "usage" \| "aux")` | yes |  |  |
| `meter.kindId` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `meter.phaseMode` | `enum("single_phase" \| "three_phase" \| "independent_channels" \| "dc" \| "unknown")` | yes |  |  |
| `meter.aggregationMode` | `enum("sum_points" \| "formula")` | yes |  |  |
| `meter.points` | `array<object>` | yes |  | maxItems 512 |
| `meter.points[].deviceId` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `meter.points[].componentKey` | `string \| null` | no |  | maxLength 100 |
| `meter.points[].channel` | `number` | no |  | min 0, max 31 |
| `meter.points[].phase` | `enum("a" \| "b" \| "c" \| "z")` | no |  |  |
| `meter.points[].tag` | `enum("power" \| "apparent_power" \| "reactive_power" \| "voltage" \| "current" \| "frequency" \| "power_factor" \| "total_power" \| "total_apparent_power" \| "total_current" \| "neutral_current" \| "total_act_energy" \| "total_act_ret_energy" \| "percentage" \| "temperature_c" \| "temperature_f" \| "volume_l" \| "volume_m3" \| "volume_storage_l" \| "volume_flow_m3h" \| "thermal_energy_kwh")` | yes |  |  |
| `meter.points[].electricalDomain` | `enum("ac_mains" \| "dc_pv" \| "dc_battery" \| "dc_bus" \| "thermal" \| "unspecified" \| null)` | no |  |  |
| `meter.points[].directionHint` | `enum("import" \| "export" \| "charge" \| "discharge" \| null)` | no |  |  |
| `meter.groupId` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |
| `meter.locationId` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |
| `meter.costCenter` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `meter.parentMeterId` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |
| `meter.virtualFormula` | `object \| null` | no |  |  |
| `meter.virtualFormula.kind` | `enum("sum")` | yes |  |  |
| `meter.virtualFormula.terms` | `array<object>` | yes |  | maxItems 256 |
| `meter.virtualFormula.terms[].meterId` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `meter.virtualFormula.terms[].sign` | `enum(1 \| -1)` | yes |  |  |
| `meter.virtualFormula.terms[].share` | `number` | no |  | min 0, max 1 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "meter": {
    "id": 0,
    "name": "string",
    "utilityType": "electric",
    "role": "grid",
    "phaseMode": "single_phase",
    "aggregationMode": "sum_points",
    "points": [
      {
        "deviceId": 0,
        "tag": "power"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

<a id="energy-savemeterconnection"></a>
### `energy.SaveMeterConnection`

Create (omit id) or update one topology edge between two nodes for a logical meter. Re-saving the same edge updates its direction. Returns the saved connection.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `number` | no |  |  |
| `meterId` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `fromNode` | `enum("grid" \| "ac_bus" \| "house_load" \| "pv_dc" \| "inverter" \| "battery_dc" \| "generator" \| "thermal_loop" \| "water_supply" \| "gas_supply")` | yes |  |  |
| `toNode` | `enum("grid" \| "ac_bus" \| "house_load" \| "pv_dc" \| "inverter" \| "battery_dc" \| "generator" \| "thermal_loop" \| "water_supply" \| "gas_supply")` | yes |  |  |
| `positiveDirection` | `enum("from_to" \| "to_from" \| "bidirectional")` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "meterId": 0,
  "fromNode": "grid",
  "toNode": "grid"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `connection` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `connection.id` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `connection.meterId` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `connection.fromNode` | `enum("grid" \| "ac_bus" \| "house_load" \| "pv_dc" \| "inverter" \| "battery_dc" \| "generator" \| "thermal_loop" \| "water_supply" \| "gas_supply")` | yes |  |  |
| `connection.toNode` | `enum("grid" \| "ac_bus" \| "house_load" \| "pv_dc" \| "inverter" \| "battery_dc" \| "generator" \| "thermal_loop" \| "water_supply" \| "gas_supply")` | yes |  |  |
| `connection.positiveDirection` | `enum("from_to" \| "to_from" \| "bidirectional")` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "connection": {
    "id": 0,
    "meterId": 0,
    "fromNode": "grid",
    "toNode": "grid",
    "positiveDirection": "from_to"
  }
}
```

<a id="energy-setpointoverride"></a>
### `energy.SetPointOverride`

Fix the one fact a device cannot state — the electrical domain or tag of an unknown point (e.g. a voltmeter that may be AC or DC). Writes the tier-1 operator override; the next NotifyStatus frame uses it immediately. All other facts are auto-derived.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deviceId` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `componentKey` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 100 |
| `channel` | `number` | yes |  | min 0, max 31 |
| `tag` | `enum("power" \| "apparent_power" \| "reactive_power" \| "voltage" \| "current" \| "frequency" \| "power_factor" \| "total_power" \| "total_apparent_power" \| "total_current" \| "neutral_current" \| "total_act_energy" \| "total_act_ret_energy" \| "percentage" \| "temperature_c" \| "temperature_f" \| "volume_l" \| "volume_m3" \| "volume_storage_l" \| "volume_flow_m3h" \| "thermal_energy_kwh")` | yes |  |  |
| `electricalDomain` | `enum("ac_mains" \| "dc_pv" \| "dc_battery" \| "dc_bus" \| "thermal" \| "unspecified")` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "deviceId": 0,
  "componentKey": "string",
  "channel": 0,
  "tag": "power",
  "electricalDomain": "ac_mains"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ok` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "ok": false
}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |


---

<a id="entity-namespace"></a>
## `entity` namespace

<a id="entity-describe"></a>
### `entity.Describe`

Return the entity namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="entity-get"></a>
### `entity.Get`

Return the normalized summary of a single entity. Replaces Entity.GetInfo (removed in the Phase 1 cutover).

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  | Entity identifier — minLength 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `type` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `source` | `string` | yes |  | Parent device shellyID |
| `online` | `boolean` | yes |  | True iff the parent (gateway) device is currently connected. BLU sensors inherit their gateway’s state. |
| `properties` | `object` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "type": "string",
  "source": "string",
  "online": false,
  "properties": {}
}
```

<a id="entity-getactionschema"></a>
### `entity.GetActionSchema`

Return the JSON Schema for an action on a specific entity. Callers use this to build forms or validate InvokeAction params without hardcoding shapes.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `action` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "action": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `type` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `action` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `schema` | `object` | yes |  | JSON Schema describing the params object for InvokeAction. |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "type": "string",
  "action": "string",
  "schema": {}
}
```

<a id="entity-getcapabilities"></a>
### `entity.GetCapabilities`

Return the backend-declared capability set for an entity — what actions it supports.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  | Entity identifier — minLength 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `type` | `string` | yes |  | Entity type discriminator |
| `actions` | `array<string>` | yes |  | Action verbs the entity supports |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "type": "string",
  "actions": [
    "string"
  ]
}
```

<a id="entity-invokeaction"></a>
### `entity.InvokeAction`

Invoke a capability action on an entity (toggle, setBrightness, open/close, ...). Backend translates to the right Shelly device RPC.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `action` | `string` | yes |  | Action verb — must appear in GetCapabilities(id).actions — minLength 1 |
| `params` | `object` | no |  | Action-specific parameters. Shape depends on the action and entity type. |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "action": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `action` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `result` | `any` | yes |  | Raw Shelly device RPC response — untyped at the Entity.* layer |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "action": "string",
  "result": null
}
```

<a id="entity-list"></a>
### `entity.List`

Paginated list of entities the caller can read, filtered against device-level access.

**Permission**: authenticated — filtered by device access

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | 0 = unlimited; default = FM_ENTITY_LIST_DB_PAGE_MAX (500) — min 0 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no | `0` | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `limit` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `offset` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {}
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false
}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

```json
}
```

Type: `object`

<a id="eth-setconfig"></a>
### `eth.SetConfig`

Eth.SetConfig — wired interface config. ipv4mode/IP/gateway/dhcp_start_ip/dhcp_end_ip values gated by device.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `config` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `config.enable` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `config.server_mode` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `config.ipv4mode` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `config.ip` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `config.netmask` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `config.gw` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `config.nameserver` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `config.dhcp_start_ip` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `config.dhcp_end_ip` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "config": {}
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `restart_required` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "restart_required": false
}
```

<a id="firmware-getautoupdatedevices"></a>
### `firmware.GetAutoUpdateDevices`

List devices with auto-update configured.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="firmware-getautoupdatemode"></a>
### `firmware.GetAutoUpdateMode`

Return the auto-update mode for a device.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="firmware-getautoupdatemodes"></a>
### `firmware.GetAutoUpdateModes`

Return the supported auto-update modes.

**Permission**: devices / read

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="firmware-getautoupdatestatus"></a>
### `firmware.GetAutoUpdateStatus`

Return the current auto-update status for a device.

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

Type: `object<any>`

### `firmware.GetLastAutoUpdateRun`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="firmware-listlibrary"></a>
### `firmware.ListLibrary`

List firmware library entries (uploaded binaries + metadata).

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `total` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `limit` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {}
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false
}
```

<a id="firmware-registermanualupdate"></a>
### `firmware.RegisterManualUpdate`

Register a manual update for one or more devices.

**Permission**: per-device execute or admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyIDs` | `array<string>` | yes |  | minItems 1 |
| `ttlMs` | `integer` | no |  | min 60000, max 1800000 |
| `ownerToken` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyIDs": [
    "string"
  ]
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="firmware-setautoupdate"></a>
### `firmware.SetAutoUpdate`

Enable or disable auto-update for a single device.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "enabled": false
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="firmware-setautoupdatebulk"></a>
### `firmware.SetAutoUpdateBulk`

Bulk enable/disable auto-update.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyIDs` | `array<string>` | yes |  | minItems 1 |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyIDs": [
    "string"
  ],
  "enabled": false
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="firmware-setautoupdatechannel"></a>
### `firmware.SetAutoUpdateChannel`

Set the global default firmware channel (stable/beta) for legacy enables.

**Permission**: provider-support-only

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `channel` | `enum("stable" \| "beta")` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "channel": "stable"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="firmware-setautoupdatemode"></a>
### `firmware.SetAutoUpdateMode`

Set the auto-update mode for a single device.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `mode` | `enum("off" \| "stable" \| "beta")` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "mode": "off"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="firmware-setautoupdatemodebulk"></a>
### `firmware.SetAutoUpdateModeBulk`

Bulk set the auto-update mode for a list of devices.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyIDs` | `array<string>` | yes |  | minItems 1 |
| `mode` | `enum("off" \| "stable" \| "beta")` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyIDs": [
    "string"
  ],
  "mode": "off"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="firmware-startupdatejob"></a>
### `firmware.StartUpdateJob`

Start a backend-owned firmware update job for one or more devices.

**Permission**: per-device execute or admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyIDs` | `array<string>` | yes |  | minItems 1 |
| `channel` | `enum("stable" \| "beta")` | no |  |  |
| `url` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 4096 |
| `targetBuildIdHint` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 256 |
| `idempotencyKey` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 160 |
| `allowDowngrade` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyIDs": [
    "string"
  ]
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `jobId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "jobId": "string"
}
```

<a id="firmware-triggerautoupdate"></a>
### `firmware.TriggerAutoUpdate`

Check auto-update candidates and enqueue durable firmware update jobs.

**Permission**: provider-support-only

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `checked` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `queued` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `skipped` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `failed` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `jobs` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `jobs[].jobId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `jobs[].tenantId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `jobs[].channel` | `enum("stable" \| "beta")` | yes |  |  |
| `jobs[].shellyIDs` | `array<string>` | yes |  | minItems 1 |
| `results` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `results[].shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `results[].status` | `enum("queued" \| "no_update" \| "offline" \| "failed" \| "skipped")` | yes |  |  |
| `results[].channel` | `enum("stable" \| "beta")` | no |  |  |
| `results[].jobId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1 |
| `results[].error` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "checked": 0,
  "queued": 0,
  "skipped": 0,
  "failed": 0,
  "jobs": [
    {
      "jobId": "string",
      "tenantId": "string",
      "channel": "stable",
      "shellyIDs": [
        "string"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "results": [
    {
      "shellyID": "string",
      "status": "queued"
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="firmware-unregistermanualupdate"></a>
### `firmware.UnregisterManualUpdate`

Cancel a previously registered manual update.

**Permission**: per-device execute or admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyIDs` | `array<string>` | yes |  | minItems 1 |
| `ownerToken` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyIDs": [
    "string"
  ]
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="firmware-updatelibraryentry"></a>
### `firmware.UpdateLibraryEntry`

Patch metadata on a library entry.

**Permission**: provider-support-only

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  | Firmware library item ID (UUID or safe filename stem) — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `name` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 120 |
| `app` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 120 |
| `model` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 120 |
| `ver` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 120 |
| `fwId` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 120 |
| `channel` | `enum("stable" \| "beta" \| "custom" \| "")` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 500 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `success` | `const(true)` | yes |  |  |
| `item` | `object` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "item": {}
}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="fleet-namespace"></a>
## `fleet` namespace

<a id="fleet-describe"></a>
### `fleet.Describe`

Return the fleet namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="fleet-getcapabilities"></a>
### `fleet.GetCapabilities`

Return capability keys derived from the slice devices live entities — device is single source of truth.

**Permission**: dashboards / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1 |
| `scope` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `scope.groupId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.locationId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.tagId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `scopeKind` | `enum("group" \| "location" \| "tag" \| "fleet")` | yes |  |  |
| `scopeId` | `integer \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `capabilities` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `deviceCount` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "scopeKind": "group",
  "scopeId": 0,
  "capabilities": [
    "string"
  ],
  "deviceCount": 0
}
```

<a id="fleet-getmetrics"></a>
### `fleet.GetMetrics`

Aggregate live in-memory device metrics for a slice (group / location / tag / fleet). No historical DB scan; offline devices skipped.

**Permission**: dashboards / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1 |
| `scope` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `scope.groupId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.locationId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.tagId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `scopeKind` | `enum("group" \| "location" \| "tag" \| "fleet")` | yes |  |  |
| `scopeId` | `integer \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `devices` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `devices[].id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `devices[].shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `devices[].name` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `devices[].hasEmChannels` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `devices[].hasEm1Channels` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `metrics` | `object<any>` | yes |  | Live-status metric buckets keyed by name: power, voltage, current, consumption, returned_energy, uptime, temperature, humidity, luminance. |
| `phaseMetrics` | `object \| null` | yes |  | Three-phase balance summary when available. |
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "scopeKind": "group",
  "scopeId": 0,
  "devices": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "shellyID": "string",
      "name": "string",
      "hasEmChannels": false,
      "hasEm1Channels": false
    }
  ],
  "metrics": {},
  "phaseMetrics": {}
}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |

| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |

| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |

| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |

<a id="fleetMap-namespace"></a>
## `fleetMap` namespace

<a id="fleetmap-describe"></a>
### `fleetMap.Describe`

Return the fleetMap namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="fleetmap-getalertsnapshot"></a>
### `fleetMap.GetAlertSnapshot`

Per-location open-alert count + top severity + oldest activeSince for the Alert map overlay (heatmap layer).

**Permission**: dashboards / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `pins` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `pins[].locationId` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |
| `pins[].openAlertCount` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `pins[].topSeverity` | `enum("critical" \| "warning" \| "info" \| null)` | yes |  |  |
| `pins[].oldestActiveSince` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `asOf` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "pins": [
    {
      "locationId": 1,
      "openAlertCount": 0,
      "topSeverity": "critical",
      "oldestActiveSince": "1970-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
    }
  ],
  "asOf": "1970-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
}
```

<a id="fleetmap-getenergysnapshot"></a>
### `fleetMap.GetEnergySnapshot`

Per-location live load for the Energy map overlay; baselineWatts is null until a rolling baseline source exists. Cached ~5s.

**Permission**: dashboards / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `pins` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `pins[].locationId` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |
| `pins[].currentLoadWatts` | `number` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `pins[].baselineWatts` | `number \| null` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `asOf` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "pins": [
    {
      "locationId": 1,
      "currentLoadWatts": 0,
      "baselineWatts": 0
    }
  ],
  "asOf": "1970-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
}
```

<a id="fleetmap-getsignalsnapshot"></a>
### `fleetMap.GetSignalSnapshot`

Per-location avg signal health (0..100) + device count for the Signal map overlay.

**Permission**: dashboards / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `pins` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `pins[].locationId` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |
| `pins[].signalHealth` | `number` | yes |  | min 0, max 100 |
| `pins[].deviceCount` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `asOf` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "pins": [
    {
      "locationId": 1,
      "signalHealth": 0,
      "deviceCount": 0
    }
  ],
  "asOf": "1970-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
}
```

| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |

| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="group-namespace"></a>
## `group` namespace

<a id="group-addmembers"></a>
### `group.AddMembers`

Batch-add subject members. Idempotent: already-present rows skipped.

**Permission**: groups / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `members` | `array<object>` | yes |  | minItems 1, maxItems 500 |
| `members[].subjectType` | `enum("device" \| "entity" \| "location")` | yes |  |  |
| `members[].subjectId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "members": [
    {
      "subjectType": "device",
      "subjectId": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `added` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `added[].subjectType` | `enum("device" \| "entity" \| "location")` | yes |  |  |
| `added[].subjectId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "added": [
    {
      "subjectType": "device",
      "subjectId": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

```json
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deleted` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

```json
{
  "deleted": false,
  "id": 0
}
```
