<a id="group-listactivity"></a>
### `group.ListActivity`

Paginated audit-log timeline for devices that are members of the group (or its descendants). Filter by time window and event types.

**Permission**: groups / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `from` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1 |
| `to` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1 |
| `eventTypes` | `array<string>` | no |  | maxItems 50 |
| `includeDescendants` | `boolean` | no | `true` |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | no | `200` | min 1, max 1000 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no | `0` | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].auditId` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].ts` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].eventType` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 50 |
| `items[].username` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].shellyId` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].shellyIds` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].method` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].params` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].success` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].errorMessage` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "auditId": 0,
      "ts": "string",
      "eventType": "string",
      "username": "string",
      "shellyId": "string",
      "shellyIds": [
        "string"
      ],
      "method": "string",
      "params": {},
      "success": false,
      "errorMessage": "string"
    }
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false
}
```

<a id="group-listdevicememberships"></a>
### `group.ListDeviceMemberships`

Flat {groupId, subjectId} list of device memberships — one round-trip for UIs that render many groups at once. Optional `ids` narrows the scope; otherwise returns all groups the caller can read.

**Permission**: groups / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `ids` | `array<integer>` | no |  | minItems 1, maxItems 1000 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].groupId` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].subjectId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "groupId": 0,
      "subjectId": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="group-listmembers"></a>
### `group.ListMembers`

List members of a group with optional subject-type filter.

**Permission**: groups / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `subjectType` | `enum("device" \| "entity" \| "location")` | no |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 1000 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].subjectType` | `enum("device" \| "entity" \| "location")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].subjectId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "subjectType": "device",
      "subjectId": "string"
    }
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false
}
```

<a id="group-path"></a>
### `group.Path`

Breadcrumb from root to the given group.

**Permission**: groups / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].name` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "name": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="group-removemembers"></a>
### `group.RemoveMembers`

Batch-remove subject members.

**Permission**: groups / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `members` | `array<object>` | yes |  | minItems 1, maxItems 500 |
| `members[].subjectType` | `enum("device" \| "entity" \| "location")` | yes |  |  |
| `members[].subjectId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "members": [
    {
      "subjectType": "device",
      "subjectId": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `removed` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `removed[].subjectType` | `enum("device" \| "entity" \| "location")` | yes |  |  |
| `removed[].subjectId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "removed": [
    {
      "subjectType": "device",
      "subjectId": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="group-update"></a>
### `group.Update`

Partial-update a group. Cycle-safe parent changes.

**Permission**: groups / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `expectedRevision` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `patch` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `patch.name` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `patch.description` | `string \| null` | no |  | maxLength 500 |
| `patch.groupType` | `enum("standard" \| "operational" \| "critical" \| "custom")` | no |  |  |
| `patch.kind` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `patch.metadata` | `object<any>` | no |  | ≤ 65536 B JSON |
| `patch.visual` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `patch.visual.icon` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 80 |
| `patch.visual.accent` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 80 |
| `patch.visual.imageModel` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 80 |
| `patch.imageAssetId` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "patch": {}
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `description` | `string \| null` | yes |  | maxLength 500 |
| `parentGroupId` | `integer \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `groupType` | `enum("standard" \| "operational" \| "critical" \| "custom")` | yes |  |  |
| `membershipMode` | `enum("manual")` | yes |  |  |
| `kind` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `metadata` | `object<any>` | yes |  | ≤ 65536 B JSON |
| `visual` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `visual.icon` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 80 |
| `visual.accent` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 80 |
| `visual.imageModel` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 80 |
| `imageAssetId` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `revision` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |
| `isLegacy` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `effectiveSeverityFloor` | `enum("info" \| "warning" \| "critical" \| null)` | yes |  |  |
| `effectiveRetentionDays` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 1 |
| `effectiveAuditRetentionDays` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 1 |
| `policySources` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `policySources.severityFloor` | `enum("set" \| "inherited")` | yes |  |  |
| `policySources.retentionDays` | `enum("set" \| "inherited")` | yes |  |  |
| `policySources.auditRetentionDays` | `enum("set" \| "inherited")` | yes |  |  |
| `createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `counts` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `counts.childLocations` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.childGroups` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.devices` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.entities` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.locations` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.tags` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.descendantDevices` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.descendantEntities` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.groupsReferencingLocation` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "organizationId": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "parentGroupId": 0,
  "groupType": "standard",
  "membershipMode": "manual",
  "kind": "string",
  "metadata": {},
  "visual": {},
  "imageAssetId": null,
  "revision": 1,
  "isLegacy": false,
  "effectiveSeverityFloor": "info",
  "effectiveRetentionDays": 1,
  "effectiveAuditRetentionDays": 1,
  "createdAt": "string",
  "updatedAt": "string"
}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="http-namespace"></a>
## `http` namespace

<a id="http-describe"></a>
### `http.Describe`

Return the http namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="http-get"></a>
### `http.GET`

HTTP.GET — fetch a URL via HTTP/HTTPS GET from the device.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `url` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `timeout` | `number` | no |  |  |
| `ssl_ca` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "url": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="http-post"></a>
### `http.POST`

HTTP.POST — POST data via HTTP/HTTPS from the device.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `url` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `body` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `body_b64` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `content_type` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `timeout` | `number` | no |  |  |
| `ssl_ca` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "url": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="http-request"></a>
### `http.Request`

HTTP.Request — generic outbound HTTP (method ∈ GET/POST/PUT/HEAD/DELETE).

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `method` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `url` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `body` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `body_b64` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `headers` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `timeout` | `number` | no |  |  |
| `ssl_ca` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "method": "string",
  "url": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="identity-namespace"></a>
## `identity` namespace

<a id="identity-addoidcprovider"></a>
### `identity.AddOidcProvider`

identity.AddOidcProvider — register a generic OIDC IdP at instance scope.

**Permission**: provider-support-only — instance-wide Zitadel admin API

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `issuer` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 2048 |
| `clientId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 256 |
| `clientSecret` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 1024 |
| `scopes` | `array<string>` | no |  | maxItems 32 |
| `autoCreation` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "name": "string",
  "issuer": "string",
  "clientId": "string",
  "clientSecret": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ok` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "ok": false
}
```

<a id="identity-deleteidentityprovider"></a>
### `identity.DeleteIdentityProvider`

Identity.DeleteIdentityProvider — remove an IdP by id.

**Permission**: provider-support-only — instance-wide Zitadel admin API

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ok` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "ok": false
}
```

<a id="identity-getsmtpsettings"></a>
### `identity.GetSmtpSettings`

Identity.GetSmtpSettings — instance-wide Zitadel identity-email SMTP provider, with secrets redacted. Platform/provider-support only; tenant admins manage notification channels instead.

**Permission**: provider-support-only — instance-wide Zitadel admin API

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `enabled` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `configured` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `id` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `state` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `authMode` | `enum("none" \| "plain")` | yes |  |  |
| `host` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `senderAddress` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `senderName` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `tls` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `user` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `replyToAddress` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `description` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `passwordSet` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "enabled": false,
  "configured": false,
  "authMode": "none",
  "host": "string",
  "senderAddress": "string",
  "senderName": "string",
  "tls": false,
  "passwordSet": false
}
```

<a id="identity-rotateactionsigningkeys"></a>
### `identity.RotateActionSigningKeys`

Identity.RotateActionSigningKeys — recreate Action V2 GDPR + grant-removed targets. Old keys move to _PREVIOUS slots; FM keeps both verifying through the replay window.

**Permission**: provider-support-only — instance-wide Zitadel admin API

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `gdprTargetId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `grantTargetId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `rotatedAt` | `string` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "gdprTargetId": "string",
  "grantTargetId": "string"
}
```

Identity.SetScimEnabled — flip Zitadel SCIM endpoint on/off via FM_ZITADEL_SCIM_ENABLED.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

```json
}
```

<a id="identity-setsmtpsettings"></a>
### `identity.SetSmtpSettings`

Identity.SetSmtpSettings — create/update/deactivate the instance-wide Zitadel identity-email SMTP provider for login/reset/verification/invite mail. Platform/provider-support only; not tenant/org-scoped.

**Permission**: provider-support-only — instance-wide Zitadel admin API

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `enabled` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `authMode` | `enum("none" \| "plain")` | yes |  |  |
| `host` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 512 |
| `senderAddress` | `string` | no |  | minLength 3, maxLength 320 |
| `senderName` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 256 |
| `tls` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `user` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 512 |
| `password` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 2048 |
| `replyToAddress` | `string` | no |  | minLength 3, maxLength 320 |
| `description` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 512 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "enabled": false,
  "authMode": "none"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ok` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "ok": false
}
```

<a id="identity-testsmtpsettings"></a>
### `identity.TestSmtpSettings`

Identity.TestSmtpSettings — ask Zitadel to send a test email through draft identity SMTP settings. Platform/provider-support only; the SMTP password must be supplied for plain-auth tests because Zitadel does not expose saved secrets.

**Permission**: provider-support-only — instance-wide Zitadel admin API

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `receiverAddress` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 3, maxLength 320 |
| `authMode` | `enum("none" \| "plain")` | yes |  |  |
| `id` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `host` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 512 |
| `senderAddress` | `string` | no |  | minLength 3, maxLength 320 |
| `senderName` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 256 |
| `tls` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `user` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 512 |
| `password` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 2048 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "receiverAddress": "string",
  "authMode": "none"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ok` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "ok": false
}
```

| Kind | Code | Message |

| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |

| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `types` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

<a id="input-setconfig"></a>
### `input.SetConfig`

Input.SetConfig.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `config` | `object` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "config": {}
}
```

<a id="input-trigger"></a>
### `input.Trigger`

Input.Trigger — synthesize an input event.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `event` | `string` | no |  | Event kind (device-validated). |
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

## `job` namespace

<a id="job-describe"></a>
### `job.Describe`

Return the job namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="job-get"></a>
### `job.Get`

Read one backend-owned operation job by id in the current tenant.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `jobId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `kind` | `enum("certificate" \| "credential" \| "backup" \| "firmware")` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "jobId": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `kind` | `enum("certificate" \| "credential" \| "backup" \| "firmware")` | yes |  |  |
| `status` | `enum("queued" \| "running" \| "done" \| "failed")` | yes |  |  |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `doneCount` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `failCount` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `createdAt` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `startedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `endedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `createdBy` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `metadata` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "kind": "certificate",
  "status": "queued",
  "total": 0,
  "doneCount": 0,
  "failCount": 0,
  "createdAt": "string",
  "startedAt": "string",
  "endedAt": "string",
  "createdBy": "string",
  "metadata": {}
}
```

<a id="job-listactive"></a>
### `job.ListActive`

Restore active backend-owned operation jobs for the current tenant.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `kinds` | `array<enum("certificate" \| "credential" \| "backup" \| "firmware")>` | no |  | minItems 1, maxItems 10 |
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 100 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `items[].kind` | `enum("certificate" \| "credential" \| "backup" \| "firmware")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].status` | `enum("queued" \| "running" \| "done" \| "failed")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].total` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `items[].doneCount` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `items[].failCount` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `items[].createdAt` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `items[].startedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].endedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].createdBy` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].metadata` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `limit` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |
| `offset` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": "string",
      "kind": "certificate",
      "status": "queued",
      "total": 0,
      "doneCount": 0,
      "failCount": 0,
      "createdAt": "string",
      "startedAt": "string",
      "endedAt": "string",
      "createdBy": "string",
      "metadata": {}
    }
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 1,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false
}
```

<a id="kind-namespace"></a>
## `kind` namespace

<a id="kind-create"></a>
### `kind.Create`

Create a custom kind for this org.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `slug` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `category` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 40 |
| `icon` | `string \| null` | no |  | maxLength 64 |
| `appliesTo` | `enum("device" \| "group" \| "both")` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "slug": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "category": "string",
  "appliesTo": "device"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `category` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `icon` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `appliesTo` | `enum("device" \| "group" \| "both")` | yes |  |  |
| `source` | `enum("vendor" \| "custom")` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "category": "string",
  "appliesTo": "device",
  "source": "vendor"
}
```

<a id="kind-delete"></a>
### `kind.Delete`

Delete a custom kind; blocked while devices/groups still reference it.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

<a id="knx-getconfig"></a>
### `knx.GetConfig`

KNX.GetConfig — global KNX config (enable / ia / routing).

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="knx-getstatus"></a>
### `knx.GetStatus`

KNX.GetStatus — global component status (empty per spec).

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="knx-listcomponents"></a>
### `knx.ListComponents`

KNX.ListComponents — paginated list of KNX-bound components.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="knx-setcomponentconfig"></a>
### `knx.SetComponentConfig`

KNX.SetComponentConfig — bind a switch/light/cover/input to KNX group addresses.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `key` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `config` | `object` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "key": "string",
  "config": {}
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `restart_required` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "restart_required": false
}
```

<a id="knx-setconfig"></a>
### `knx.SetConfig`

KNX.SetConfig — global enable / individual address / routing. Pro line only.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `config` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `config.enable` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `config.ia` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `config.routing` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `config.routing.addr` | `string` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "config": {}
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `restart_required` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "restart_required": false
}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="kvs-namespace"></a>
## `kvs` namespace

<a id="kvs-delete"></a>
### `kvs.Delete`

KVS.Delete — remove a key. Optional `etag` for compare-and-delete.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `key` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `etag` | `string` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "key": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="kvs-describe"></a>
### `kvs.Describe`

Return the kvs namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="kvs-get"></a>
### `kvs.Get`

KVS.Get — read value + etag for one key.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `key` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "key": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="kvs-getmany"></a>
### `kvs.GetMany`

KVS.GetMany — paginated value reads. `match` is a glob filter (device-validated).

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `match` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="kvs-list"></a>
### `kvs.List`

KVS.List — paginated key listing without values.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `match` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="kvs-set"></a>
### `kvs.Set`

KVS.Set — write a key. Pass `etag` for compare-and-set; device rejects on mismatch.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `key` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `value` | `any` | yes |  |  |
| `etag` | `string` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "key": "string",
  "value": null
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="ledstrip-namespace"></a>
## `ledstrip` namespace

<a id="ledstrip-addeffect"></a>
### `ledstrip.AddEffect`

LedStrip.AddEffect — enable an effect from the catalog.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `effect` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "effect": {}
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="ledstrip-addscripteffect"></a>
### `ledstrip.AddScriptEffect`

LedStrip.AddScriptEffect — bind a Script component as a custom effect source.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `script_id` | `integer` | yes |  | Id of an existing Script component supplying the effect. — min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "script_id": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="ledstrip-describe"></a>
### `ledstrip.Describe`

Return the ledstrip namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="ledstrip-getconfig"></a>
### `ledstrip.GetConfig`

LedStrip.GetConfig — current strip configuration.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="ledstrip-getstatus"></a>
### `ledstrip.GetStatus`

LedStrip.GetStatus — live on/brightness/rgb/effect/palette.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="ledstrip-listalleffects"></a>
### `ledstrip.ListAllEffects`

LedStrip.ListAllEffects — effect catalog (paginated). Each entry carries a `mods` array advertising which runtime fields apply.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no | `0` | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `effects` | `array<object<any>>` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `total` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "effects": [
    {}
  ]
}
```

<a id="ledstrip-listallpalettes"></a>
### `ledstrip.ListAllPalettes`

LedStrip.ListAllPalettes — palette catalog with color stops.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `palettes` | `array<object<any>>` | yes |  |  |
| `total` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "palettes": [
    {}
  ]
}
```

<a id="ledstrip-listallprotocols"></a>
### `ledstrip.ListAllProtocols`

LedStrip.ListAllProtocols — protocol catalog for this build.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `protocols` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "protocols": [
    "string"
  ]
}
```

<a id="ledstrip-nexteffect"></a>
### `ledstrip.NextEffect`

LedStrip.NextEffect — cycle to the next enabled effect.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="ledstrip-removeeffect"></a>
### `ledstrip.RemoveEffect`

LedStrip.RemoveEffect — disable an effect by key.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `effect` | `string` | yes |  | Effect identifier as exposed by LedStrip.ListAllEffects. — minLength 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "effect": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="ledstrip-removescripteffect"></a>
### `ledstrip.RemoveScriptEffect`

LedStrip.RemoveScriptEffect — unbind a script effect.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `script_id` | `integer` | yes |  | Id of an existing Script component supplying the effect. — min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "script_id": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="ledstrip-set"></a>
### `ledstrip.Set`

LedStrip.Set — update any subset of runtime fields (on, brightness, rgb, effect, palette, speed, intensity).

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="ledstrip-setconfig"></a>
### `ledstrip.SetConfig`

LedStrip.SetConfig — protocol, num_leds, effects allow-list.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `config` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "config": {}
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `restart_required` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "restart_required": false
}
```

| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

## `light` namespace

<a id="light-calibrate"></a>
### `light.Calibrate`

Light.Calibrate.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

<a id="light-describe"></a>
### `light.Describe`

Return the light namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
```
```json
}
```

<a id="light-set"></a>
### `light.Set`

Light.Set — state/brightness/temp/transition.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `on` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `brightness` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `transition` | `number` | no |  |  |
| `temp` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `toggle_after` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

<a id="light-setall"></a>
### `light.SetAll`

Light.SetAll — set output/brightness on ALL Light components at once. At least one of on/brightness required.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `on` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `brightness` | `number` | no |  |  |
| `transition_duration` | `number` | no |  |  |
| `toggle_after` | `number` | no |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  |  |

**Constraint**: must satisfy at least one of [on] or [brightness].

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "on": false
}
```

#### Response

Type: `null`

```json
}
```

<a id="location-namespace"></a>
## `location` namespace

<a id="location-backfillgeo"></a>
### `location.BackfillGeo`

Resolve missing geo coords for legacy locations. Paginated; call repeatedly until remaining=0.

**Permission**: locations / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `batchSize` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 50 |
| `forceRefresh` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `processed` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `updated` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `skipped` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `unresolved` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `remaining` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `errors` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `errors[].locationId` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `errors[].reason` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "processed": 0,
  "updated": 0,
  "skipped": 0,
  "unresolved": 0,
  "remaining": 0,
  "errors": [
    {
      "locationId": 0,
      "reason": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="location-children"></a>
### `location.Children`

Direct children of the given location.

**Permission**: locations / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 1000 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `includeSummary` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `includeEffective` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].organizationId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `items[].name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `items[].kind` | `enum("continent" \| "country" \| "region" \| "county" \| "city" \| "neighborhood" \| "campus" \| "site" \| "building" \| "office" \| "floor" \| "area" \| "room" \| "zone")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].parentLocationId` | `integer \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].sortOrder` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].kindFields` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].customFields` | `object<string \| number \| boolean \| null>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].effective` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].effective.timezone` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].effective.countryCode` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].effective.currency` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].effective.regulatoryZone` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].effective.complianceTags` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].coordinateStatus` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].coordinateStatus.state` | `enum("mapped" \| "address_only" \| "missing_address")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].coordinateStatus.summary` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].counts` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `items[].counts.childLocations` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `items[].counts.childGroups` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `items[].counts.devices` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `items[].counts.entities` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `items[].counts.locations` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `items[].counts.tags` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `items[].counts.descendantDevices` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `items[].counts.descendantEntities` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `items[].counts.groupsReferencingLocation` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "organizationId": "string",
      "name": "string",
      "kind": "continent",
      "parentLocationId": 0,
      "sortOrder": 0,
      "kindFields": {},
      "customFields": {},
      "effective": {
        "timezone": "string",
        "countryCode": "string",
        "currency": "string",
        "regulatoryZone": "string",
        "complianceTags": [
          "string"
        ]
      },
      "coordinateStatus": {
        "state": "mapped",
        "summary": "string"
      },
      "createdAt": "string",
      "updatedAt": "string"
    }
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false
}
```

<a id="location-create"></a>
### `location.Create`

Create a location. kindFields is validated against the per-kind schema returned by Location.ListKinds. Unique sibling-name per parent.

**Permission**: locations / create

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `kind` | `enum("continent" \| "country" \| "region" \| "county" \| "city" \| "neighborhood" \| "campus" \| "site" \| "building" \| "office" \| "floor" \| "area" \| "room" \| "zone")` | yes |  |  |
| `parentLocationId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `sortOrder` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `kindFields` | `object<any>` | no |  |  |
| `customFields` | `object<string \| number \| boolean \| null>` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "name": "string",
  "kind": "continent"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `kind` | `enum("continent" \| "country" \| "region" \| "county" \| "city" \| "neighborhood" \| "campus" \| "site" \| "building" \| "office" \| "floor" \| "area" \| "room" \| "zone")` | yes |  |  |
| `parentLocationId` | `integer \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `sortOrder` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `kindFields` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |
| `customFields` | `object<string \| number \| boolean \| null>` | yes |  |  |
| `effective` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `effective.timezone` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `effective.countryCode` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `effective.currency` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `effective.regulatoryZone` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `effective.complianceTags` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `coordinateStatus` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `coordinateStatus.state` | `enum("mapped" \| "address_only" \| "missing_address")` | yes |  |  |
| `coordinateStatus.summary` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `counts` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `counts.childLocations` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.childGroups` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.devices` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.entities` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.locations` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.tags` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.descendantDevices` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.descendantEntities` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.groupsReferencingLocation` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "organizationId": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "kind": "continent",
  "parentLocationId": 0,
  "sortOrder": 0,
  "kindFields": {},
  "customFields": {},
  "effective": {
    "timezone": "string",
    "countryCode": "string",
    "currency": "string",
    "regulatoryZone": "string",
    "complianceTags": [
      "string"
    ]
  },
  "coordinateStatus": {
    "state": "mapped",
    "summary": "string"
  },
  "createdAt": "string",
  "updatedAt": "string"
}
```

<a id="location-delete"></a>
### `location.Delete`

Delete a location. Blocked if it has children or assignments.

**Permission**: locations / delete

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deleted` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "deleted": false
}
```

<a id="location-describe"></a>
### `location.Describe`

Return the location namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="location-eventreplay"></a>
### `location.EventReplay`

Windowed per-device audit events projected onto location geo. Returns deck.gl TripsLayer-shaped {id, path:[[lng,lat]…], timestamps:[secs…]}. Useful for fleet event playback (online/offline, RPC, alerts) over a map.

**Permission**: locations / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `from` | `string` | yes |  | ISO-8601 inclusive start |
| `to` | `string` | yes |  | ISO-8601 exclusive end |
| `eventTypes` | `array<string>` | no |  | maxItems 16 |
| `maxDevices` | `integer` | no | `200` | min 1, max 1000 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "from": "string",
  "to": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `trips` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `trips[].id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `trips[].path` | `array<array<number>>` | yes |  |  |
| `trips[].timestamps` | `array<number>` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "trips": [
    {
      "id": "string",
      "path": [
        [
          0
        ]
      ],
      "timestamps": [
        0
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

| `expiresAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "uploadTicket": "string",
  "expiresAt": "1970-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
}
```

```json
{}
```
