<a id="location-listkinds"></a>
### `location.ListKinds`

Per-kind field descriptors + option-set snapshots. Frontend renders the Create/Update form from this response.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `kinds` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `kinds[].kind` | `enum("continent" \| "country" \| "region" \| "county" \| "city" \| "neighborhood" \| "campus" \| "site" \| "building" \| "office" \| "floor" \| "area" \| "room" \| "zone")` | yes |  |  |
| `kinds[].label` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `kinds[].allowedParents` | `array<enum("continent" \| "country" \| "region" \| "county" \| "city" \| "neighborhood" \| "campus" \| "site" \| "building" \| "office" \| "floor" \| "area" \| "room" \| "zone")>` | yes |  |  |
| `kinds[].allowRoot` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `kinds[].fields` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `kinds[].fields[].key` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `kinds[].fields[].label` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `kinds[].fields[].description` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `kinds[].fields[].group` | `enum("identity" \| "physical" \| "contact" \| "hours" \| "compliance" \| "operational" \| "environmental" \| "custom")` | yes |  |  |
| `kinds[].fields[].widget` | `enum("text" \| "number" \| "iso" \| "combobox" \| "multiCombobox" \| "address" \| "geo" \| "contact" \| "operatingHours" \| "environmentalSetpoint")` | yes |  |  |
| `kinds[].fields[].optionSet` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `kinds[].fields[].min` | `number` | no |  |  |
| `kinds[].fields[].max` | `number` | no |  |  |
| `kinds[].fields[].pattern` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `kinds[].fields[].unit` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `kinds[].fields[].placeholder` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `kinds[].inheritableFields` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `kinds[].sortRank` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `optionSets` | `object<object>` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "kinds": [
    {
      "kind": "continent",
      "label": "string",
      "allowedParents": [
        "continent"
      ],
      "allowRoot": false,
      "fields": [
        {
          "key": "string",
          "label": "string",
          "description": "string",
          "group": "identity",
          "widget": "text"
        }
      ],
      "inheritableFields": [
        "string"
      ],
      "sortRank": 0
    }
  ],
  "optionSets": {}
}
```

| `regions[].countryCode` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `regions[].name` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `regions[].lat` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `regions[].lng` | `number` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "regions": [
    {
      "code": "string",
      "countryCode": "string",
      "name": "string",
      "lat": 0,
      "lng": 0
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="location-path"></a>
### `location.Path`

Breadcrumb from root to the given location.

**Permission**: locations / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].name` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].kind` | `enum("continent" \| "country" \| "region" \| "county" \| "city" \| "neighborhood" \| "campus" \| "site" \| "building" \| "office" \| "floor" \| "area" \| "room" \| "zone")` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "name": "string",
      "kind": "continent"
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="location-removeassignment"></a>
### `location.RemoveAssignment`

Remove the primary location assignment for a device/entity. removed=false if no assignment existed.

**Permission**: locations / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `subjectType` | `enum("device" \| "entity" \| "group")` | yes |  |  |
| `subjectId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "subjectType": "device",
  "subjectId": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `removed` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `assignment` | `any` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "removed": false
}
```

<a id="location-searchplaces"></a>
### `location.SearchPlaces`

Typeahead place lookup over GeoNames (countries, admin, cities) with Nominatim fallback.

**Permission**: locations / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `query` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 200 |
| `biasCountryCode` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 25 |
| `precision` | `enum("place" \| "street")` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "query": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `candidates` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `candidates[].kind` | `enum("country" \| "admin" \| "city" \| "street")` | yes |  |  |
| `candidates[].geonameid` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `candidates[].name` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `candidates[].asciiname` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `candidates[].countryCode` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `candidates[].countryName` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `candidates[].adminCode` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `candidates[].adminName` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `candidates[].city` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `candidates[].streetName` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `candidates[].houseNumber` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `candidates[].postalCode` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `candidates[].lat` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `candidates[].lng` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `candidates[].timezone` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `candidates[].weight` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `candidates[].score` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `source` | `enum("local" \| "cache" \| "nominatim" \| "local-weak")` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "candidates": [
    {
      "kind": "country",
      "name": "string",
      "countryCode": "string",
      "lat": 0,
      "lng": 0,
      "weight": 0,
      "score": 0
    }
  ],
  "source": "local"
}
```

<a id="location-setassignment"></a>
### `location.SetAssignment`

Upsert primary location assignment for a device/entity.

**Permission**: locations / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `subjectType` | `enum("device" \| "entity" \| "group")` | yes |  |  |
| `subjectId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `locationId` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "subjectType": "device",
  "subjectId": "string",
  "locationId": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `subjectType` | `enum("device" \| "entity" \| "group")` | yes |  |  |
| `subjectId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `locationId` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "organizationId": "string",
  "subjectType": "device",
  "subjectId": "string",
  "locationId": 0,
  "createdAt": "string",
  "updatedAt": "string"
}
```

<a id="location-signalheatmap"></a>
### `location.SignalHeatmap`

Live device RSSI projected onto location geo as {lat,lng,weight} heatmap points. Weight is 0..1 (RSSI normalised from -100..-30 dBm). Only devices assigned to a geo-equipped location are included.

**Permission**: locations / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `points` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `points[].lat` | `number` | yes |  | min -90, max 90 |
| `points[].lng` | `number` | yes |  | min -180, max 180 |
| `points[].weight` | `number` | yes |  | min 0, max 1 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "points": [
    {
      "lat": -90,
      "lng": -180,
      "weight": 0
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="location-update"></a>
### `location.Update`

Partial-update a location. Cycle-safe parent changes. kindFields replaces the stored object.

**Permission**: locations / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `parentLocationId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `sortOrder` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `kindFields` | `object<any>` | no |  |  |
| `customFields` | `object<string \| number \| boolean \| null>` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `kind` | `enum("continent" \| "country" \| "region" \| "county" \| "city" \| "neighborhood" \| "campus" \| "site" \| "building" \| "office" \| "floor" \| "area" \| "room" \| "zone")` | yes |  |  |
| `parentLocationId` | `integer \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `sortOrder` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `kindFields` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |
| `customFields` | `object<string \| number \| boolean \| null>` | yes |  |  |
| `effective` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `effective.timezone` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `effective.countryCode` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `effective.currency` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `effective.regulatoryZone` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `effective.complianceTags` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `coordinateStatus` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `coordinateStatus.state` | `enum("mapped" \| "address_only" \| "missing_address")` | yes |  |  |
| `coordinateStatus.summary` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `counts` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `counts.childLocations` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.childGroups` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.devices` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.entities` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.locations` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.tags` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.descendantDevices` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.descendantEntities` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `counts.groupsReferencingLocation` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "organizationId": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "kind": "continent",
  "parentLocationId": 0,
  "sortOrder": 0,
  "kindFields": {},
  "customFields": {},
  "effective": {
    "timezone": "string",
    "countryCode": "string",
    "currency": "string",
    "regulatoryZone": "string",
    "complianceTags": [
      "string"
    ]
  },
  "coordinateStatus": {
    "state": "mapped",
    "summary": "string"
  },
  "createdAt": "string",
  "updatedAt": "string"
}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="login_text-namespace"></a>
## `login_text` namespace

<a id="login-text-describe"></a>
### `login_text.Describe`

Return the login_text namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="login-text-getdefault"></a>
### `login_text.GetDefault`

login_text.GetDefault — Zitadel factory-default UI strings.

**Permission**: admin-only — proxies Zitadel /text/login/<lang>

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `language` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "language": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="login-text-gettext"></a>
### `login_text.GetText`

login_text.GetText — current login UI strings per language.

**Permission**: admin-only — proxies Zitadel /text/login/<lang>

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `orgId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `language` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "orgId": "string",
  "language": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="login-text-reset"></a>
### `login_text.Reset`

login_text.Reset — drop org login-text overrides for a language.

**Permission**: admin-only — proxies Zitadel /text/login/<lang>

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `orgId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `language` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "orgId": "string",
  "language": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ok` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "ok": false
}
```

<a id="login-text-settext"></a>
### `login_text.SetText`

login_text.SetText — override login UI strings (any of ~30 screen blocks).

**Permission**: admin-only — proxies Zitadel /text/login/<lang>

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `orgId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `language` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `text` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "orgId": "string",
  "language": "string",
  "text": {}
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ok` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "ok": false
}
```

### `mail.Describe`

Return the mail namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

```json
  "methods": {}
```

<a id="mail-send"></a>
### `mail.Send`

Send an email via the configured SMTP transport.

**Permission**: provider-support-only — uses instance-wide SMTP identity

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `from` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `to` | `any` | yes |  |  |
| `cc` | `any` | no |  |  |
| `bcc` | `any` | no |  |  |
| `subject` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `text` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `html` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "to": null
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

Return the matter namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

```json
  "methods": {}
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

```json
{}
```

```json
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}

```

<a id="mbrtuclient-getconfig"></a>
### `mbrtuclient.GetConfig`

MbRtuClient.GetConfig.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

<a id="mbrtuclient-getstatus"></a>
### `mbrtuclient.GetStatus`

MbRtuClient.GetStatus.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="mbrtuclient-readcoils"></a>
### `mbrtuclient.ReadCoils`

Read coils (FC 0x01). Single-bit read/write flags.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `sid` | `integer` | yes |  | Modbus slave address on the bus (1-247). — min 1, max 247 |
| `addr` | `integer` | yes |  | Register or coil offset (0-65535). — min 0, max 65535 |
| `qty` | `integer` | yes | `1` | Number of bits to read (1-2000). — min 1, max 2000 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "sid": 1,
  "addr": 0,
  "qty": 1
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="mbrtuclient-readdiscreteinputs"></a>
### `mbrtuclient.ReadDiscreteInputs`

Read discrete inputs (FC 0x02). Single-bit read-only flags.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `sid` | `integer` | yes |  | Modbus slave address on the bus (1-247). — min 1, max 247 |
| `addr` | `integer` | yes |  | Register or coil offset (0-65535). — min 0, max 65535 |
| `qty` | `integer` | yes | `1` | Number of bits to read (1-2000). — min 1, max 2000 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "sid": 1,
  "addr": 0,
  "qty": 1
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="mbrtuclient-readholdingregisters"></a>
### `mbrtuclient.ReadHoldingRegisters`

Read holding registers (FC 0x03). 16-bit values from slave memory.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `sid` | `integer` | yes |  | Modbus slave address on the bus (1-247). — min 1, max 247 |
| `addr` | `integer` | yes |  | Register or coil offset (0-65535). — min 0, max 65535 |
| `qty` | `integer` | yes | `1` | Number of 16-bit registers to read (1-123). — min 1, max 123 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "sid": 1,
  "addr": 0,
  "qty": 1
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="mbrtuclient-readinputregisters"></a>
### `mbrtuclient.ReadInputRegisters`

Read input registers (FC 0x04). 16-bit read-only values from slave.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `sid` | `integer` | yes |  | Modbus slave address on the bus (1-247). — min 1, max 247 |
| `addr` | `integer` | yes |  | Register or coil offset (0-65535). — min 0, max 65535 |
| `qty` | `integer` | yes | `1` | Number of 16-bit registers to read (1-123). — min 1, max 123 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "sid": 1,
  "addr": 0,
  "qty": 1
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="mbrtuclient-setconfig"></a>
### `mbrtuclient.SetConfig`

MbRtuClient.SetConfig — Modbus RTU client config (currently no fields per spec).

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `config` | `object` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "config": {}
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `restart_required` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "restart_required": false
}
```

<a id="mbrtuclient-writecoils"></a>
### `mbrtuclient.WriteCoils`

Write multiple coils (FC 0x0F).

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `sid` | `integer` | yes |  | Modbus slave address on the bus (1-247). — min 1, max 247 |
| `addr` | `integer` | yes |  | Register or coil offset (0-65535). — min 0, max 65535 |
| `values` | `array<boolean>` | yes |  | 1-2000 booleans. — minItems 1, maxItems 2000 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "sid": 1,
  "addr": 0,
  "values": [
    false
  ]
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="mbrtuclient-writeholdingregisters"></a>
### `mbrtuclient.WriteHoldingRegisters`

Write multiple holding registers (FC 0x10).

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `sid` | `integer` | yes |  | Modbus slave address on the bus (1-247). — min 1, max 247 |
| `addr` | `integer` | yes |  | Register or coil offset (0-65535). — min 0, max 65535 |
| `values` | `array<integer>` | yes |  | 1-123 16-bit unsigned integers. — minItems 1, maxItems 123 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "sid": 1,
  "addr": 0,
  "values": [
    0
  ]
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="mbrtuclient-writesingleregister"></a>
### `mbrtuclient.WriteSingleRegister`

Write a single holding register (FC 0x06).

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `sid` | `integer` | yes |  | Modbus slave address on the bus (1-247). — min 1, max 247 |
| `addr` | `integer` | yes |  | Register or coil offset (0-65535). — min 0, max 65535 |
| `value` | `integer` | yes |  | Single 16-bit unsigned integer. — min 0, max 65535 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "sid": 1,
  "addr": 0,
  "value": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

```json
{}
```

<a id="mdns-getstatus"></a>
### `mdns.GetStatus`

Returns whether the mDNS responder is currently running.

**Permission**: authenticated; viewer-visible

#### Params

Type: `object`

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `running` | `boolean` | yes |  | mDNS responder is active. |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "running": false
}
```

<a id="mdns-setconfig"></a>
### `mdns.SetConfig`

Enable or disable the mDNS responder. Persists across restarts.

**Permission**: system / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `config` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `config.enable` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "config": {}
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

## `message_text` namespace

<a id="message-text-describe"></a>
### `message_text.Describe`

Return the message_text namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="message-text-getdefault"></a>
### `message_text.GetDefault`

message_text.GetDefault — Zitadel factory-default text.

**Permission**: admin-only — proxies Zitadel /text/message/*

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `type` | `enum("init" \| "password_reset" \| "verify_email" \| "verify_phone" \| "verify_sms_otp" \| "verify_email_otp" \| "domain_claimed" \| "passwordless_registration" \| "password_change" \| "invite_user")` | yes |  |  |
| `language` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "type": "init",
  "language": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="message-text-gettext"></a>
### `message_text.GetText`

message_text.GetText — read message text for type+language.

**Permission**: admin-only — proxies Zitadel /text/message/*

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `orgId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `type` | `enum("init" \| "password_reset" \| "verify_email" \| "verify_phone" \| "verify_sms_otp" \| "verify_email_otp" \| "domain_claimed" \| "passwordless_registration" \| "password_change" \| "invite_user")` | yes |  |  |
| `language` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "orgId": "string",
  "type": "init",
  "language": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="message-text-reset"></a>
### `message_text.Reset`

message_text.Reset — drop org override; instance default applies.

**Permission**: admin-only — proxies Zitadel /text/message/*

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `orgId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `type` | `enum("init" \| "password_reset" \| "verify_email" \| "verify_phone" \| "verify_sms_otp" \| "verify_email_otp" \| "domain_claimed" \| "passwordless_registration" \| "password_change" \| "invite_user")` | yes |  |  |
| `language` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "orgId": "string",
  "type": "init",
  "language": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ok` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "ok": false
}
```

<a id="message-text-settext"></a>
### `message_text.SetText`

message_text.SetText — override message text for type+language.

**Permission**: admin-only — proxies Zitadel /text/message/*

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `orgId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `type` | `enum("init" \| "password_reset" \| "verify_email" \| "verify_phone" \| "verify_sms_otp" \| "verify_email_otp" \| "domain_claimed" \| "passwordless_registration" \| "password_change" \| "invite_user")` | yes |  |  |
| `language` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `title` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 200 |
| `preHeader` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 200 |
| `subject` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 200 |
| `greeting` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 200 |
| `text` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 4000 |
| `buttonText` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 100 |
| `footerText` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 500 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "orgId": "string",
  "type": "init",
  "language": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ok` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "ok": false
}
```

Component metadata.

**Permission**: public

<a id="mobile-getbootstrap"></a>
### `mobile.GetBootstrap`

Composite endpoint for mobile app launch — returns slim device list, waiting-room count, alert counts, and identity in one round trip. Sections the caller cannot read are returned with visible=false.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deviceLimit` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 500 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="mobile-syncdelta"></a>
### `mobile.SyncDelta`

Returns devices changed since the given timestamp + current waiting-room count. For mobile resume / incremental refresh.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `since` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "since": "1970-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |


---

<a id="notification-namespace"></a>
## `notification` namespace

<a id="notification-bundle-applyimport"></a>
### `notification.Bundle.ApplyImport`

Apply safe notification bundle resources. Routing policies and on-call schedules are written; secret-bearing channels are skipped until secret mapping is supplied.

**Permission**: notifications / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `bundle` | `object<any>` | yes |  | ≤ 524288 B JSON |
| `channelMappings` | `object<integer>` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "bundle": {}
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `dryRun` | `const(false)` | yes |  |  |
| `bundle` | `object<any>` | yes |  | ≤ 524288 B JSON |
| `operations` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `operations[].resourceType` | `enum("routing_policy" \| "on_call_schedule" \| "channel")` | yes |  |  |
| `operations[].key` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `operations[].action` | `enum("create" \| "update" \| "unsupported")` | yes |  |  |
| `operations[].message` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `operations[].conflicts` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `operations[].conflicts[].path` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `operations[].conflicts[].message` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `operations[].requiresSecretMapping` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `operations[].mappingKeys` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `applied` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `applied[].resourceType` | `enum("routing_policy" \| "on_call_schedule" \| "channel")` | yes |  |  |
| `applied[].key` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `applied[].action` | `enum("create" \| "update" \| "unsupported")` | yes |  |  |
| `applied[].message` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `applied[].conflicts` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `applied[].conflicts[].path` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `applied[].conflicts[].message` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `applied[].requiresSecretMapping` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `applied[].mappingKeys` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `skipped` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `skipped[].resourceType` | `enum("routing_policy" \| "on_call_schedule" \| "channel")` | yes |  |  |
| `skipped[].key` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `skipped[].action` | `enum("create" \| "update" \| "unsupported")` | yes |  |  |
| `skipped[].message` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `skipped[].conflicts` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `skipped[].conflicts[].path` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `skipped[].conflicts[].message` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `skipped[].requiresSecretMapping` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `skipped[].mappingKeys` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `warnings` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `warnings[].path` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `warnings[].message` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `conflicts` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `conflicts[].path` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `conflicts[].message` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "dryRun": false,
  "bundle": {},
  "operations": [
    {
      "resourceType": "routing_policy",
      "key": "string",
      "action": "create",
      "message": "string",
      "conflicts": [
        {
          "path": "string",
          "message": "string"
        }
      ],
      "requiresSecretMapping": false,
      "mappingKeys": [
        "string"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "applied": [
    {
      "resourceType": "routing_policy",
      "key": "string",
      "action": "create",
      "message": "string",
      "conflicts": [
        {
          "path": "string",
          "message": "string"
        }
      ],
      "requiresSecretMapping": false,
      "mappingKeys": [
        "string"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "skipped": [
    {
      "resourceType": "routing_policy",
      "key": "string",
      "action": "create",
      "message": "string",
      "conflicts": [
        {
          "path": "string",
          "message": "string"
        }
      ],
      "requiresSecretMapping": false,
      "mappingKeys": [
        "string"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "warnings": [
    {
      "path": "string",
      "message": "string"
    }
  ],
  "conflicts": [
    {
      "path": "string",
      "message": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="notification-bundle-export"></a>
### `notification.Bundle.Export`

Export the native FM notification bundle for the caller org. Secrets are never exported.

**Permission**: notifications / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `dryRun` | `const(true)` | yes |  |  |
| `bundle` | `object<any>` | yes |  | ≤ 524288 B JSON |
| `warnings` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `warnings[].path` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `warnings[].message` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "dryRun": true,
  "bundle": {},
  "warnings": [
    {
      "path": "string",
      "message": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

```json
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

| `bundle` | `object<any>` | yes |  | ≤ 524288 B JSON |
| `operations` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `operations[].resourceType` | `enum("routing_policy" \| "on_call_schedule" \| "channel")` | yes |  |  |
| `operations[].key` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `operations[].action` | `enum("create" \| "update" \| "unsupported")` | yes |  |  |
| `operations[].message` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `operations[].conflicts` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `operations[].conflicts[].path` | `string` | yes |  |  |

| `warnings[].path` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `warnings[].message` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `conflicts` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `conflicts[].path` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `conflicts[].message` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
  "bundle": {},

    {
      "resourceType": "routing_policy",
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

```json
{}
```

| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="notification-destination-addmembers"></a>
### `notification.Destination.AddMembers`

Add members to a destination group. Idempotent on duplicates.

**Permission**: notifications / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `members` | `array<object>` | yes |  | minItems 1, maxItems 500 |
| `members[].memberType` | `enum("user" \| "channel" \| "push_token")` | yes |  |  |
| `members[].memberId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "members": [
    {
      "memberType": "user",
      "memberId": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `added` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `added[].memberType` | `enum("user" \| "channel" \| "push_token")` | yes |  |  |
| `added[].memberId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "added": [
    {
      "memberType": "user",
      "memberId": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="notification-destination-create"></a>
### `notification.Destination.Create`

Create a destination group.

**Permission**: notifications / create

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `description` | `string \| null` | no |  | maxLength 500 |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "name": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `description` | `string \| null` | yes |  | maxLength 500 |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `counts` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `counts.members` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `counts.rulesReferencing` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "organizationId": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "enabled": false,
  "createdAt": "string",
  "updatedAt": "string",
  "counts": {
    "members": 0,
    "rulesReferencing": 0
  }
}
```

### `notification.Destination.Delete`

Delete a destination group. Rejected while any alert rule still references it.

| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

```json
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deleted` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "deleted": false,
  "id": 0
```
```json
}
```

<a id="notification-destination-getmodel"></a>
### `notification.Destination.GetModel`

Static capability descriptor for the destination-group editor. Phase-1 lock — no nested groups, teams, or escalation.

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `version` | `const(1)` | yes |  |  |
| `memberTypes` | `array<enum("user" \| "channel" \| "push_token")>` | yes |  |  |
| `capabilities` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `capabilities.nestedGroups` | `const(false)` | yes |  |  |
| `capabilities.teamMembers` | `const(false)` | yes |  |  |
| `capabilities.escalationLevels` | `const(false)` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "version": 1,
  "memberTypes": [
    "user"
  ],
  "capabilities": {
    "nestedGroups": false,
    "teamMembers": false,
    "escalationLevels": false
  }
}
```

<a id="notification-destination-list"></a>
### `notification.Destination.List`

List destination groups in the caller org.

**Permission**: notifications / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `query` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `limit` | `integer` | no | `200` | min 1, max 1000 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no | `0` | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].organizationId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `items[].name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `items[].description` | `string \| null` | yes |  | maxLength 500 |
| `items[].enabled` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].counts` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].counts.members` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `items[].counts.rulesReferencing` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "organizationId": "string",
      "name": "string",
      "description": "string",
      "enabled": false,
      "createdAt": "string",
      "updatedAt": "string",
      "counts": {
        "members": 0,
        "rulesReferencing": 0
      }
    }
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

| `total` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

```json
}
```

| `htmlTemplate` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 32000 |

| `attachments[].url` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 2048 |
| `attachments[].assetId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |

| `attachments[].contentType` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

| `htmlTemplate` | `string \| null` | yes |  | maxLength 32000 |
| `textTemplate` | `string \| null` | yes |  | maxLength 8000 |

| `attachments[].filename` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `attachments[].url` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 2048 |
| `attachments[].assetId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `attachments[].cid` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `attachments[].contentType` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |

<a id="notification-history-get"></a>
### `notification.History.Get`

Fetch one delivery job with its attempt history (newest first).

**Permission**: notifications / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `job` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `job.id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `job.organizationId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `job.alertId` | `integer \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `job.inboxItemId` | `integer \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `job.channelId` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `job.state` | `enum("queued" \| "processing" \| "succeeded" \| "failed" \| "superseded" \| "dead_letter")` | yes |  |  |
| `job.createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `job.completedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `job.attemptCount` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `attempts` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `attempts[].id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `attempts[].jobId` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `attempts[].channelId` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `attempts[].state` | `enum("succeeded" \| "failed")` | yes |  |  |
| `attempts[].attemptedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `attempts[].httpStatus` | `integer \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `attempts[].providerCode` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `attempts[].errorMessage` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "job": {
    "id": 0,
    "organizationId": "string",
    "alertId": 0,
    "inboxItemId": 0,
    "channelId": 0,
    "state": "queued",
    "createdAt": "string",
    "completedAt": "string",
    "attemptCount": 0
  },
  "attempts": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "jobId": 0,
      "channelId": 0,
      "state": "succeeded",
      "attemptedAt": "string",
      "httpStatus": 0,
      "providerCode": "string",

    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="notification-history-list"></a>
### `notification.History.List`

List delivery jobs. Filter by channel, state, provider, alert, and time window.

**Permission**: notifications / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `channelId` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `state` | `enum("queued" \| "processing" \| "succeeded" \| "failed" \| "superseded" \| "dead_letter")` | no |  |  |
| `provider` | `enum("email_smtp" \| "generic_webhook" \| "slack_webhook" \| "teams_workflow_webhook" \| "telegram_bot" \| "push_fcm" \| "sms_twilio" \| "voice_twilio" \| "webhook_signed")` | no |  |  |
| `alertId` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `from` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `to` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | no | `200` | min 1, max 1000 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no | `0` | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].organizationId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `items[].alertId` | `integer \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].inboxItemId` | `integer \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].channelId` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].state` | `enum("queued" \| "processing" \| "succeeded" \| "failed" \| "superseded" \| "dead_letter")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].completedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].attemptCount` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "organizationId": "string",
      "alertId": 0,
      "inboxItemId": 0,
      "channelId": 0,
      "state": "queued",
      "createdAt": "string",
      "completedAt": "string",
      "attemptCount": 0
    }
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false
}
```

<a id="notification-history-requeue"></a>
### `notification.History.Requeue`

Re-enqueue a terminally-failed delivery job. Rejected unless state=failed/dead_letter and the backing alert still exists.

**Permission**: notifications / update

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

```json
{
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `alertId` | `integer \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `inboxItemId` | `integer \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `channelId` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `state` | `enum("queued" \| "processing" \| "succeeded" \| "failed" \| "superseded" \| "dead_letter")` | yes |  |  |
| `createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `completedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `attemptCount` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "organizationId": "string",
  "alertId": 0,
  "inboxItemId": 0,
  "channelId": 0,
  "state": "queued",
  "createdAt": "string",
  "completedAt": "string",
  "attemptCount": 0
}
```

```json
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `userId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `kind` | `enum("alert_created" \| "alert_updated" \| "alert_resolved" \| "alert_digest")` | yes |  |  |
| `state` | `enum("unread" \| "read")` | yes |  |  |

```json
  "source": null,
  "title": "string",
  "message": "string",
  "createdAt": "string",
  "readAt": "string",
  "availableActions": [
    "mark_read"
  ]
}
```

<a id="notification-oauth-start"></a>
### `notification.OAuth.Start`

Begin in-app OAuth2 consent for an email_smtp endpoint. Returns an authUrl the UI opens in a popup; the provider redirects to /api/oauth/callback/email which stores the refresh token on the endpoint.

**Permission**: notifications / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `channelId` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |
| `provider` | `enum("oauth2_google" \| "oauth2_microsoft")` | yes |  |  |
| `tenant` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "channelId": 1,
  "provider": "oauth2_google"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `authUrl` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `state` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `expiresAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "authUrl": "string",
  "state": "string",
  "expiresAt": "string"
}
```

| `digestPreference` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "userId": "string",
  "channelType": "email_smtp",
  "severityFilters": [
    "info"
  ],
  "quietHours": {},
  "digestPreference": {},
  "disabled": false,
  "createdAt": "string",
  "updatedAt": "string"
}
```

<a id="notification-renderemailpreview"></a>
### `notification.RenderEmailPreview`

Render the full email body (html + text) for an email channel. Uses the configured htmlTemplate/textTemplate overrides if given, otherwise the branded default. The html is safe to iframe.

**Permission**: notifications / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `channelId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `emailTemplateId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `subjectTemplate` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 998 |
| `htmlTemplate` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 32000 |
| `textTemplate` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 8000 |
| `attachments` | `array<object>` | no |  |  |
| `attachments[].filename` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `attachments[].url` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 2048 |
| `attachments[].assetId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `attachments[].cid` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `attachments[].contentType` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `sampleAlertId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `ruleKind` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `ruleName` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `subject` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `html` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `text` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `missingTokens` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `truncated` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `attachments` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `attachments[].filename` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `attachments[].url` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `attachments[].cid` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `attachments[].contentType` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `attachments[].reachable` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `attachments[].error` | `string` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "subject": "string",
  "html": "string",
  "text": "string",
  "missingTokens": [
    "string"
  ],
  "truncated": false,
  "attachments": [
    {
      "filename": "string",
      "url": "string",
      "reachable": false
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="notification-rendertemplate"></a>
### `notification.RenderTemplate`

Render a notification template against a real alert (sampleAlertId) or a synthesized sample for a rule kind. Uses the same renderer as delivery.

**Permission**: notifications / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `template` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 8000 |
| `sampleAlertId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `ruleKind` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `ruleName` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "template": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `rendered` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `missingTokens` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `truncated` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `tokens` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `tokens[].token` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `tokens[].label` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `tokens[].description` | `string` | yes |  | maxLength 500 |
| `tokens[].example` | `string` | yes |  | maxLength 500 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "rendered": "string",
  "missingTokens": [
    "string"
  ],
  "truncated": false,
  "tokens": [
    {
      "token": "string",
      "label": "string",
      "description": "string",
      "example": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="notification-routing-delete"></a>
### `notification.Routing.Delete`

Delete one notification routing policy.

**Permission**: notifications / delete

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `policyId` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "policyId": 1
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deleted` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "deleted": false
}
```

<a id="notification-routing-evaluate"></a>
### `notification.Routing.Evaluate`

Dry-run routing policies against alert labels, severity, and optional resource.

**Permission**: notifications / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `severity` | `enum("info" \| "warning" \| "critical")` | yes |  |  |
| `labels` | `object<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `resource` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `resource.type` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `resource.id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "severity": "info",
  "labels": {}
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `matches` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `matches[].policyId` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |
| `matches[].name` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `matches[].contactPoints` | `array<object<any>>` | yes |  |  |
| `matches[].groupingKeys` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `matches[].escalationStages` | `array<object<any>>` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "matches": [
    {
      "policyId": 1,
      "name": "string",
      "contactPoints": [
        {}
      ],
      "groupingKeys": [
        "string"
      ],
      "escalationStages": [
        {}
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

```json
        {}
      ],
      "runtimeSilences": [
        {}
      ],

        {}
      ],
      "escalationStages": [

      ],

    }
  ]
```

<a id="notification-subscribe"></a>
### `notification.Subscribe`

Register a push-notification token for the caller. Idempotent per (token, user_id).

**Permission**: authenticated — token is bound to the caller's user id at insert time

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `token` | `string` | yes |  | Device push token (FCM / APNs / web push) — minLength 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "token": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `token` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `userId` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "token": "string",
  "userId": "string"
}
```

<a id="notification-template-create"></a>
### `notification.Template.Create`

Create a message template (per-channel bodies + required fallback text). Slack/Teams bodies must be valid JSON. Preview a body with Notification.RenderTemplate.

**Permission**: notifications / create

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `description` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `bodies` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `bodies.email` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `bodies.email.subject` | `string` | yes |  | maxLength 998 |
| `bodies.email.html` | `string` | yes |  | maxLength 32000 |
| `bodies.email.text` | `string` | yes |  | maxLength 16000 |
| `bodies.slack` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `bodies.slack.blocks` | `string` | yes |  | maxLength 16000 |
| `bodies.teams` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `bodies.teams.card` | `string` | yes |  | maxLength 16000 |
| `fallbackText` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 16000 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "name": "string",
  "fallbackText": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `description` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `bodies` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `bodies.email` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `bodies.email.subject` | `string` | yes |  | maxLength 998 |
| `bodies.email.html` | `string` | yes |  | maxLength 32000 |
| `bodies.email.text` | `string` | yes |  | maxLength 16000 |
| `bodies.slack` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `bodies.slack.blocks` | `string` | yes |  | maxLength 16000 |
| `bodies.teams` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `bodies.teams.card` | `string` | yes |  | maxLength 16000 |
| `fallbackText` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 16000 |
| `createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "organizationId": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "bodies": {},
  "fallbackText": "string",
  "createdAt": "string",
  "updatedAt": "string"
}
```

```json
  "fallbackText": "string",

  "updatedAt": "string"
}
```

```json
{}
```

```json
  "methods": {}
}
```
