### `organization.GetDefaults`

Return the caller organization's default timezone + locale.

**Permission**: authenticated — scoped to caller organization

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

```json
  "localeDefault": "string"
}
```

<a id="organization-getprofile"></a>
### `organization.GetProfile`

Return the caller's organization profile.

**Permission**: authenticated — scoped to caller organization

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `displayName` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `timezoneDefault` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `localeDefault` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `currencyDefault` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `unitSystemDefault` | `enum("metric" \| "imperial" \| null)` | yes |  |  |
| `metadata` | `object<any>` | yes |  | ≤ 65536 B JSON |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "displayName": "string",
  "timezoneDefault": "string",
  "localeDefault": "string",
  "currencyDefault": "string",
  "unitSystemDefault": "metric",
  "metadata": {}
}
```

<a id="organization-getscopemodel"></a>
### `organization.GetScopeModel`

Single source of truth for frontend form construction — location kinds, group types, membership modes, subject-type enums, phase-1 capabilities, and legacy-transition flags.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `version` | `enum(1)` | yes |  |  |
| `locationKinds` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `locationKinds[].key` | `enum("continent" \| "country" \| "region" \| "county" \| "city" \| "neighborhood" \| "campus" \| "site" \| "building" \| "office" \| "floor" \| "area" \| "room" \| "zone")` | yes |  |  |
| `locationKinds[].label` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `locationKinds[].sortRank` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `locationKinds[].allowRoot` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `groupTypes` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `groupTypes[].key` | `enum("standard" \| "operational" \| "critical" \| "custom")` | yes |  |  |
| `groupTypes[].label` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `groupTypes[].severityFloorDefault` | `enum("info" \| "warning" \| "critical" \| null)` | yes |  |  |
| `groupTypes[].retentionDaysDefault` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 1 |
| `groupTypes[].auditRetentionDaysDefault` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 1 |
| `membershipModes` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `membershipModes[].key` | `enum("manual")` | yes |  |  |
| `membershipModes[].label` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `membershipModes[].enabled` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `groupMemberTypes` | `array<enum("device" \| "entity" \| "location")>` | yes |  |  |
| `tagAssignmentTypes` | `array<enum("location" \| "group" \| "device" \| "entity" \| "alert_rule" \| "destination_group" \| "channel" \| "script")>` | yes |  |  |
| `locationAssignmentTypes` | `array<enum("device" \| "entity" \| "group")>` | yes |  |  |
| `capabilities` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `capabilities.customLocationKinds` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `capabilities.dynamicGroups` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `capabilities.nestedGroups` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `capabilities.entityLocationOverride` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `legacyTransition` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `legacyTransition.canonicalPhysicalScope` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `legacyTransition.canonicalDashboardLocationParam` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `legacyTransition.deprecatedDashboardLocationParams` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `legacyTransition.rootGroupImportMode` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "version": 1,
  "locationKinds": [
    {
      "key": "continent",
      "label": "string",
      "sortRank": 0,
      "allowRoot": false
    }
  ],
  "groupTypes": [
    {
      "key": "standard",
      "label": "string",
      "severityFloorDefault": "info",
      "retentionDaysDefault": 1,
      "auditRetentionDaysDefault": 1
    }
  ],
  "membershipModes": [
    {
      "key": "manual",
      "label": "string",
      "enabled": false
    }
  ],
  "groupMemberTypes": [
    "device"
  ],
  "tagAssignmentTypes": [
    "location"
  ],
  "locationAssignmentTypes": [
    "device"
  ],
  "capabilities": {
    "customLocationKinds": false,
    "dynamicGroups": false,
    "nestedGroups": false,
    "entityLocationOverride": false
  },
  "legacyTransition": {
    "canonicalPhysicalScope": "string",
    "canonicalDashboardLocationParam": "string",
    "deprecatedDashboardLocationParams": [
      "string"
    ],
    "rootGroupImportMode": "string"
  }
}
```

<a id="organization-setprofile"></a>
### `organization.SetProfile`

Partial-update the caller organization profile. Null field = clear.

**Permission**: organizations / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `patch` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `patch.displayName` | `string \| null` | no |  | maxLength 300 |
| `patch.timezoneDefault` | `string \| null` | no |  | maxLength 120 |
| `patch.localeDefault` | `string \| null` | no |  | maxLength 32 |
| `patch.currencyDefault` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `patch.unitSystemDefault` | `enum("metric" \| "imperial" \| null)` | no |  |  |
| `patch.metadata` | `object<any>` | no |  | ≤ 65536 B JSON |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "patch": {}
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `displayName` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `timezoneDefault` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `localeDefault` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `currencyDefault` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `unitSystemDefault` | `enum("metric" \| "imperial" \| null)` | yes |  |  |
| `metadata` | `object<any>` | yes |  | ≤ 65536 B JSON |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "displayName": "string",
  "timezoneDefault": "string",
  "localeDefault": "string",
  "currencyDefault": "string",
  "unitSystemDefault": "metric",
  "metadata": {}
}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="ota-namespace"></a>
## `ota` namespace

<a id="ota-abort"></a>
### `ota.Abort`

OTA.Abort — cancel an active chunked upload.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `null`

<a id="ota-commit"></a>
### `ota.Commit`

OTA.Commit — finalize the chunked upload and reboot.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="ota-data"></a>
### `ota.Data`

OTA.Data — append the next sequential base64 chunk.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `data` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "data": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="ota-describe"></a>
### `ota.Describe`

Return the ota namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="ota-revert"></a>
### `ota.Revert`

OTA.Revert — roll back to the previous firmware image.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="ota-start"></a>
### `ota.Start`

OTA.Start — begin a chunked firmware upload of `size` bytes.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `size` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "size": 1
}
```

#### Response

Type: `null`

<a id="ota-update"></a>
### `ota.Update`

OTA.Update — start url-based firmware update.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `url` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 4096 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "url": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="ota-write"></a>
### `ota.Write`

OTA.Write — write a base64 chunk at offset.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `offset` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `data` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "offset": 0,
  "data": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

### `permission.Describe`

Return the permission namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="permission-getidentitypolicies"></a>
### `permission.GetIdentityPolicies`

permission.GetIdentityPolicies — read Zitadel identity (login/lockout/password) policies.

**Permission**: provider-support-only — instance-wide Zitadel state

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="permission-getroles"></a>
### `permission.GetRoles`

permission.GetRoles — return Zitadel built-in role keys held by a user.

**Permission**: admin-only

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `userId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "userId": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="permission-grantroles"></a>
### `permission.GrantRoles`

permission.GrantRoles — grant one or more Zitadel built-in roles to a user.

**Permission**: admin-only

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `userId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `roles` | `array<enum("admin" \| "manager" \| "editor" \| "installer" \| "operator" \| "automation_admin" \| "auditor" \| "viewer")>` | yes |  | minItems 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "userId": "string",
  "roles": [
    "admin"
  ]
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `success` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "success": false
}
```

<a id="permission-listadministrators"></a>
### `permission.ListAdministrators`

permission.ListAdministrators — list users with administrator role on the resolved organization.

**Permission**: provider-support-only — instance-wide Zitadel state

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="permission-revokeroles"></a>
### `permission.RevokeRoles`

permission.RevokeRoles — remove one or more Zitadel built-in roles from a user. Deletes the project authorization entirely when no roles remain.

**Permission**: admin-only

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `userId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `roles` | `array<enum("admin" \| "manager" \| "editor" \| "installer" \| "operator" \| "automation_admin" \| "auditor" \| "viewer")>` | yes |  | minItems 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "userId": "string",
  "roles": [
    "admin"
  ]
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `success` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "success": false
}
```

<a id="persona-namespace"></a>
## `persona` namespace

<a id="persona-create"></a>
### `persona.Create`

Create a custom persona.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `key` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 64 |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `description` | `string` | no |  | maxLength 512 |
| `statements` | `array<object>` | yes |  | minItems 1 |
| `statements[].actions` | `array<string>` | yes |  | minItems 1 |
| `statements[].not_actions` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `statements[].resource_types` | `array<string>` | yes |  | minItems 1 |
| `statements[].not_resource_types` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `statements[].effect` | `enum("Allow" \| "Deny")` | yes |  |  |
| `statements[].condition` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `statements[].condition.mfa` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `statements[].condition.mfa.required` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `statements[].condition.ip` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `statements[].condition.ip.cidrs` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `statements[].condition.time` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `statements[].condition.time.window` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `statements[].condition.time.window.start` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 32 |
| `statements[].condition.time.window.end` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 32 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "key": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "statements": [
    {
      "actions": [
        "string"
      ],
      "resource_types": [
        "string"
      ],
      "effect": "Allow"
    }
  ]
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="persona-delete"></a>
### `persona.Delete`

Delete a custom persona (refuses if assignments reference).

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="persona-describe"></a>
### `persona.Describe`

Component metadata.

**Permission**: public

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

### `persona.Get`

Fetch a persona by id.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="persona-list"></a>
### `persona.List`

List personas (system + custom).

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `includeSystem` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="persona-update"></a>
### `persona.Update`

Update a custom persona.

**Permission**: admin

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `description` | `string \| null` | no |  | maxLength 512 |
| `statements` | `array<object>` | no |  | minItems 1 |
| `statements[].actions` | `array<string>` | yes |  | minItems 1 |
| `statements[].not_actions` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `statements[].resource_types` | `array<string>` | yes |  | minItems 1 |
| `statements[].not_resource_types` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `statements[].effect` | `enum("Allow" \| "Deny")` | yes |  |  |
| `statements[].condition` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `statements[].condition.mfa` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `statements[].condition.mfa.required` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `statements[].condition.ip` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `statements[].condition.ip.cidrs` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `statements[].condition.time` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `statements[].condition.time.window` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `statements[].condition.time.window.start` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 32 |
| `statements[].condition.time.window.end` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 32 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

Pill.SetConfig (not publicly documented).

```json
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

```json
{}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |

```json
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="plugin-list"></a>
### `plugin.List`

List registered plugins with metadata + config (redacted for non-admins).

**Permission**: authenticated; non-admin configs redacted

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].name` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].version` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `items[].description` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `items[].config` | `object \| null` | no |  |  |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "name": "string"
    }
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false
}
```

<a id="plugin-remove"></a>
### `plugin.Remove`

Remove an installed plugin by name (symlink-safe path validation).

**Permission**: provider-support-only — removes code that runs fleet-wide inside the FM process

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "name": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="plugin-upload"></a>
### `plugin.Upload`

Upload a base64-encoded plugin zip (max 50 MB decoded).

**Permission**: provider-support-only — installs code that runs fleet-wide inside the FM process

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `data` | `string` | yes |  | base64 zip, capped ~50 MB decoded — maxLength 67108864 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "data": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `null`

| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |


---

<a id="policy-namespace"></a>
## `policy` namespace

<a id="policy-describe"></a>
### `policy.Describe`

Return the policy namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="policy-getdefaults"></a>
### `policy.GetDefaults`

Read per-type policy defaults (current DB value + env default + source + audit fields).

**Permission**: notifications / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].groupType` | `enum("standard" \| "operational" \| "critical" \| "custom")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].severityFloor` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].severityFloor.current` | `enum("info" \| "warning" \| "critical" \| null)` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].severityFloor.envDefault` | `enum("info" \| "warning" \| "critical" \| null)` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].severityFloor.source` | `enum("env-seed" \| "admin" \| "env-reset" \| "unset")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].severityFloor.lastUpdatedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].severityFloor.lastUpdatedBy` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].retentionDays` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].retentionDays.current` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 1, max 999999999 |
| `items[].retentionDays.envDefault` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 1, max 999999999 |
| `items[].retentionDays.source` | `enum("env-seed" \| "admin" \| "env-reset" \| "unset")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].retentionDays.lastUpdatedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].retentionDays.lastUpdatedBy` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].auditRetentionDays` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].auditRetentionDays.current` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 1, max 999999999 |
| `items[].auditRetentionDays.envDefault` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 1, max 999999999 |
| `items[].auditRetentionDays.source` | `enum("env-seed" \| "admin" \| "env-reset" \| "unset")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].auditRetentionDays.lastUpdatedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].auditRetentionDays.lastUpdatedBy` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `envFallback` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `envFallback.retentionFallbackDays` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |
| `envFallback.auditRetentionFallbackDays` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |
| `envFallback.sweepIntervalMinutes` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "groupType": "standard",
      "severityFloor": {
        "current": "info",
        "envDefault": "info",
        "source": "env-seed",
        "lastUpdatedAt": "string",
        "lastUpdatedBy": "string"
      },
      "retentionDays": {
        "current": 1,
        "envDefault": 1,
        "source": "env-seed",
        "lastUpdatedAt": "string",
        "lastUpdatedBy": "string"
      },
      "auditRetentionDays": {
        "current": 1,
        "envDefault": 1,
        "source": "env-seed",
        "lastUpdatedAt": "string",
        "lastUpdatedBy": "string"
      }
    }
  ],
  "envFallback": {
    "retentionFallbackDays": 1,
    "auditRetentionFallbackDays": 1,
    "sweepIntervalMinutes": 1
  }
}
```

<a id="policy-resetdefault"></a>
### `policy.ResetDefault`

provider-support-only. Rewrites one or more fields of a groupType with the current env value; logged as source=env-reset. Empty env value clears the DB row.

**Permission**: provider-support-only — writes the global policy table (no org partition); affects every tenant

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `groupType` | `enum("standard" \| "operational" \| "critical" \| "custom")` | yes |  |  |
| `fields` | `array<enum("severityFloor" \| "retentionDays" \| "auditRetentionDays")>` | yes |  | minItems 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "groupType": "standard",
  "fields": [
    "severityFloor"
  ]
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `groupType` | `enum("standard" \| "operational" \| "critical" \| "custom")` | yes |  |  |
| `severityFloor` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `severityFloor.current` | `enum("info" \| "warning" \| "critical" \| null)` | yes |  |  |
| `severityFloor.envDefault` | `enum("info" \| "warning" \| "critical" \| null)` | yes |  |  |
| `severityFloor.source` | `enum("env-seed" \| "admin" \| "env-reset" \| "unset")` | yes |  |  |
| `severityFloor.lastUpdatedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `severityFloor.lastUpdatedBy` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `retentionDays` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `retentionDays.current` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 1, max 999999999 |
| `retentionDays.envDefault` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 1, max 999999999 |
| `retentionDays.source` | `enum("env-seed" \| "admin" \| "env-reset" \| "unset")` | yes |  |  |
| `retentionDays.lastUpdatedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `retentionDays.lastUpdatedBy` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `auditRetentionDays` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `auditRetentionDays.current` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 1, max 999999999 |
| `auditRetentionDays.envDefault` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 1, max 999999999 |
| `auditRetentionDays.source` | `enum("env-seed" \| "admin" \| "env-reset" \| "unset")` | yes |  |  |
| `auditRetentionDays.lastUpdatedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `auditRetentionDays.lastUpdatedBy` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "groupType": "standard",
  "severityFloor": {
    "current": "info",
    "envDefault": "info",
    "source": "env-seed",
    "lastUpdatedAt": "string",
    "lastUpdatedBy": "string"
  },
  "retentionDays": {
    "current": 1,
    "envDefault": 1,
    "source": "env-seed",
    "lastUpdatedAt": "string",
    "lastUpdatedBy": "string"
  },
  "auditRetentionDays": {
    "current": 1,
    "envDefault": 1,
    "source": "env-seed",
    "lastUpdatedAt": "string",
    "lastUpdatedBy": "string"
  }
}
```

<a id="policy-updatedefaults"></a>
### `policy.UpdateDefaults`

provider-support-only partial update of one groupType row. null clears (falls through to env); omitted = no change. Optional ifUnchangedSince for optimistic concurrency (409 PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate on conflict).

**Permission**: provider-support-only — writes the global policy table (no org partition); affects every tenant

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `groupType` | `enum("standard" \| "operational" \| "critical" \| "custom")` | yes |  |  |
| `severityFloor` | `enum("info" \| "warning" \| "critical" \| null)` | no |  |  |
| `retentionDays` | `integer \| null` | no |  | min 1, max 999999999 |
| `auditRetentionDays` | `integer \| null` | no |  | min 1, max 999999999 |
| `ifUnchangedSince` | `string` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "groupType": "standard"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `groupType` | `enum("standard" \| "operational" \| "critical" \| "custom")` | yes |  |  |
| `severityFloor` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `severityFloor.current` | `enum("info" \| "warning" \| "critical" \| null)` | yes |  |  |
| `severityFloor.envDefault` | `enum("info" \| "warning" \| "critical" \| null)` | yes |  |  |
| `severityFloor.source` | `enum("env-seed" \| "admin" \| "env-reset" \| "unset")` | yes |  |  |
| `severityFloor.lastUpdatedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `severityFloor.lastUpdatedBy` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `retentionDays` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `retentionDays.current` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 1, max 999999999 |
| `retentionDays.envDefault` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 1, max 999999999 |
| `retentionDays.source` | `enum("env-seed" \| "admin" \| "env-reset" \| "unset")` | yes |  |  |
| `retentionDays.lastUpdatedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `retentionDays.lastUpdatedBy` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `auditRetentionDays` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `auditRetentionDays.current` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 1, max 999999999 |
| `auditRetentionDays.envDefault` | `integer \| null` | yes |  | min 1, max 999999999 |
| `auditRetentionDays.source` | `enum("env-seed" \| "admin" \| "env-reset" \| "unset")` | yes |  |  |
| `auditRetentionDays.lastUpdatedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `auditRetentionDays.lastUpdatedBy` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "groupType": "standard",
  "severityFloor": {
    "current": "info",
    "envDefault": "info",
    "source": "env-seed",
    "lastUpdatedAt": "string",
    "lastUpdatedBy": "string"
  },
  "retentionDays": {
    "current": 1,
    "envDefault": 1,
    "source": "env-seed",
    "lastUpdatedAt": "string",
    "lastUpdatedBy": "string"
  },
  "auditRetentionDays": {
    "current": 1,
    "envDefault": 1,
    "source": "env-seed",
    "lastUpdatedAt": "string",
    "lastUpdatedBy": "string"
  }
}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="presence-namespace"></a>
## `presence` namespace

<a id="presence-addzone"></a>
### `presence.AddZone`

Add a presence detection zone.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `config` | `object` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "config": {}
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="presence-deletezone"></a>
### `presence.DeleteZone`

Remove a detection zone by id.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

| Kind | Code | Message |

| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |

| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |

| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="report-namespace"></a>
## `report` namespace

<a id="report-cancel"></a>
### `report.Cancel`

Cancel a pending/running report job owned by the caller. Ready and failed jobs are returned unchanged.

**Permission**: reports / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `jobId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "jobId": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `jobId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `status` | `enum("pending" \| "ready" \| "failed" \| "cancelled")` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "jobId": "string",
  "status": "pending"
}
```

<a id="report-describe"></a>
### `report.Describe`

Return the report namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="report-generate"></a>
### `report.Generate`

Unified report endpoint — one front door for reports and data exports. Returns a jobId immediately (async); poll Report.GetReport for status + the owner-bound download URL. Two `kind`s: `energy` (the energy report — cost, tariff, CO2 and per-source sections; from, to, granularity incl. 15-minute, scope, tariff, currency, main_meter_ids, dashboardId; format html | csv) and `interval` (interval data / "load profile" — per-device readings of one or more metrics at a chosen granularity: metrics, from, to, granularity, scope/devices, per_device; streamed CSV). Use Energy.Query for live on-screen charts; use this for files to download.

**Permission**: reports / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `kind` | `enum("energy" \| "interval" \| "energy_dump")` | yes |  |  |
| `format` | `enum("csv" \| "html")` | no |  |  |
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "kind": "energy"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `jobId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `status` | `enum("pending")` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "jobId": "string",
  "status": "pending"
}
```

<a id="report-getreport"></a>
### `report.GetReport`

Fetch a report started by Report.Generate. Owner-checked: a caller only sees their own jobs. Returns status (pending | ready | failed); when ready, downloadUrl/htmlUrl keep backwards compatibility and artifacts carries the dataCsvGz/summaryHtml files served from /api/exports/download (authenticated GET, streamed). Records expire after configured report retention.

**Permission**: reports / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `jobId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "jobId": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `jobId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `status` | `enum("pending" \| "ready" \| "failed" \| "cancelled")` | yes |  |  |
| `downloadUrl` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `htmlUrl` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `artifacts` | `any` | no |  |  |
| `manifest` | `any` | no |  |  |
| `progress` | `any` | no |  |  |
| `expiresAt` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `bytes` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `error` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "jobId": "string",
  "status": "pending"
}
```

<a id="report-purgereports"></a>
### `report.PurgeReports`

Wipe every stored report instance and the on-disk CSV files. Instance-wide provider support recovery only.

**Permission**: provider-support-only — instance-wide; drops every tenant report instance and the on-disk CSVs

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `success` | `const(true)` | yes |  |  |
| `deletedFiles` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `deletedDb` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "deletedFiles": 0,
  "deletedDb": false
}
```

<a id="report-suggesttimeshift"></a>
### `report.SuggestTimeShift`

Suggest the single best hour-to-hour load shift for the given device scope + window, scored against grid carbon intensity. Returns null when no useful shift can be proposed.

**Permission**: reports / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `scope` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `scope.groupId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.locationId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `scope.tagId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `devices` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `from` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `to` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `dashboardId` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `maxShiftableKWh` | `number` | no |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "from": "string",
  "to": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `plan` | `any` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "plan": null
}
```

<a id="reporttemplate-namespace"></a>
## `reporttemplate` namespace

<a id="reporttemplate-create"></a>
### `reporttemplate.Create`

Save a named report template.

**Permission**: reports / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `description` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `kind` | `enum("energy" \| "interval")` | yes |  |  |
| `params` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `sectionsEnabled` | `array<enum("demand" \| "solar" \| "battery" \| "ev" \| "tenant")> \| null` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "name": "string",
  "kind": "energy",
  "params": {}
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |

| `params` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `sectionsEnabled` | `array<enum("demand" \| "solar" \| "battery" \| "ev" \| "tenant")> \| null` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json

  "id": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `description` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `kind` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `params` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `sectionsEnabled` | `array<any> \| null` | no |  |  |
| `createdBy` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `updatedAt` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |

```json
  "name": "string",
  "kind": "string",
  "params": {},
  "createdAt": "string"
}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

### `rgbcct.Toggle`

RGBCCT.Toggle.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

```json
  "id": 0
}
```

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |

```json
}
```

<a id="schedule-namespace"></a>
## `schedule` namespace

<a id="schedule-create"></a>
### `schedule.Create`

Add a new schedule job; returns the device-assigned id.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `enable` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `timespec` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `calls` | `array<object>` | yes |  | minItems 1, maxItems 20 |
| `calls[].method` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `calls[].params` | `object` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "timespec": "string",
  "calls": [
    {
      "method": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0
}
```

<a id="schedule-delete"></a>
### `schedule.Delete`

Remove a schedule job by id.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `success` | `const(true)` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "success": true
}
```

<a id="schedule-deleteall"></a>
### `schedule.DeleteAll`

Wipe every schedule job on the target device.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `success` | `const(true)` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "success": true
}
```

Return the schedule namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

<a id="schedule-list"></a>
### `schedule.List`

List cron-style schedules stored on the target device.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].enable` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].timespec` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].calls` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].calls[].method` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `items[].calls[].params` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "enable": false,
      "timespec": "string",
      "calls": [
        {
          "method": "string"
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false
}
```

<a id="schedule-update"></a>
### `schedule.Update`

Partial-update an existing schedule job by id.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `enable` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `timespec` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `calls` | `array<object>` | no |  | minItems 1, maxItems 20 |
| `calls[].method` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `calls[].params` | `object` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `success` | `const(true)` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "success": true
}
```

| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="script-namespace"></a>
## `script` namespace

<a id="script-create"></a>
### `script.Create`

Script.Create — allocate a script slot. Returns {id}.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `name` | `string` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="script-delete"></a>
### `script.Delete`

Script.Delete.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `null`

<a id="script-describe"></a>
### `script.Describe`

Return the script namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="script-eval"></a>
### `script.Eval`

Script.Eval — evaluate code in the context of a running script. Returns {result}.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `code` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "code": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `result` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "result": "string"
}
```

<a id="script-getcode"></a>
### `script.GetCode`

Script.GetCode — returns {data, left}. Page via offset + len.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `len` | `integer` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="script-getconfig"></a>
### `script.GetConfig`

Script.GetConfig.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

```json

  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
```

Script.GetStatus — running state, mem usage, errors.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

<a id="script-list"></a>

Script.List — all scripts on the device.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string"
}
```

Type: `object`

<a id="script-putcode"></a>
### `script.PutCode`

Script.PutCode — write script source. append:false truncates first.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `code` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  |  |
| `append` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "code": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="script-setconfig"></a>
### `script.SetConfig`

Script.SetConfig — name / enable.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `config` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `config.name` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `config.enable` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "config": {}
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="script-start"></a>
### `script.Start`

Script.Start — begin execution. Returns {was_running}.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `was_running` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "was_running": false
}
```

<a id="script-stop"></a>
### `script.Stop`

Script.Stop — halt execution. Returns {was_running}.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `was_running` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "was_running": false
}
```

|------|------|---------|

| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |

```json
  "append": false
}
```

```json
{}
```

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="serial-setconfig"></a>
### `serial.SetConfig`

Serial.SetConfig — port mode + serial params + Modbus RTU server config.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `config` | `object` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "config": {}
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `restart_required` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "restart_required": false
}
```
