| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |

| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |

| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="serves-namespace"></a>
## `serves` namespace

<a id="serves-describe"></a>
### `serves.Describe`

Return the serves namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="serves-get"></a>
### `serves.Get`

Get one source-target relationship link.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `source` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `source.kind` | `enum("device" \| "group")` | yes |  |  |
| `source.id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `target` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `target.kind` | `enum("device" \| "group" \| "location")` | yes |  |  |
| `target.id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `relation` | `enum("serves:serves" \| "serves:powers" \| "serves:cools" \| "serves:heats" \| "serves:measures")` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "source": {
    "kind": "device",
    "id": "string"
  },
  "target": {
    "kind": "device",
    "id": "string"
  }
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `source` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `source.kind` | `enum("device" \| "group")` | yes |  |  |
| `source.id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `target` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `target.kind` | `enum("device" \| "group" \| "location")` | yes |  |  |
| `target.id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `relation` | `enum("serves:serves" \| "serves:powers" \| "serves:cools" \| "serves:heats" \| "serves:measures")` | yes |  |  |
| `weight` | `number \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `updatedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "source": {
    "kind": "device",
    "id": "string"
  },
  "target": {
    "kind": "device",
    "id": "string"
  },
  "relation": "serves:serves",
  "weight": 0,
  "createdAt": "string",
  "updatedAt": "string"
}
```

<a id="serves-list"></a>
### `serves.List`

List links by source or by target.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `source` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `source.kind` | `enum("device" \| "group")` | yes |  |  |
| `source.id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `target` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `target.kind` | `enum("device" \| "group" \| "location")` | yes |  |  |
| `target.id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | no |  |  |
| `items[].id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].source` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].source.kind` | `enum("device" \| "group")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].source.id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `items[].target` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].target.kind` | `enum("device" \| "group" \| "location")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].target.id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `items[].relation` | `enum("serves:serves" \| "serves:powers" \| "serves:cools" \| "serves:heats" \| "serves:measures")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].weight` | `number \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].updatedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{}
```

<a id="serves-set"></a>
### `serves.Set`

Create or update functional relationship links from one source to one or more targets.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `source` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `source.kind` | `enum("device" \| "group")` | yes |  |  |
| `source.id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `targets` | `array<object>` | yes |  | minItems 1, maxItems 100 |
| `targets[].kind` | `enum("device" \| "group" \| "location")` | yes |  |  |
| `targets[].id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `targets[].weight` | `number \| null` | no |  | min 1 |
| `relation` | `enum("serves:serves" \| "serves:powers" \| "serves:cools" \| "serves:heats" \| "serves:measures")` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "source": {
    "kind": "device",
    "id": "string"
  },
  "targets": [
    {
      "kind": "device",
      "id": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | no |  |  |
| `items[].id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].source` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].source.kind` | `enum("device" \| "group")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].source.id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `items[].target` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].target.kind` | `enum("device" \| "group" \| "location")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].target.id` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `items[].relation` | `enum("serves:serves" \| "serves:powers" \| "serves:cools" \| "serves:heats" \| "serves:measures")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].weight` | `number \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].updatedAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{}
```

<a id="serves-unset"></a>

Remove one link, all links for one target, or all links for a source.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "source": {
    "kind": "device",
    "id": "string"
  }
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |


---

```json
{

}
```

Type: `object`

```json

  "user": "string",
  "realm": "string",
  "ha1": "string"
}
```

Type: `null`

```json
  "name": "string"
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Response example:**

```json

  "profile_was": "string"
}
```

<a id="shelly-update"></a>
### `shelly.Update`

Shelly.Update — exactly one of stage or url. Stage names device-owned.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `stage` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `url` | `string` | no |  |  |

**Constraint**: must satisfy at least one of [stage] or [url].

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "stage": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `null`

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

## `storage` namespace

<a id="storage-describe"></a>
### `storage.Describe`

Return the storage namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="storage-getall"></a>
### `storage.GetAll`

Raw (key → value) dict — kept for legacy registry callers. New callers should prefer `storage.list`.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

### `storage.GetItem`

Read a value by key.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `key` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "key": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="storage-keys"></a>
### `storage.Keys`

List all stored keys for the caller.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

Type: `array<string>`

<a id="storage-list"></a>
### `storage.List`

Every (key, value) pair in the standard list envelope.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].key` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].value` | `any` | yes |  |  |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "key": "string",
      "value": null
    }
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false
}
```

<a id="storage-removeitem"></a>
### `storage.RemoveItem`

Delete a value by key.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `key` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "key": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

<a id="storage-setitem"></a>
### `storage.SetItem`

Upsert a value under a key in user-scoped storage.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `key` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `value` | `any` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "key": "string",
  "value": null
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object<any>`

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="switch-namespace"></a>
## `switch` namespace

<a id="switch-describe"></a>
### `switch.Describe`

Return the switch namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="switch-getconfig"></a>
### `switch.GetConfig`

Switch.GetConfig — fetch persisted config for one channel.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

<a id="switch-getstatus"></a>
### `switch.GetStatus`

Switch.GetStatus — runtime state for one channel.

**Permission**: devices / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

<a id="switch-resetcounters"></a>
### `switch.ResetCounters`

Switch.ResetCounters — clear energy/counters.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `types` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

<a id="switch-set"></a>
### `switch.Set`

Switch.Set — set output on/off (+ optional toggle_after).

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `on` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `toggle_after` | `number` | no |  |  |
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "on": false
}
```

<a id="switch-setconfig"></a>
### `switch.SetConfig`

Switch.SetConfig — partial config patch.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `config` | `object` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "config": {}
}
```

**Params example:**

```json

  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

```json
  "filename": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

```json
}
```

<a id="sys-settime"></a>
### `sys.SetTime`

Sys.SetTime — set time and/or timezone (at least one required).

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `time` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `timezone` | `string` | no |  |  |

**Constraint**: must satisfy at least one of [time] or [timezone].

**Params example:**

```json
  "shellyID": "string",

}
```

<a id="system-namespace"></a>
## `system` namespace

<a id="system-bootstrap"></a>
### `system.Bootstrap`

Return backend-owned runtime facts for frontend startup.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `version` | `const(1)` | yes |  |  |
| `organization` | `object \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `user` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `user.username` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `user.roles` | `array<enum("admin" \| "manager" \| "editor" \| "installer" \| "operator" \| "automation_admin" \| "auditor" \| "viewer" \| "none")>` | yes |  |  |
| `user.group` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `user.canWrite` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `user.isAdmin` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `user.isViewer` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `user.effectiveShape` | `object \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `runtime` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `runtime.backendVersion` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `runtime.apiContractVersion` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `runtime.authMode` | `enum("dev" \| "zitadel")` | yes |  |  |
| `runtime.deploymentMode` | `enum("oss" \| "shared_saas" \| "dedicated_saas")` | yes |  |  |
| `runtime.safeMode` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `runtime.frontendArtifact` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `runtime.frontendArtifact.id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `runtime.frontendArtifact.version` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `runtime.frontendArtifact.uiContractVersion` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `runtime.addons` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `runtime.addons.grafana` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `runtime.addons.nodeRed` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `features` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `features.components` | `object<boolean>` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "version": 1,
  "organization": null,
  "user": {
    "username": "string",
    "roles": [
      "admin"
    ],
    "group": "string",
    "canWrite": false,
    "isAdmin": false,
    "isViewer": false,
    "effectiveShape": null
  },
  "runtime": {
    "backendVersion": "string",
    "apiContractVersion": "string",
    "authMode": "dev",
    "deploymentMode": "oss",
    "safeMode": false,
    "frontendArtifact": {
      "id": "string",
      "version": "string",
      "uiContractVersion": "string"
    },
    "addons": {
      "grafana": false,
      "nodeRed": false
    }
  },
  "features": {
    "components": {}
  }
}
```

```json
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

| `methods` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |
| `components` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |
| `entityCapabilities` | `object<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object<any>` | no |  |  |

<a id="system-getconnectioninspector"></a>
### `system.GetConnectionInspector`

Return recent events and metadata for a single WebSocket connection.

**Permission**: admin-only

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `connectionId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "connectionId": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `connectionId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `user` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `connectedAt` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `ageSec` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `recentEvents` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `recentEvents[].kind` | `enum("rpc" \| "event" \| "patch")` | yes |  |  |
| `recentEvents[].method` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `recentEvents[].ts` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `recentEvents[].ms` | `number \| null` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "connectionId": "string",
  "user": "string",
  "organizationId": "string",
  "connectedAt": 0,
  "ageSec": 0,
  "recentEvents": [
    {
      "kind": "rpc",
      "method": "string",
      "ts": 0,
      "ms": 0
    }
  ]
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

```json
      "stats": {}
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="system-getslowbuilds"></a>
### `system.GetSlowBuilds`

Return slow device builds (probe + compose) with their per-stage breakdown in the requested window.

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `windowSec` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 500 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `entries` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].shellyID` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].totalMs` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].componentPages` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].ts` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].stages` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].stages[].name` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].stages[].ms` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "entries": [
    {
      "shellyID": "string",
      "totalMs": 0,
      "componentPages": 0,
      "ts": 0,
      "stages": [
        {
          "name": "string",
          "ms": 0
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="system-getslowclients"></a>

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `entries` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].clientId` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].bufferedBytes` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].action` | `enum("paused" \| "dropped")` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].ts` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json

    {
      "clientId": "string",
      "bufferedBytes": 0,
      "action": "paused",
      "ts": 0
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="system-getslowdevicecommands"></a>
### `system.GetSlowDeviceCommands`

Return slow device commands (FM→device RPCs) with method and round-trip ms in the requested window.

**Permission**: admin-only

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `windowSec` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 500 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `entries` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].label` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].method` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].ms` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].outcome` | `enum("ok" \| "error" \| "timeout" \| "unsupported")` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].ts` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

```json
  "entries": [
    {
      "label": "string",
      "method": "string",

  ]
}
```

<a id="system-getslowrpcs"></a>

Return slow RPC calls (above P95 + 100ms) in the requested time window.

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `windowSec` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 500 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `entries` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].method` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].ms` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].ts` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].sender` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].senderType` | `enum("user" \| "service_user" \| "system")` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].organizationId` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `entries[].p95Ms` | `number` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json

      "ms": 0,
      "ts": 0,

      "organizationId": "string",
      "p95Ms": 0
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="system-gettopology"></a>
### `system.GetTopology`

```json
{}
```

| `generatedAt` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `thresholds` | `object<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].label` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].role` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].cluster` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].zone` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].kind` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].status` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].stats` | `object<any>` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].route` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].description` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].virtual` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].noisy` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].order` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].owner` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].criticality` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].stale` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].participatesIn` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].dataClasses` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].externalSystem` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `nodes[].collapseByDefault` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `edges` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].from` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].to` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].direction` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].kind` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].throughput` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].counterName` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].latencyMetric` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].errorMetric` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].throughputMetric` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].status` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].criticality` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].declared` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].observed` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].stale` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].lastSeenAt` | `integer \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].description` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `edges[].participatesIn` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `zones` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `zones[].id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `zones[].label` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `zones[].description` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `zones[].order` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `zones[].collapseByDefault` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `flows` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `flows[].id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `flows[].label` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `flows[].description` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `flows[].category` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `flows[].orderedNodeIds` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `flows[].expectedEdgeIds` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `clusters` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `clusters[].id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `clusters[].label` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "schemaVersion": 0,
  "generatedAt": 0,
  "thresholds": {},
  "nodes": [
    {
      "id": "string",
      "label": "string",
      "role": "string",
      "cluster": "string",
      "zone": "string",
      "kind": "string",
      "status": "string",
      "stats": {},
      "route": "string",
      "description": "string",
      "virtual": false,
      "noisy": false,
      "order": 0,
      "owner": "string",
      "criticality": "string",
      "stale": false,
      "participatesIn": [
        "string"
      ],
      "dataClasses": [
        "string"
      ],
      "externalSystem": "string",
      "collapseByDefault": false
    }
  ],
  "edges": [
    {
      "id": "string",
      "from": "string",
      "to": "string",
      "direction": "string",
      "kind": "string",
      "throughput": 0,
      "counterName": "string",
      "latencyMetric": "string",
      "errorMetric": "string",
      "throughputMetric": "string",
      "status": "string",
      "criticality": "string",
      "declared": false,
      "observed": false,
      "stale": false,
      "lastSeenAt": 0,
      "description": "string",
      "participatesIn": [
        "string"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "zones": [
    {
      "id": "string",
      "label": "string",
      "description": "string",
      "order": 0,
      "collapseByDefault": false
    }
  ],
  "flows": [
    {
      "id": "string",
      "label": "string",
      "description": "string",
      "category": "string",
      "orderedNodeIds": [
        "string"
      ],
      "expectedEdgeIds": [
        "string"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "clusters": [
    {
      "id": "string",
      "label": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="system-gettopologydiff"></a>
### `system.GetTopologyDiff`

Return notable edge throughput + node status changes over the requested window.

**Permission**: admin-only

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `windowMin` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 60 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `schemaVersion` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `windowMin` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `changedEdges` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `changedEdges[].id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `changedEdges[].previousThroughput` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `changedEdges[].currentThroughput` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `changedEdges[].pctChange` | `number` | yes |  |  |
| `changedNodes` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `changedNodes[].id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `changedNodes[].statusBefore` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `changedNodes[].statusAfter` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `nodeMembershipChanges` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `nodeMembershipChanges[].id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `nodeMembershipChanges[].change` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `nodeMembershipChanges[].status` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `edgeMembershipChanges` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `edgeMembershipChanges[].id` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `edgeMembershipChanges[].change` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `edgeMembershipChanges[].from` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `edgeMembershipChanges[].to` | `string` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "schemaVersion": 0,
  "windowMin": 0,
  "changedEdges": [
    {
      "id": "string",
      "previousThroughput": 0,
      "currentThroughput": 0,
      "pctChange": 0
    }
  ],
  "changedNodes": [
    {
      "id": "string",
      "statusBefore": "string",
      "statusAfter": "string"
    }
  ],
  "nodeMembershipChanges": [
    {
      "id": "string",
      "change": "string",
      "status": "string"
    }
  ],
  "edgeMembershipChanges": [
    {
      "id": "string",
      "change": "string",
      "from": "string",
      "to": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="system-observability-set"></a>

Set runtime observability level.

**Permission**: provider-support-only

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `level` | `integer` | no |  | min 0, max 3 |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `observability` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `level` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0, max 3 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "observability": false,
  "level": 0
}
```

<a id="system-submittelemetry"></a>
### `system.SubmitTelemetry`

Submit frontend interaction counters for observability.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `counts` | `object<number>` | no |  |  |
| `clicks` | `integer` | no |  | min 1 |
| `wsTelemetry` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `wsTelemetry.patchBufferMaxDepth` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `wsTelemetry.droppedFrameCount` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `wsTelemetry.rafFrameTimeMaxMs` | `number` | no |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

Type: `null`

<a id="system-subscribe"></a>
### `system.Subscribe`

Subscribe the current websocket to runtime events. Per-event options.events[name] may include a paths: string[] of dot-path declarations (e.g. ["switch:0.output","sys.unixtime"]). When paths is present the server only fires when one of those fields actually changed, and only those fields are sent. Omit paths to receive today’s full payload (back-compat).

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `events` | `array<string>` | yes |  |  |
| `options` | `object<any>` | no |  |  |
| `connectionId` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `lastSeenStreamId` | `string` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "events": [
    "string"
  ]
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ids` | `array<integer>` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "ids": [
    0
  ]
}
```

<a id="system-unsubscribe"></a>
### `system.Unsubscribe`

Remove websocket event subscriptions by id.

**Permission**: authenticated

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ids` | `array<integer>` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "ids": [
    0
  ]
}
```

#### Response

Type: `null`

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |


---

<a id="tag-namespace"></a>
## `tag` namespace

<a id="tag-assign"></a>
### `tag.Assign`

Batch-assign subjects to a tag. Idempotent: already-assigned rows are skipped.

**Permission**: tags / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `subjects` | `array<object>` | yes |  | minItems 1, maxItems 500 |
| `subjects[].subjectType` | `enum("location" \| "group" \| "device" \| "entity" \| "alert_rule" \| "destination_group" \| "channel" \| "script")` | yes |  |  |
| `subjects[].subjectId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "subjects": [
    {
      "subjectType": "location",
      "subjectId": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `assigned` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `assigned[].subjectType` | `enum("location" \| "group" \| "device" \| "entity" \| "alert_rule" \| "destination_group" \| "channel" \| "script")` | yes |  |  |
| `assigned[].subjectId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "assigned": [
    {
      "subjectType": "location",
      "subjectId": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="tag-create"></a>
### `tag.Create`

Create a tag. Key auto-derived from name (slugified + uniquified) when omitted.

**Permission**: tags / create

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `key` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `description` | `string \| null` | no |  | maxLength 500 |
| `color` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `icon` | `string \| null` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 80 |
| `metadata` | `object<any>` | no |  | ≤ 65536 B JSON |
| `imageAssetId` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "name": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `key` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `description` | `string \| null` | yes |  | maxLength 500 |
| `color` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `icon` | `string \| null` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 80 |
| `metadata` | `object<any>` | yes |  | ≤ 65536 B JSON |
| `imageAssetId` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `counts` | `object<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "organizationId": "string",
  "key": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "color": "string",
  "icon": "string",
  "metadata": {},
  "imageAssetId": "string",
  "createdAt": "string",
  "updatedAt": "string"
}
```

<a id="tag-delete"></a>
### `tag.Delete`

Delete a tag. Assignment rows cascade-delete with the tag.

**Permission**: tags / delete

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `deleted` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "deleted": false,
  "id": 0
}
```

<a id="tag-describe"></a>
### `tag.Describe`

Return the tag namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```

<a id="tag-get"></a>
### `tag.Get`

Fetch one tag by id.

**Permission**: tags / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `includeSummary` | `boolean` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `key` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `description` | `string \| null` | yes |  | maxLength 500 |
| `color` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `icon` | `string \| null` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 80 |
| `metadata` | `object<any>` | yes |  | ≤ 65536 B JSON |
| `imageAssetId` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `counts` | `object<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "organizationId": "string",
  "key": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "color": "string",
  "icon": "string",
  "metadata": {},
  "imageAssetId": "string",
  "createdAt": "string",
  "updatedAt": "string"
}
```

<a id="tag-list"></a>
### `tag.List`

List tags with query/key filters and sort options.

**Permission**: tags / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `query` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `key` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `includeSummary` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 1000 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |
| `sortBy` | `enum("key" \| "name" \| "createdAt" \| "updatedAt")` | no |  |  |
| `sortDir` | `enum("asc" \| "desc")` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].organizationId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `items[].key` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `items[].description` | `string \| null` | yes |  | maxLength 500 |
| `items[].color` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].icon` | `string \| null` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 80 |
| `items[].metadata` | `object<any>` | yes |  | ≤ 65536 B JSON |
| `items[].imageAssetId` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].counts` | `object<any>` | no |  |  |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "organizationId": "string",
      "key": "string",
      "name": "string",
      "description": "string",
      "color": "string",
      "icon": "string",
      "metadata": {},
      "imageAssetId": "string",
      "createdAt": "string",
      "updatedAt": "string"
    }
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false
}
```

<a id="tag-listassignments"></a>
### `tag.ListAssignments`

List assignments for a tag with optional subject-type filter.

**Permission**: tags / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `subjectType` | `enum("location" \| "group" \| "device" \| "entity" \| "alert_rule" \| "destination_group" \| "channel" \| "script")` | no |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | no |  | min 1, max 1000 |
| `offset` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].subjectType` | `enum("location" \| "group" \| "device" \| "entity" \| "alert_rule" \| "destination_group" \| "channel" \| "script")` | yes |  |  |
| `items[].subjectId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |
| `total` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `limit` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `offset` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `has_more` | `boolean` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "subjectType": "location",
      "subjectId": "string"
    }
  ],
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": false
}
```

<a id="tag-listforsubject"></a>
### `tag.ListForSubject`

Tag IDs currently attached to one subject.

**Permission**: tags / read

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `subjectType` | `enum("location" \| "group" \| "device" \| "entity" \| "alert_rule" \| "destination_group" \| "channel" \| "script")` | yes |  |  |
| `subjectId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "subjectType": "location",
  "subjectId": "string"
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `tagIds` | `array<integer>` | yes |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "tagIds": [
    1
  ]
}
```

<a id="tag-unassign"></a>
### `tag.Unassign`

Batch-remove subject assignments. Missing rows are silently skipped.

**Permission**: tags / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `subjects` | `array<object>` | yes |  | minItems 1, maxItems 500 |
| `subjects[].subjectType` | `enum("location" \| "group" \| "device" \| "entity" \| "alert_rule" \| "destination_group" \| "channel" \| "script")` | yes |  |  |
| `subjects[].subjectId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "subjects": [
    {
      "subjectType": "location",
      "subjectId": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `unassigned` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `unassigned[].subjectType` | `enum("location" \| "group" \| "device" \| "entity" \| "alert_rule" \| "destination_group" \| "channel" \| "script")` | yes |  |  |
| `unassigned[].subjectId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 255 |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "unassigned": [
    {
      "subjectType": "location",
      "subjectId": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

<a id="tag-update"></a>
### `tag.Update`

Partial-update a tag. Key is immutable in phase 1.

**Permission**: tags / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `organizationId` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `patch` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `patch.name` | `string` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `patch.description` | `string \| null` | no |  | maxLength 500 |
| `patch.color` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `patch.icon` | `string \| null` | no |  | minLength 1, maxLength 80 |
| `patch.metadata` | `object<any>` | no |  | ≤ 65536 B JSON |
| `patch.imageAssetId` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "patch": {}
}
```

#### Response

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `organizationId` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `key` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 128 |
| `description` | `string \| null` | yes |  | maxLength 500 |
| `color` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `icon` | `string \| null` | yes |  | minLength 1, maxLength 80 |
| `metadata` | `object<any>` | yes |  | ≤ 65536 B JSON |
| `imageAssetId` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `createdAt` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `updatedAt` | `string \| null` | yes |  |  |
| `counts` | `object<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "id": 0,
  "organizationId": "string",
  "key": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "color": "string",
  "icon": "string",
  "metadata": {},
  "imageAssetId": "string",
  "createdAt": "string",
  "updatedAt": "string"
}
```

| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="tariff-namespace"></a>
## `tariff` namespace

<a id="tariff-add"></a>
### `tariff.Add`

Create a new tariff in the caller org.

**Permission**: reports / create

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `currency` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `timezone` | `string` | yes |  | maxLength 64 |
| `billingDay` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1, max 28 |
| `kind` | `enum("single" \| "day_night" \| "tou" \| "live")` | yes |  |  |
| `standingCharge` | `number` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `standingChargePeriod` | `enum("day" \| "month")` | yes |  |  |
| `vatPct` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |
| `demandRate` | `number \| null` | no |  |  |
| `seasons` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `seasons[].startMonthDay` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `seasons[].endMonthDay` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `seasons[].windows` | `array<object>` | yes |  |  |
| `seasons[].windows[].daysMask` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1, max 127 |
| `seasons[].windows[].startTime` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `seasons[].windows[].endTime` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `seasons[].windows[].price` | `number` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "name": "string",
  "currency": "string",
  "timezone": "string",
  "billingDay": 1,
  "kind": "single",
  "standingCharge": 0,
  "standingChargePeriod": "day",
  "seasons": [
    {
      "startMonthDay": "string",
      "endMonthDay": "string",
      "windows": [
        {
          "daysMask": 1,
          "startTime": "string",
          "endTime": "string",
          "price": 0
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="tariff-assign"></a>
### `tariff.Assign`

Attach or remove a tariff assignment for a metering point.

**Permission**: reports / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `tariffId` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `scopeLevel` | `enum("dashboard" \| "device" \| "channel")` | yes |  |  |
| `dashboardId` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |
| `deviceExternalId` | `string \| null` | no |  |  |
| `channel` | `integer \| null` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "tariffId": 0,
  "scopeLevel": "dashboard"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

```json
{}
```

<a id="tariff-setlivesource"></a>
### `tariff.SetLiveSource`

Configure a live tariff source. mode=push returns a one-time token for the price-push URL.

**Permission**: reports / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `tariffId` | `integer` | yes |  | min 1 |
| `mode` | `enum("push" \| "pull")` | yes |  |  |
| `provider` | `string` | no |  |  |
| `providerConfig` | `object` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "tariffId": 1,
  "mode": "push"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

| `currency` | `string` | yes |  |  |

| `standingCharge` | `number` | yes |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
  "standingCharge": 0,
```

| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |

| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |

| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | Thermostat component index — min 0 |
| `profile_id` | `integer` | yes |  |  |
| `<additional>` | `any` | no |  | Additional unspecified keys are accepted with any value. |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "profile_id": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="thermostat-schedule-changerule"></a>
### `thermostat.Schedule.ChangeRule`

Thermostat.Schedule.ChangeRule.

**Permission**: devices / update

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | Thermostat component index — min 0 |
| `rule_id` | `integer` | yes |  | min 0 |
| `hour` | `integer` | no |  | min 0, max 23 |
| `minute` | `integer` | no |  | min 0, max 59 |
| `target_C` | `number` | no |  |  |
| `enable` | `boolean` | no |  |  |
| `days` | `array<integer>` | no |  | minItems 1, maxItems 7 |

**Constraint**: must satisfy at least one of [hour, minute] or [target_C] or [enable] or [days].

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "rule_id": 0,
  "hour": 0,
  "minute": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

### Error kinds

| Kind | Code | Message |
|------|------|---------|
| `ValidationFailed` | 1000 | Request params failed validation |
| `PermissionDenied` | 1001 | Caller is not authorized for this operation |
| `ResourceNotFound` | 1002 | Resource not found |
| `ResourceConflict` | 1003 | Resource already exists or is in a conflicting state |
| `UnsupportedOperation` | 1005 | Operation is not supported for this resource |
| `OperationFailed` | 1006 | Operation failed |
| `ServiceUnavailable` | 1007 | Service is temporarily unavailable |
| `RateLimitExceeded` | 1008 | Caller is issuing requests too fast — retry later |
| `OrgScopeRequired` | 1010 | organizationId is required for this operation |
| `CrossOrgReference` | 1011 | Reference crosses organization boundary |
| `InvalidSubjectType` | 1012 | Subject type is not allowed for this operation |
| `InvalidPatchField` | 1013 | Patch contains an unsupported or immutable field |
| `EntityCapabilityUnknown` | 1100 | Entity does not expose the requested capability |
| `DeviceOffline` | 1200 | Device is offline — command cannot be delivered |
| `DeviceOperationFailed` | 1201 | Device operation failed |
| `DashboardNotFound` | 1500 | Dashboard not found |
| `DashboardTemplateNotFound` | 1501 | Dashboard template not found |
| `DashboardTemplateBuiltinReadonly` | 1502 | Builtin dashboard template cannot be modified or deleted |
| `DashboardItemNotFound` | 1503 | Dashboard item not found |
| `DashboardScopeMismatch` | 1504 | Item references a resource outside the dashboard scope |
| `DashboardImportSchemaMismatch` | 1505 | Import JSON does not match expected format |
| `DashboardImportUnsupportedGrafanaVersion` | 1506 | Grafana schemaVersion is below supported floor |
| `DashboardDefaultConflict` | 1507 | Another dashboard is already default for this organization |
| `DashboardItemRefInvalid` | 1508 | Dashboard item refers to a missing or cross-org subject |
| `AdminCommandFailed` | 1800 | Device RPC command failed |
| `GroupNotFound` | 2500 | Group not found |
| `GroupParentNotFound` | 2501 | Parent group not found |
| `GroupParentCycle` | 2502 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `GroupNameConflict` | 2503 | A group with this name already exists at this parent |
| `GroupDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2504 | Group has child groups |
| `GroupMembershipModeUnsupported` | 2505 | Membership mode is not supported in phase 1 |
| `GroupLegacyHierarchyLocked` | 2506 | Legacy group hierarchy is locked — create a new group to reorganize |
| `LocationNotFound` | 2900 | Location not found |
| `LocationParentNotFound` | 2901 | Parent location not found |
| `LocationParentCycle` | 2902 | Parent change would create a cycle |
| `LocationNameConflict` | 2903 | A location with this name already exists at this parent |
| `LocationCodeConflict` | 2904 | locationCode is already in use in this organization |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasChildren` | 2905 | Location has child locations |
| `LocationDeleteBlockedHasAssignments` | 2906 | Location has direct device/entity assignments |
| `TagNotFound` | 3000 | Tag not found |
| `TagKeyConflict` | 3001 | Tag key already exists in this organization |
| `TagKeyInvalid` | 3002 | Tag key is not valid per `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{1,63}$` |
| `DestinationNotFound` | 3100 | Destination group not found |
| `DestinationNameConflict` | 3101 | A destination group with this name already exists |
| `DestinationInUseByRule` | 3102 | Destination group is still referenced by one or more alert rules |
| `DeliveryJobNotFound` | 3200 | Delivery job not found |
| `PolicyGroupTypeUnknown` | 3300 | groupType is not a known type |
| `PolicyFieldUnknown` | 3301 | field key is not editable via policy API |
| `PolicyValueInvalid` | 3302 | value violates the policy field's shape constraint |
| `PolicyDefaultsStaleUpdate` | 3303 | policy defaults changed since getdefaults — refresh and retry |
| `NotAShellyDevice` | 3401 | response did not match the Shelly RPC contract |
| `UnsupportedDeviceGen` | 3402 | device generation is not supported by Discovery.AdmitDevice |
| `FirmwareTooOld` | 3403 | device firmware is below the minimum required by FM |
| `AuthRequired` | 3404 | device has authentication enabled; re-invoke AdmitDevice with the device password |
| `AuthFailed` | 3405 | device rejected the supplied credentials |
| `HostNotAllowed` | 3406 | host resolves to a reserved address range and cannot be admitted; set FM_DISCOVERY_ALLOW_PRIVATE=true for office-LAN installs |
| `IngressRejected` | 3500 | Device ingress connection was rejected |

<a id="trv-namespace"></a>
## `trv` namespace

<a id="trv-calibrate"></a>
### `trv.Calibrate`

Trv.Calibrate via BluTrv.Call.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | BluTrv component index on the gateway — min 0 |
| `thermostatId` | `integer` | no |  | min 0 |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0
}
```

#### Response

Type: `null`

BluTrv.Call — tunneled RPC to TRV.

**Permission**: devices / execute

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `shellyID` | `string` | yes |  | Target Shelly device identifier — minLength 1, maxLength 120 |
| `id` | `integer` | yes |  | BluTrv component index on the gateway — min 0 |
| `method` | `string` | yes |  | minLength 1 |
| `params` | `object` | no |  |  |

**Params example:**

```json
{
  "shellyID": "string",
  "id": 0,
  "method": "string"
}
```

#### Response

Type: `object`

<a id="trv-describe"></a>
### `trv.Describe`

Return the trv namespace contract (methods, schemas, permissions, errors).

**Permission**: public — no-permission metadata

#### Params

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

**Params example:**

```json
{}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `namespace` | `string` | yes |  |  |
| `methods` | `object` | yes |  |  |
| `limits` | `object` | no |  |  |
| `tags` | `array<string>` | no |  |  |
| `errors` | `array<any>` | no |  |  |

**Response example:**

```json
{
  "namespace": "string",
  "methods": {}
}
```
